items.summary: 10-Day 'veni, vidi, vici' package to conquer Microsoft Power BI and improve your data experience!
items.description:
10-Day 'veni, vidi, vici' package to conquer PowerBI.

In your life you are guided by confidence and your business decisions turn into victories? You want the tool tailored to your needs and full knowledge how to use and develop it with time? This offer is dedicated to you! Veni, vidi, vici - 'I came, I saw, I conquered' - 3 steps to quick victory on the market you are interested in.

Veni - is the first step when you come to us for the pre-implementation analysis. Thanks to it you will get the full picture of implementation with recommendation and requirements. Vidi - is the second step when you see your Power BI system working - the result of our Proof of Concept implementation. Vici - last but not least step when you conquer Power BI by undergoing dedicated training based on your data in your Power BI reporting system.

The scope of the analysis (2 days of the Veni, vidi, vici package):

  • 2-day pre-implementation analysis covering up to 4 areas within company, completed by providing documentation of the work carried out together with the Power BI implementation plan report and the required system architecture.

*the exact schedule of the pre-implementation analysis divided into areas will be agreed with the Client before the implementation date.

The scope of the Proof of Concept (6 days of the Veni, vidi, vici package):

  • 6-day implementation based on analysis and materials provided, required to build significant part of the entire system. This stage would show effectiveness of EBIS employees and how much of the fully productive system can be completed within a given period.

The scope of the workshops: (2 days of the Veni, vidi, vici package)

  • Analysis of problems in currently existing models
  • Creating reports and dashboards - advanced methods
  • Power BI administration - groups, sharing reports
  • Data modeling
  • Power BI solution architecture
  • Work on Power BI models currently existing at the Client's Company - problem solving

items.displayName: Azure Develop Core Cloud Solution: 4-day Workshop
items.summary:
Azure Certification Bundle Exam AZ-201 has the following courses in a three day week, see below:

DE 20101 AZ-201T01, DE 20102 AZ-201T02, DE 20103 AZ-201T03
items.description:
About this Course

This course will prepare you for the newly launched Microsoft’s Azure Developer certification exam: AZ-203 which is a combination of AZ-200: Microsoft Azure Developer Core Solutions and AZ-201: Microsoft Azure Developer Advanced Solutions. The coursewares cover Azure architecture, Azure technology development solutions, Azure storage services and solutions, Azure Cognitive Services such as Computer Vision, QnA Maker, and natural language processing, Azure service solutions, security solutions, API management services, and much more.

At course completion

After completing this course, students will be able to:

  • Learn common Azure application design and connectivity patterns

  • Measuring and planning throughput, and data access structure

  • Learn about Azure networking topologies

  • Create an Azure app service web app by using Azure CLI, Powershell, and other tools

  • Create documentation for the API by using open source and other tools and more

Course Outline

Day 1

  • Module 1: Develop for asynchronous processing

  • Module 2: Develop for autoscaling

  • Module 3: Develop long-running tasks

  • Module 4: Implement distributed transactions

Day 2

  • Module 1: Enable the search of textual content

  • Module 2: Instrument an app or service and implement logging

  • Module 3: Manage APIs by using API Management

  • Module 4: Configure a message-based integration architecture

Day 3

  • Module 1: Develop an application message model

  • Module 2: Develop Azure Cognitive Services solutions

Day 4

  • Module 4: Create and intergrate bots

  • Module 5: Create and implement IoT solutions

  • Workshop Summary and LABS

items.summary: Azure enables you to manage user identities and credentials, and control access to protect business and personal information.
items.description:
Deliverables

With the Azure Security Assessment, understand your security posture and confidently leverage your Microsoft Azure products to increase your business agility both efficiently and securely.


Phase I: Review & Assess

  • Comprehensive information gathering of your organizations posture
  • Discussing strategic business objective in using cloud technology (Azure)
  • Assess security content of your organization and the information sensitivity

    Phase II: Analyze

  • Information and assessment of current/planned deployment strategies
  • Analysis of configurations in accordance with Microsoft and industry best practices

    Phase III: Recommendations

  • Recommendations and document findings Presentation of results and an Azure Cybersecurity Briefing presentation.

    Avaleris proposes to provide services as outlined in this offer, our pricing is based on our understanding of the project and the defined scope and associated assumptions.

items.summary:
Database Security and Compliance - 4 Week Implementation

DB Shield Azure Service protects databases with a set of preconfigured defenses, and helps build a custom security policy for you.
items.description:
# DB Shield

Database Security and Compliance

The growing number of threats to databases and unauthorised access to the data within, is a major concern for CISOs.

The five critical security questions that are on the minds of all CISOs today are:

  1. Where is my crucial data?

  2. What is happening to the data?

  3. Who is accessing the data?

  4. Is the data private and secure?

5. Can I report on this?

## How DB Shield Azure Service assists

DB Shield Azure Service protects databases with a set of preconfigured defences and helps build a custom security policy for your environment – making it easier to demonstrate compliance to auditors and improve critical asset data protection.

The service cost-effectively protects your data from threats by monitoring activity locally on each DB server with minimal performance overhead and by alerting or terminating malicious behavior in real time, including virtualized or cloud computing environments.

All activities are recorded and stored in a Secure Azure SQL Database. Automated reports ensure clients are aware of what security risks are present within their environments. Clients can track authorised and unauthorised changes to ensure uptime within their application sets.

## Azure Based – Secure and Cost Effective

The DB Shield repository and application server sit securely within Azure. Thus, even if the monitored database is down, the log files and reports can still be accessed.

The solution has the following Azure components:

* Azure SQL Database (PaaS);

* Application Server residing on an Azure VM;

* Site-to-Site VPN - enabling secure connectivity to Azure.

Once the Site-to-Site VPN is setup, Clients are able to start leveraging other Azure solutions.

## Affordable Monthly Subscription

As a managed service DB Shield requires No Capex investment. It is quickly deployed to provide immediate business value and insights with no infrastructure dependencies. The solution is a fixed monthly fee

items.longSummary: Debian 10 with MariaDB 10.5 provides you the versatility to handle transactional, analytical, and hybrid workloads, and the scalability to grow.
items.summary: Debian 10 with MariaDB 10.5 image of a relational database
items.description:
Debian 10 with MariaDB 10.5

MariaDB is a very adaptable enterprise database software, which provides the ability to handle transactional, analytical, or hybrid transactional/analytical workloads as well as relational or document data, and the ability to scale from standalone databases and columnar data warehouses to fully distributed SQL databases executing millions of transactions per second and performing interactive, ad hoc analytics on billions of rows.

Some of MariaDB features:

  • MariaDB is using one of the most popular query languages
  • MariaDB supports a wide variety of programming languages
  • MariaDB provides lots of new commands and operations unavailable in MySQL

To support a comprehensive disaster recovery strategy, the MariaDB Platform provides a complete set of tools and capabilities for rapid recovery without data loss – everything from full, incremental, and partial backup/restore to point-in-time rollback (i.e., flashback). Don’t hesitate to start using our highly functional server and easily the productivity of the database.

Virtual Pulse is happy to provide you with a Debian 10 with MariaDB 10.5 Image, fully pre-configured and ready to be deployed in Azure environments just in a few clicks! Deploy & Enjoy!

Disclaimer:Virtual Pulse does not offer commercial licenses of the products mentioned above. MariaDB is a registered trademark of respective companies. No warranty of any kind, express or implied, is included with this software.

items.displayName: Debian 10 with SoftEther VPN Server - Free VPN
items.longSummary: SoftEther VPN Server is an optimum alternative to OpenVPN and Microsoft's VPN servers. It has a clone function of OpenVPN Server and you can integrate from OpenVPN to SoftEther VPN smoothly.
items.summary: Multifunctional, cross-platform, and enterprise-grade VPN Server
items.description:
Debian 10 with SoftEther VPN Server - Free VPN

Perfectly optimized by Virtual Pulse, this SoftEther VPN Server provides you with cost-effectiveness, scalability, and flexibility of VPN Services in Azure Marketplace. This Image is always up-to-date and constantly monitoring for vulnerabilities in order to meet all industry-leading security standards.

SoftEther VPN is a cross-platform, multiprotocol VPN client and VPN server software, VPN protocols such as SSL VPN, L2TP/IPsec, OpenVPN, and Microsoft Secure Socket Tunneling Protocol are provided in a single VPN server.

This VPN software supports NAT traversal, making it useful to run VPN servers on computers that are behind residential gateways, facility routers, and firewalls. Firewalls performing deep packet inspection are unable to detect SoftEther's VPN transport packets as a VPN tunnel because HTTPS is used to camouflage the connection.

Moreover, SoftEther VPN optimizes performance by using full Ethernet frame utilization, reducing memory copy operations, parallel transmission, and clustering. Together, these reduce latency normally associated with VPN connections while increasing throughput.

Subscribe to the industry-leading, multifunctional VPN Server.

plans.description:
Debian 10 with SoftEther VPN Server - Free VPN

Perfectly optimized by Virtual Pulse, this SoftEther VPN Server provides you with cost-effectiveness, scalability, and flexibility of VPN Services in Azure Marketplace. This Image is always up-to-date and constantly monitoring for vulnerabilities in order to meet all industry-leading security standards.

SoftEther VPN is a cross-platform, multiprotocol VPN client and VPN server software, VPN protocols such as SSL VPN, L2TP/IPsec, OpenVPN, and Microsoft Secure Socket Tunneling Protocol are provided in a single VPN server.

This VPN software supports NAT traversal, making it useful to run VPN servers on computers that are behind residential gateways, facility routers, and firewalls. Firewalls performing deep packet inspection are unable to detect SoftEther's VPN transport packets as a VPN tunnel because HTTPS is used to camouflage the connection.

Moreover, SoftEther VPN optimizes performance by using full Ethernet frame utilization, reducing memory copy operations, parallel transmission, and clustering. Together, these reduce latency normally associated with VPN connections while increasing throughput.

Subscribe to the industry-leading, multifunctional VPN Server.

items.displayName: Debian 10 with ownCloud File Share Server
items.longSummary: ownCloud is a software-only product. It does not offer off-premises storage capacity. This is in contrast to the likes of Dropbox, which offers both software and off-premises storage capacity. ownCloud's storage capacity has to be provided on user-owned devices.
items.summary: Ready-to-run and pre-configured Collaboration Server
items.description:
Debian 10 with ownCloud File Share Server

Virtual Pulse presents ready-to-run and quick deployment file sync, share and content collaboration software that lets teams work on data easily from anywhere, on any device.

ownCloud enables you to share and sync data and keep it safe at the same time, on all platforms. It controls and monitors access and enables collaboration across devices, teams and continents alike. Without risking data loss, theft, or infringement on privacy regulation.

Be confident your data storage and maintenance comply with regulations. Increase security through measures like multifactor authentication, encryption and file lifecycle management.

Give staff an easy, flexible and secure way to share files and folders. Safely involve contacts outside your organization with select documents. Share public links shielded by passwords and expiration dates.

Work simultaneously on documents, create presentations together in real-time, annotate files, and much more, thereby saving time on coordination and feedback processes.

There are other content collaboration platforms out there, but none of them strike the balance between enhanced productivity and hardened security as well as ownCloud does.

items.publisherDisplayName: Automatizaciones Industriales y de Oficina de Tlaxcala, S.A. de C.V.
items.summary: ATX Lambda es un ágil y novedoso esquema para implementar el ERP Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central en tiempo record. Le encantara!
items.description: Metodología de implementación rápida , ágil y moderna basada en 3 aspectos : Una base de datos preconfigurada y lista para operar. Adopción del sistema basada 100% en el estándar . Trabajos remotos al ritmo del cliente. La metodología se basa en 11 hitos que se van ejecutando a través de la asesoría de un experto en Dynamics 365 BC y las mejores practicas de negocio ofrecidas por el estándar del ERP. Una vez terminado un hito , se paga y se acuerda la duración y fecha de inicio del próximo. Es posible aumentar o disminuir la duración propuesta para cada hito. Incluye la localización financiera como factura electronica para varios países de América incluyendo Mexico y Chile

items.displayName: Enterprise Data Security with RMS: 2-week Imp
items.summary: Cloud 9 Infosystems Inc. has a goal to ensure that our clients can always keep their most valued enterprise data confidential, secure and private.
items.description:
Organizations no longer operate within their own perimeter as data is traveling between users, devices, apps, and services more than ever before and protecting your perimeter, users, or devices does not guarantee the protection of your data as it travels outside of corporate boundaries.

Our proprietary integration of Office 365 + Azure AD + RMS + Log analytics will provide 24/7 protection for your data using an AES 256 Bit Encryption throughout the life-cycle of the data. This will allow you to send and receive confidential data only to people authorized to view it. The user process is easy and the data is secured by just selecting the labels based on the file sensitivity. This process can be also automated by configuring certain keywords which will automatically label the desired file based on these keywords.

Features:

  • RMS provides one-click functionality to classify data they’re working on.

  • Protect data at the time of creation or modification based on the source.

  • Once data is labeled, additional protection can be applied based on the requirement.

  • Data protection controls are integrated into Microsoft Office and other common applications.

  • Block Copying / Pasting / Screenshots and Printing.

  • Share data safely with users within your organization as well as with your clients and partners.

  • Users can define who can access data and what they can do with it based on the use of rights policy.

  • Users can track all activities on shared data and revoke access if necessary.

  • Analyse data flows to gain insight into your business.

  • Detect risky behaviors and take corrective measures.

  • Track access to documents & prevent data leakage or misuse.

  • IT can use powerful logging and reporting to monitor, analyze, and report on the shared data.

  • Meet your compliance and regulatory requirements, including FIPS 140-2, HSMs, ISO/IEC 27001:2013, SOC, HIPAA BAA, EU Model Clause, PCI DSS, and more. 

Let’s get your data secured!

items.longSummary: Use Event Domains to manage the flow of custom events to your various business orgs, customers, or applications.
items.summary: Manage Event Grid topics with a unified authentication model.
items.description:
Use Event Domains to manage the flow of custom events to your various business orgs, customers, or applications. Event Domains take the underlying architecture Azure services like Storage and IoT Hub use to publish their events and makes it available for you to use. Partition your tenants with thousands of topics in one place and a managed auth model.

Use Event Domains to:

  • Manage multitenant eventing architectures at scale.
  • Manage your authorization and authentication.
  • Partition your topics without managing each individually.
  • Avoid individually publishing to each of your topic endpoints.

items.longSummary: Use Event Grid partner configurations to control the behavior of some aspects of the Partner Events feature.
items.summary: Manage Event Grid partner configurations.
items.description: Settings in this resource control the behavior of some aspects of the Partner Events feature. For example, you can allow a parter to create partner topics or partner destinations in your Azure subscripton by adding your authorization to a partner configuration resource.

plans.summary: Manage Event Grid partner configurations.
plans.description: Settings in this resource control the behavior of some aspects of the Partner Events feature. For example, you can allow a parter to create partner topics or partner destinations in your Azure subscripton by adding your authorization to a partner configuration resource.

items.longSummary: Use Event System Topic to receive events from Azure services to your applications.
items.summary: Manage Event Grid system topics.
items.description: Use Event System Topic to manage events from Azure services like Storage, IoT and other supported Azure event sources. System topic resource is associated with an existing azure resource which allows customer to subscribe events emitted by that resource.

plans.summary: Manage Event Grid system topics.
plans.description: Use Event System Topic to manage events from Azure services like Storage, IoT and other supported Azure event sources. System topic resource is associated with an existing azure resource which allows customer to subscribe events emitted by that resource.

items.longSummary: Send custom user defined events from your application with Azure Event Grid.
items.summary: Send custom events with Azure Event Grid
items.description:
Send custom events anywhere by using application topics to connect to Azure Event Grid. Application topics provide a SAS authenticated DNS entry point for custom events allowing you to leverage Azure Event Grid's deep integration with other services. You can subscribe to events in your Application Topic just as you would any native Azure resource.

Use Application Topics to:

  • Send custom events to Azure Event Grid.
  • Leverage Azure Event Grid to route and filter custom events.
  • Subscribe to events in your application topic - private to you.
  • Reliably delivery custom events to Azure or 3rd party services.

items.displayName: Gogs - Git Service on Ubuntu 20.04 LTS
items.longSummary: Deploy a powerful Git repository to arrange a productive working environment with our Gogs - Git Service on Ubuntu 20.04 LTS
items.summary: Flawless open-source Git solution
items.description:
Gogs - Git Service on Ubuntu 20.04 LTS

Gogs is a great choice for organizations that need a simple, easy-to-use Git service for their development teams. It runs smoothly even on low-end hardware or virtual private servers, ensuring a fast and responsive user experience. It is also a good choice for those who want to self-host their own Git service, as it is open source and can be easily deployed on any platform.

Gogs has a modern, user-friendly interface. It's easy to get started, and you can find all the features you need in one place. Gogs makes it easy to manage your repositories. You can create new ones, clone existing ones, and manage access control. You can also use Gogs to collaborate with other users.

Gogs also has an integrated issue tracker. You can use it to track bugs and feature requests, and it's easy to set up notifications for when things get resolved. Gogs has a robust security system. It supports two-factor authentication, and you can set up access control for your repositories.

Gogs also offers great performance. It's optimized for speed, and you can run it on low-powered hardware. It also supports multiple databases, so you can scale up as needed. Gogs is also highly extensible. You can write plugins and themes to extend the functionality, and you can use the API to integrate with other services.

Gogs supports webhooks, enabling users to integrate external services and trigger events based on repository actions. This allows for seamless integration with popular CI/CD tools, issue trackers, and other third-party services.

Don’t postpone to start using Gogs - Git Service on Ubuntu 20.04 LTS, host your repositories on the web without extra effort.

Disclaimer: The respective trademarks mentioned in the offering are owned by the respective companies. We do not provide a commercial license for any of these products. Gogs is a complete and separate project from Tidal Media Inc.

items.displayName: Health Monitoring and Risk Management: 6-Week PoC
items.summary: Customer health monitoring and health risk management platform for healthcare and medical insurance: 6-week proof of concept
items.description:
Having delivered complex AI projects in healthcare and medical insurance, WaveAccess offers developing a proof of concept for a custom-made health monitoring and health risk management solution that is hosted in Azure Cloud, making it easily scalable and requiring no physical infrastructure. It processes data using machine learning and provides up-to-date prediction of health issues in your patients.

If you would like the leverage data that your healthcare or medical insurance business has accumulated about your patients, we can make an Azure-based proof of concept on the data provided.

Value of health risk monitoring:

  • Peak cost prediction helps minimize potential losses
  • Using depersonalized data for security
  • Quick setup and intuitive UI
  • Quick client additions: to enable predictions, an EHR with monthly records is used
  • Expert data processing and external database integration due to Azure Cloud hosting.

Service Provided:

During our 6-week PoC, we will build an Azure Cloud-based prototype to prove whether a specific business challenge of your insurance or healthcare business can be solved using the accumulated patient data. We expect you to define one challenge and provide data. For example, you might want to optimize your patient treatment costs - let's check how Azure can help your data be instrumental with that!

Deliverables:

As a result, you will see how Microsoft Azure can be used for data storage and processing, whether your data is relevant for solving the problem, and get relevant business insights. If PoC proves efficient, we can proceed with a full-scale Azure-based project.

items.longSummary: MariaDB is a community-developed relational database management system (RDBMS). It was designed as a drop-in replacement of MySQL(R) with more features, new storage engines, fewer bugs, and better performance.
items.summary: Database Solution for Transactions and Analytics at any Scale
items.description:
Linux 7.9 with MariaDB 10.5

Virtual presents with secure, up-to-date, and quick deployment MariaDB Image that ensures seamless performance in your Azure Cloud Environments. The solution has been packed with the best industry practices and meets all enterprise standards.

MariaDB takes a fundamentally different database approach to fit today’s modern world. Its pluggable, purpose-built storage engines support workloads that previously required a variety of specialized databases.

MariaDB sets the standard for relational databases, with Oracle Database compatibility (e.g., sequences and PL/SQL), temporal tables, transparent sharding, instant schema changes, point-in-time rollback, and modern SQL (i.e., common table expressions, window functions, JSON functions and more). It now includes ColumnStore for real-time analytics at scale.

Deployed in minutes for transactional, analytical, or hybrid use cases, MariaDB delivers unmatched operational agility without sacrificing key enterprise features, including real ACID compliance and full SQL.

Organizations can now depend on a single complete database for all their needs, whether on commodity hardware or their cloud of choice.

Disclaimer:Virtual Pulse does not offer commercial licenses for the products mentioned above. MariaDB is a registered trademark of respective companies. No warranty of any kind, express or implied, is included with this software.

items.displayName: Linux 7.9 with SoftEther VPN Server - Free VPN
items.longSummary: SoftEther VPN Server is a cross-platform, multi-protocol VPN client and VPN server software developed. VPN protocols such as SSL VPN, L2TP/IPsec, OpenVPN, and Microsoft Secure Socket Tunneling Protocol are provided in a single VPN server.
items.summary: Excellent solution for creating a stable and secure VPN server
items.description:
Linux 7.9 with SoftEther VPN Server - Free VPN

SoftEther VPN is a VPN software that offers both a secure VPN protocol and a versatile VPN server. The Server is pretty popular due to the strong encryption, reliability, and performance improvement it provides.

The main feature of SoftEther VPN architecture is the virtualization of Ethernet devices. It is the key to everything. SoftEther VPN virtualizes Ethernet devices in order to create a flexible virtual private network for both remote-access VPN and site-to-site VPN. SoftEther VPN implements the Virtual Network Adapter program as a software-emulated traditional Ethernet network adapter.

Geographically distributed branches couldn’t be united in a network by default. With SoftEther VPN, you could lay virtual Ethernet cables between all your branches. Then all computers of all branches will be connected in a single LAN.

SoftEther VPN features:

  • HTTPS protocol using allows establishing highly secure VPN tunnels
  • L2TP over IPsec protocol support allows connecting to the server without client software installation
  • Clone function of OpenVPN provides easy configuration as well as all common VPN functions and operating systems support if you’d like to replace or integrate the OpenVPN server with SoftEther VPN Server
  • Clone function of Microsoft SSTP VPN Server allows using the built-in SSTP VPN client on Windows for connecting devices to SoftEther VPN Server
  • Built-in Dynamic DNS (DDNS) function registers your VPN Server's IP address on the DNS record of ".softether.net" for free
  • With built-in NAT Traversal, no special settings on NAT/firewall are necessary anymore

Linux 7.9 with SoftEther VPN Server - Free VPN provided by Virtual Pulse if fully ready to deploy and run in Azure environments. Ensure your privacy and your network usability!

Disclaimer:Virtual Pulse does not offer commercial licenses of the products mentioned above. SoftEther is a registered trademark of respective companies. No warranty of any kind, express or implied, is included with this software.

items.longSummary: L2TP/IPSec provides completely secure access to your home network from a smartphone, tablet, or computer with minimal configuration: Android, iOS, and Windows have a convenient built-in client for this type of VPN.
items.summary: IPsec/L2TP VPN Server provides confidentiality and security on the consumer product level!
items.description:
Linux 8.3 with IPsec/L2TP VPN Server

Because of the lack of confidentiality inherent in the L2TP protocol, it is often implemented along with IPsec.

What might be confusing for you about L2TP/IPsec is the use of the terms “tunnel” and “secure channel”. The term “tunnel-mode” refers to a channel that allows untouched packets of one network to be transported over another network. In the case of L2TP/PPP, it allows L2TP/PPP packets to be transported over IP. A secure channel refers to a connection within which the confidentiality of all data is guaranteed. In L2TP/IPsec, first IPsec provides a secure channel, then L2TP provides a tunnel. IPsec also specifies a tunneling protocol: this is not used when an L2TP tunnel is used.

What you need to know:

  • IPsec is a secure network protocol suite that authenticates and encrypts the packets of data to provide secure encrypted communication between two computers over an Internet Protocol network.
  • (L2TP) is a tunneling protocol used to support virtual private networks (VPNs) or as part of the delivery of services by ISPs. It uses encryption ('hiding') only for its own control messages (using an optional pre-shared secret), and does not provide any encryption or confidentiality of content by itself. Rather, it provides a tunnel for Layer 2 (which may be encrypted), and the tunnel itself may be passed over a Layer 3 encryption protocol such as IPsec.

By combining the confidentiality and authentication services of IPsec (Internet Protocol security), the network tunneling of the Layer 2 Tunnel Protocol (L2TP) administrators can define VPN networks across multiple, heterogeneous systems. This allows setting up a VPN across Android, Windows, Linux, macOS and other operating systems with no limitations.

Virtual Pulse is happy to provide you with this fully pre-configured image of Linux 8.3 with IPsec/L2TP VPN Server, carefully cloud-hardened for a great performance in Azure environments.

Disclaimer:Virtual Pulse does not offer commercial licenses of the products mentioned above. L2TP/IPSec is a registered trademark of respective companies. No warranty of any kind, express or implied, is included with this software.

items.longSummary: MariaDB 10.5 was built with a security-first architecture. In this database users’ data is kept protected at every level.
items.summary: MariaDB 10.5 is the commercially-supported relational database
items.description:
Linux 8.3 with MariaDB 10.5

MariaDB turns data into structured information in a wide array of applications, ranging from banking to websites. Originally designed as an enhanced, drop-in replacement for MySQL, MariaDB is used because it is fast, scalable, and robust, with a rich ecosystem of storage engines, plugins, and many other tools. These tools make it very versatile for a wide variety of use cases.

Some of MariaDB features:

  • MariaDB is using one of the most popular query languages
  • MariaDB supports a wide variety of programming languages
  • MariaDB provides lots of new commands and operations unavailable in MySQL

It is built upon the values of performance, stability, and openness, and MariaDB Foundation ensures contributions will be accepted on technical merit. Recent new functionality includes advanced clustering with Galera Cluster 4, compatibility features with Oracle Database, and Temporal Data Tables, allowing one to query the data as it stood at any point in the past.

To support a comprehensive disaster recovery strategy, the MariaDB Platform provides a complete set of tools and capabilities for rapid recovery without data loss – everything from full, incremental, and partial backup/restore to point-in-time rollback (i.e., flashback).

Virtual Pulse is glad to provide you with a fully pre-configured Linux 8.3 with MariaDB 10.5 Image, cloud-hardened to be fully ready to run in Azure environments. Make a few clicks and deploy the world's most popular database with us!

Disclaimer:Virtual Pulse does not offer commercial licenses for the products mentioned above. MariaDB is a registered trademark of respective companies. No warranty of any kind, express or implied, is included with this software.

items.summary: Powered by Dynamics 365 and ClickDimensions, this offer is perfect for small businesses looking to go live quickly with a full-featured marketing automation solution.
items.description:
enCloud9 Marketing Accelerator is a focused implementation of Dynamics 365 Marketing and ClickDimensions Marketing Automation. In as short as seven days, our certified consultants will configure ClickDimensions in your Dynamics 365 environment and work with your marketing team to deliver an email campaign to your leads and customers.

Our Marketing Accelerator package is designed to provide businesses with a simple user experience and to speed up adoption. As your business grows and your needs change, Marketing Accelerator adapts to these changes.

Deliverables

  • An easy to use marketing automation solution
  • Assistance with your first integrated marketing campaign
  • Optimized Dynamics 365 Dashboards, views, and forms for campaign performance monitoring
  • Live training as well as access to training videos

Note

  • Additional Monthly Support Plan Available for purchase

items.longSummary: Microsoft HPC Pack
items.summary: Microsoft HPC Pack
items.description: These HPC Pack images are for deploying an HPC Pack cluster on Windows Server 2012 R2 Datacenter operating system, Windows Server 2016 Datacenter operating system or Windows Server 2019 Datacenter operating system. For more information see Microsoft HPC Pack 2016.

plans.displayName: HPC Pack 2012 R2 on Windows Server 2012 R2
plans.summary: Enterprise-class High Performance Computing solution that is simple to deploy, cost-effective, application-focused, and user-centric.
plans.description: This image contains the Windows Server 2012 R2 Datacenter operating system with HPC Pack 2012 R2 Update 3 installed to create the head node of an HPC Pack cluster. Microsoft SQL Server 2014 Express is also pre-installed. Use this image to create the head node of a Windows high performance computing (HPC) virtual machine (VM) cluster in Azure. We recommend using a VM size with at least 8 vCPUs. If you plan to add cluster compute nodes to the head node, the VM must be created in an Azure virtual network. Configure the network before creating the VM. To use the head node, you will need to join the virtual machine to an Active Directory domain and run the post-configuration script described here. It is strongly recommended to use the Azure Resource Manager (ARM) templates or the HPC Pack IaaS deployment script to automatically create an HPC cluster in Azure with the HPC Pack images. For more information see here.

plans.description: This image contains the Windows Server 2016 Datacenter operating system with HPC Pack 2016 Update 3 setup package to create the head node of an HPC Pack 2016 cluster in Azure. Microsoft SQL Server 2016 Express is also pre-installed. We recommend using a VM size with at least 8 vCPUs. If you plan to add cluster compute nodes to the head node, the VM must be created in an Azure virtual network. Configure the network before creating the VM. It is strongly recommended to use the Azure Resource Manager (ARM) templates to automatically create an HPC Pack 2016 cluster in Azure with the HPC Pack 2016 images. For more information see here.

items.longSummary: Keep your data highly organized without extra effort using our MongoDB Server on Ubuntu 22.04
items.summary: Easy-to-use open-source NoSQL database
items.description:
MongoDB Server on Ubuntu 22.04

MongoDB stands out as a powerful and secure database solution, making it an excellent choice for a variety of applications. It is highly scalable, reliable, and easy to use, and offers a number of security features to ensure that data is protected.

MongoDB offers many advantages over traditional relational databases, including scalability, flexibility, and performance. MongoDB uses collections to store a huge amount of data. The next element in the collection are documents that fulfill the similar function of a row in a table in the relational database system.

Moreover, MongoDB is highly flexible, allowing developers to easily store and query data in a variety of ways. This flexibility makes it an ideal choice for diverse applications, spanning from web applications to mobile apps. MongoDB offers authentication and authorization controls, as well as encryption for data at rest and in transit.

Install our MongoDB Server on Ubuntu 22.04, and unlock the potential for effective data management, boosting your team’s productivity. Don't miss out on this chance to revolutionize your data management.

Why applications by Art Group?

Our images are preconfigured and ready to run, they are always up-to-date, reliable, and secure.

Art Group packages images according to industry standards. We monitor the libraries and components for application updates and vulnerabilities tirelessly. When any update or security threat is identified we fix and repackage the VM and push the latest versions to the marketplace.

Disclaimer: The respective trademarks mentioned in the offering are owned by the respective companies. Art Group does not offer commercial licenses for any of the products mentioned above. Many of the products have a free, demo or Open Source license as applicable.

items.summary: Pythian can help you migrate from Oracle to the best technologies suited for your needs, including Azure SQL Database, Azure SQL Data Warehouse, and SQL Server (cloud and on-premise.)
items.description:
Migrating from Oracle to Azure can provide many benefits—from lower costs, to improved performance, and the ability to integrate new technologies that drive automation and innovation.

A successful Oracle migration with no disruption requires an end-to-end approach, with a team of both Oracle and Microsoft experts - Pythian’s 24/7 global team of managed services professionals have decades of experience in these environments. We leverage our expertise to help you maximize your migration throughput and mitigate risks while providing the most fitting solution for your business.

In a week-long discovery, we will review your Oracle implementation and plan, create, and present our assessment of the work to move your workloads from Oracle to Azure/Microsoft SQL Server through the following steps:

  1. Analysis: Pythian’s seasoned Oracle DBAs use a proprietary approach to analyzing your existing Oracle database to determine the level of technical difficulty of the migration. Their analysis includes a thorough review of components and features being used, database objects, database resident code, dependencies on external objects, relative data volumes, etc.

  2. Roadmap Creation: The database migration path is then formally captured in a Database Migration Roadmap document which details the work effort including the high-level migration strategy, future state architecture, required players, areas of complexity, risk, estimated migration timelines, and required database outages.

  3. Recommendations: Pythian presents the findings through a collaborative and interactive walkthrough of the Database Migration Roadmap, readying your organization for an immediate next step.

Post-Assessment

Post discovery, we can support you through next steps, including formalizing a project plan, implementing a Proof of Concept using your actual data, planning and implementing a dry run, and performing the final migration, and provide ongoing managed services, if needed.

items.displayName: SFTP OpenSSH - FTP Server on Debian 11
items.longSummary: Establish the protected tunnel for data transferring with the help of our SFTP OpenSSH - FTP Server on Debian 11
items.summary: Helpful utility for safe data transferring
items.description:
SFTP OpenSSH - FTP Server on Debian 11

SFTP OpenSSH - FTP is a great way to keep your data secure. All data transferred using SFTP is encrypted, making it difficult for hackers and other malicious actors to access your data. Take control of your data's security by implementing access control lists to add an extra layer of protection.

Time is money, and SFTP helps you save both. With faster speeds compared to FTP and the ability to handle large files seamlessly, SFTP streamlines your data transfer process. Say goodbye to sluggish transfers and embrace the efficiency and security provided by SFTP's encryption protocols. Shield your data from potential threats lurking in the network.

SFTP is a good choice for businesses that need to transfer large amounts of data quickly and securely. It’s also a good choice for individuals who want to protect their data from prying eyes. So, using SFTP can help keep your data safe and secure. Try to use our well-prepared SFTP OpenSSH - FTP Server on Debian 11, and enjoy the easy and secure way to transfer data between computers.

Why applications by Art Group?

Our images are preconfigured and ready to run, they are always up-to-date, reliable, and secure.

Art Group packages images according to industry standards. We monitor the libraries and components for application updates and vulnerabilities tirelessly. When any update or security threat is identified we fix and repackage the VM and push the latest versions to the marketplace.

plans.displayName: Free License: SQL Server 2016 SP2 Developer on Windows Server 2016
plans.summary: Developer version of SQL Server 2016 SP2 for transactional, data warehousing, business intelligence, and analytics workloads.
plans.description: This image contains the Developer edition of SQL Server 2016. This free edition (no SQL Server licensing cost) includes all the functionality of Enterprise edition, but it is licensed for development and testing only, not production. It includes the database engine with support for In-Memory transactional processing and analytics, which improves the performance of heavy workloads up to 30x. This edition also includes Always On for +99.99% high availability. Always Encrypted and Row-Level Security for the highest data protection. R Services for integrated advanced analytics. Includes Management Studio for integrated administration and development, Reporting Services for web and mobile reports, Integration Services for moving and transforming data, Analysis Services for data mining, and Master Data Services for data modeling. We recommend that you use a virtual machine size of D8as-v4 or higher for development and functional testing. E16ds-v4 or higher for performance testing.

items.displayName: Ubuntu 18.04 LTS with IPsec/L2TP VPN Server
items.longSummary: The VPN Server is based on Libreswan VPN software. This is a software implementation of the most widely supported and standardized VPN protocol using "IPsec" and the Internet Key Exchange ("IKE")
items.summary: Provide yourself with a highly-encrypted and enterprise-grade VPN Server
items.description:
Ubuntu 18.04 LTS with IPsec/L2TP VPN Server

Specially pre-configured for Azure Marketplace by Virtual Pulse, this VPN Server ensures the best industry practices of VPN technologies and has been pre-tested for entire compatibility with Azure Marketplace.

The VPN Server is based on Libreswan VPN software. This is a software implementation of the most widely supported and standardized VPN protocol, using "IPsec" and the Internet Key Exchange ("IKE"). These standards are produced and maintained by the Internet Engineering Task Force ("IETF").

A VPN connection is made simply by exchanging very simple public keys – exactly like exchanging SSH keys – and all the rest is transparently handled by the VPN Server. There is no need to manage connections, be concerned about the state, manage daemons, or worry about what's under the hood. IPsec/L2TP VPN Server presents an extremely basic yet powerful interface.

A combination of extremely high-speed cryptographic primitives and means that secure networking can be very high-speed. It is suitable for both small embedded devices like smartphones and fully loaded backbone routers.

Virtual Pulse is glad to provide you with an Ubuntu 20.04 LTS with WireGuard VPN Tunnel, fully pre-configured and cloud hardened to greatly perform in Azure environments. Subscribe, deploy & enjoy!

Disclaimer:Virtual Pulse does not offer commercial licenses of the products mentioned above. Libreswan is a registered trademark of respective companies. No warranty of any kind, express or implied, is included with this software.

items.displayName: Ubuntu 18.04 with SoftEther VPN Server - Free VPN
items.longSummary: SoftEther VPN is the world's only VPN software that supports SSL-VPN, OpenVPN, L2TP, EtherIP, L2TPv3, and IPsec as a single VPN software
items.summary: SoftEther VPN is an optimum alternative to OpenVPN
items.description:
Ubuntu 18.04 with SoftEther VPN Server - Free VPN

SoftEther VPN is a cross-platform, multi-protocol VPN server software. VPN protocols such as SSL VPN, L2TP/IPsec, OpenVPN, and Microsoft Secure Socket Tunneling Protocol are provided in a single VPN server.

Firewalls performing deep packet inspection are unable to detect SoftEther's VPN transport packets as a VPN tunnel because HTTPS is used to camouflage the connection.

SoftEther VPN optimizes performance by using full Ethernet frame utilization, reducing memory copy operations, parallel transmission, and clustering. Together, these reduce latency normally associated with VPN connections while increasing throughput.

SoftEther VPN Server serves the SoftEther VPN protocol, but it also serves OpenVPN, Microsoft Secure Socket Tunneling Protocol (SSTP), SSL VPN, EtherIP, L2TPv3, and IPsec. It serves mobile devices running on iOS, Android, and Windows Phone via L2TP/IPsec.

SoftEther VPN Server implements the VPN server function. It listens to and accepts connections from VPN Client or VPN Bridge with several VPN protocols.

A VPN Server can have local bridges. A local bridge is the layer-2 packet-switching fabric between a physical Ethernet network adapter and a Virtual Hub. The administrator defines a local bridge between the Virtual Hub and the existing corporate network to build a remote-access VPN server or a site-to-site VPN server.

This Image provides you with the instantaneous deployment of the VPN Server and is fully production-ready. Subscribe to the enterprise-grade solution that has been packaged to ensure performance reliability and cloud scalability.

Disclaimer:Virtual Pulse does not offer commercial licenses of the products mentioned above. SoftEther VPN is a registered trademark of respective companies. No warranty of any kind, express or implied, is included with this software.

items.description:
Ubuntu 20.04 LTS with IPsec/L2TP VPN Server

Virtual Pulse presents you with a specially hardened and pre-configured IPsec/L2TP VPN Server that is based on Libreswan VPN Software.

This Image has been pre-tested for seamless performance in Azure Cloud Environments and provides you with the instantaneous deployment of a reliable and highly-protected VPN Server.

The current VPN Server is based on Libreswan VPN software. Libreswan is a software implementation of the most widely supported and standardized VPN protocol, using "IPsec" and the Internet Key Exchange ("IKE").

Set up your own IPsec VPN server in just a few minutes, with IPsec/L2TP, Cisco IPsec and IKEv2 on Ubuntu, Debian and CentOS. All you need to do is provide your own VPN credentials, and let the scripts handle the rest.

An IPsec VPN encrypts your network traffic so that nobody between you and the VPN server can eavesdrop on your data as it travels via the Internet. This is especially useful when using unsecured networks, e.g. at coffee shops, airports or hotel rooms.

Subscribe to the Ubuntu 20.04 LTS with IPsec/L2TP VPN Server to provide secure access to your private business network, in the Azure Cloud or on-premise.

items.longSummary: Ubuntu 20.04 LTS with MariaDB 10.5 provides you with the versatility to handle transactional, analytical, and hybrid workloads, and the scalability to grow.
items.summary: MariaDB provides your enterprise with reliability and drives collaborative innovation.
items.description:
Ubuntu 20.04 LTS with MariaDB 10.5

MariaDB turns data into structured information in a wide array of applications, ranging from banking to websites. Originally designed as an enhanced, drop-in replacement for MySQL, MariaDB is used because it is fast, scalable, and robust. Being provided with a rich ecosystem of storage engines, plugins, and many other tools make it very versatile for a wide variety of use cases.

It is built upon the values of performance, stability, and openness, and MariaDB Foundation ensures contributions will be accepted on technical merit. Recent new functionality includes advanced clustering with Galera Cluster 4, compatibility features with Oracle Database, and Temporal Data Tables, allowing one to query the data as it stood at any point in the past.

To support a comprehensive disaster recovery strategy, the MariaDB Platform provides a complete set of tools and capabilities for rapid recovery without data loss – everything from full, incremental, and partial backup/restore to point-in-time rollback (i.e., flashback).

Virtual Pulse is happy to provide you with an Ubuntu 20.04 LTS with MariaDB 10.5 Image, fully pre-configured and ready to be deployed in Azure environments just in a few clicks! Deploy & Enjoy!

Disclaimer:Virtual Pulse does not offer commercial licenses for the products mentioned above. MariaDB is a registered trademark of respective companies. No warranty of any kind, express or implied, is included with this software.

items.longSummary: ownCloud is file sync, share, and content collaboration software that enables teams to work on data easily from anywhere, on any device.
items.summary: ownCloud is a suite of client-server software for creating and using file hosting services.
items.description:
ownCloud Ubuntu Server 20.04 LTS

ownCloud is secure enterprise file sharing. It is as easy to use as a consumer product but is hosted on Azure Cloud. It offers unsurpassed transparency, security, and control and can be flexibly integrated into almost any existing environment.

Functionally, ownCloud is similar to the popular Dropbox software. The main difference between the functionalities of ownCloud and Dropbox is that ownCloud does not offer data center capacity to host stored files.

ownCloud provides abilities to:

  • Fully control your data placement at any time
  • Regulate access to your data
  • Increase data productivity

The software supports extensions that allow it to work like Google Drive, with online document editing, calendar and contact synchronization, and more.

Its openness avoids enforced quotas on storage space or the number of connected clients, instead having hard limits (like on storage space or number of users) defined only by the physical capabilities of the server.

Virtual Pulse is glad to provide you with Ubuntu 20.04 LTS with ownCloud File Share Server, fully pre-configured and cloud-hardened to be ready-to-run in Azure environments. Share your files safely and easily with us!

plans.displayName: Ubuntu 20.04 with ownCloud File Share Server
plans.summary: ownCloud is a suite of client-server software for creating and using file hosting services
plans.description:
ownCloud Ubuntu Server 20.04 LTS

ownCloud is secure enterprise file sharing. It is as easy to use as a consumer product but is hosted on Azure Cloud. It offers unsurpassed transparency, security, and control and can be flexibly integrated into almost any existing environment.

Functionally, ownCloud is similar to the popular Dropbox software. The main difference between the functionalities of ownCloud and Dropbox is that ownCloud does not offer data center capacity to host stored files.

ownCloud provides abilities to:

  • Fully control your data placement at any time
  • Regulate access to your data
  • Increase data productivity

The software supports extensions that allow it to work like Google Drive, with online document editing, calendar and contact synchronization, and more.

Its openness avoids enforced quotas on storage space or the number of connected clients, instead having hard limits (like on storage space or number of users) defined only by the physical capabilities of the server.

Virtual Pulse is glad to provide you with Ubuntu 20.04 LTS with ownCloud File Share Server, fully pre-configured and cloud-hardened to be ready-to-run in Azure environments. Share your files safely and easily with us!

Disclaimer:Virtual Pulse does not offer commercial licenses of the products mentioned above. ownCloud is a registered trademark of respective companies. No warranty of any kind, express or implied, is included with this software.

items.displayName: Ubuntu 20.04 with SoftEther VPN Server - Free VPN
items.longSummary: SoftEther VPN Server offers both a secure VPN protocol and a versatile VPN server. The Server is pretty popular since it offers strong encryption while also providing fast speed, it’s cross-platform compatible as well.
items.summary: Perfectly optimized VPN Server that has been packaged to meet industry-leading standards
items.description:
Ubuntu 20.04 with SoftEther VPN Server - Free VPN

Virtual Pulse presents a super flexible and scalable VPN Server that has been packaged to ensure quick and painless deployment into your Azure Cloud Environments. The Image is always up-to-date, constantly maintaining and scanning for vulnerabilities.

SoftEther VPN Server is an optimum alternative to OpenVPN and Microsoft's VPN servers. It has a clone function of OpenVPN Server and you can integrate from OpenVPN to SoftEther VPN smoothly.

SoftEther VPN Server provides you with the following benefits:

SoftEther VPN is an essential infrastructure to build up IT systems for enterprises and small businesses.

  • Ad-hoc VPN
  • Remote Access to LAN
  • LAN to LAN Bridge

SoftEther VPN can build up flexible and dependable virtual networks around Clouds.

  • Join a Local PC into Cloud
  • Join a Cloud VM into LAN
  • Cloud to LAN Bridge VPN
  • Cloud to Cloud Bridge VPN

SoftEther VPN supports several mobile devices including iPhone and Android. Your smartphone is now a part of your on-premise or Cloud network by using SoftEther VPN.

  • iPhone and Android
  • Windows and Mac Laptops

SoftEther VPN is also an ultra-convenient tool for effective system management by IT professionals in enterprises and system integrators.

  • Remote Management
  • VPN for Network Testing, Simulation and Debugging
  • Building Your Own Cloud

SoftEther VPN is also convenient for home users. You can be proud of using enterprise-class VPN for your home use.

  • Remote Access
  • Comfortable Network Anywhere

SoftEther VPN has a strong function to penetrate troublesome corporate firewalls.

  • Dynamic DNS and NAT Traversa
  • VPN Azure

Deploy one of the most powerful and easiest VPN software in the world that can guarantee easy to establish both remote-access and site-to-site VPN.

Disclaimer:Virtual Pulse does not offer commercial licenses of the products mentioned above. SoftEther is a registered trademark of respective companies. No warranty of any kind, express or implied, is included with this software.

items.displayName: VisionBot AI based Document Capture 2-Week POC
items.summary: Free 2-week POC with our AI based Document Capture solution VisionBot.
items.description:
We would like to bring our deep expertise in Azure AI technologies such to offer you a limited scope free POC within 2 weeks, on printed documents of your choice for real-time extraction using Azure Cogntive Services.

POC Service Deliverables are:

  1. A backend REST API service that will read one document of your choice passed to it, and extract key fields and values.
  2. A Web UI to test the POC results for your document, that will allow you to upload a document scan and see real-time extraction results on the UI. Documents can be uploaded in JPEG, PNG, PDF, TIFF, BMP formats
  3. A Web UI that also allows you to upload standard ID documents pre-configured such as Passport, Driving License, etc - and see extraction results in real time. Documents can be uploaded in JPEG, PNG, PDF, TIFF, BMP formats
  4. The UI will allow you to download the results in these formats: JSON, CSV, PDF

items.longSummary: Always be able to check the indicators of network performance with the help of our iPerf3 Server on Debian 10
items.summary: Efficient and handy network performance measurement solution
items.description:
iPerf3 Server on Debian 10

iPerf3 is a powerful tool for measuring network bandwidth over protocols such as TCP, UDP, and SCTP. It offers a simple way to figure out important information about your network performance.

iPerf3 tests the bandwidth between any two networked computers to determine if the available bandwidth is large enough to support the transmission of an application. IPerf3 is built on a client-server principle and measures maximum User Datagram Protocol, TCP, and Stream Control Transmission Protocol throughput. It can also be used to measure LAN and wireless LAN throughput.

Testing network throughput with iPerf3 can be the first step in determining network speed and functionality. Because it’s an open-source command-line tool and produces standardized performance measurements no matter the network, iPerf has become a popular, accessible tool.

So, don’t postpone and start using our iPerf3 Server on Debian 10, and get a great facilitation tool for your network.

Why applications by Art Group?

Our images are preconfigured and ready to run, they are always up-to-date, reliable, and secure.

Art Group packages images according to industry standards. We monitor the libraries and components for application updates and vulnerabilities tirelessly. When any update or security threat is identified we fix and repackage the VM and push the latest versions to the marketplace.

Disclaimer: The respective trademarks mentioned in the offering are owned by the respective companies. Art Group does not offer commercial licenses for the products mentioned above. Many of the products have a free, demo, or Open Source license as applicable.

items.summary: Realizar uma avaliação da maturidade de segurança do ambiente de nuvem focado em Identidade, Endpoint e Dados.
items.description:
Na avaliação de segurança do ambiente Microsoft 365 faremos uma análise da segurança dos produtos e serviços disponíveis na licença adquirida pelo cliente e identificar serviços que estão desativados com objetivo de potencializar ao máximo o uso das ferramentas e entregar valor rapidamente.

Nesta avaliação vamos validar se as configurações do ambiente estão de acordo com as melhores práticas, baseado nos frameworks de mercado, do próprio fabricante e pela experiência adquirida pelo serviço de consultoria.

Analisaremos o Secure Score do ambiente e vamos indicar as recomendações mais importantes a serem implementadas a partir do impacto e ganho de segurança para o ambiente. Na lista de itens verificados temos; Políticas de AntiSpam, Malware, Phishing, Links e anexos seguros, Filtro de conexão, SafeList. Análise das políticas de Acesso Condicional do AAD. Análise do Identity Protection. Análise do portal de compliance referente a regras de DLP, Proteção de Informações, Riscos Internos, Assessment de LGPD (requisito licença Microsoft 365 E5). Baseline de segurança para endpoint a partir do MEM (Intune) Entre outros...

Os entregáveis do assessment são um relatório detalhado contendo as recomendações a serem implementadas, um relatório executivo e um workshop de apresentação do assessment.

Agenda

  1. Análise dos serviços - 7 dias
  2. Elaboração do relatório técnico - 2 dias
  3. Workshop para apresentação do relatório técnico - 2h

items.summary: Complete assessment op een bestaande Azure omgeving, met focus op kostenbesparing, security en governance
items.description: "This application is available only in [Dutch]" Het huidige Azure landschap is dynamisch en continu in beweging. Technieken worden continu vernieuwd, verbeterd en vereenvoudigd. Door de flexibiliteit bij het implementeren van nieuwe resources kan er in snel tempo ontwikkeld worden. De schaduwzijde van deze mogelijkheden is dat verouderde resources snel hun plek in een omgeving vinden, waardoor technical dept, security risico’s en lagere efficiëntie op de loer liggen. Tel hierbij op dat Azure zeer toegankelijk is in zijn inrichting, maar daardoor niet altijd volgens best practises is ingericht. Nu kan je je afvragen of je Azure omgeving wel optimaal draait op het gebied van kosten, security en governance. Met de Azure Assessment werpt OGD een kritische blik op uw bestaande omgeving. Hiermee geven we een second opinion op hoe uw omgeving functioneert op het gebied van kosten, security, performance en governance. Door onze ervaring met Azure kunnen we de belangrijkste actiepunten voor u onderscheiden en deze uiteenzetten in een roadmap. Wij geven u antwoord op de vraag of uw omgeving optimaal is ingericht en waar u kunt verbeteren.

items.summary: Onze unieke transitie methodiek helpt jouw organisatie om in 10-dagen te kunnen migreren naar Azure
items.description:
“This offer is only available in [Dutch] language.”

Met onze transitiemethodiek is het mogelijk om binnen 10-dagen jouw infrastructuur naar Azure te migreren.

** Wij helpen jouw organisatie bij de funding aanvraag **

Wij hanteren een unieke aanpak die zich onderscheidt door de eenvoud, maar zeer effectief is en te gebruiken in iedere situatie. Wij kijken samen naar het heden en de stip op de horizon en bedenken de juiste route om daar te komen. Daarna gaan we aan de slag met het bouwen, ondersteunen en beheren zodat jouw organisatie uiteindelijk tevreden kan gaan werken, met het juiste IT-fundament ter ondersteuning.

We zijn niet bang om kritische vragen te stellen of terug te gaan naar de tekentafel om er zeker van te zijn dat de oplossing echt bij jou past.

Wat wordt er opgeleverd binnen de IT-Value Azure in 10-dagen aanbieding?

  • Het aanvragen van subsidie bij Microsoft om een groot gedeelte van de IT-Value Transitie vergoed te krijgen;
  • Het inzichtelijk maken van Azure-kosten;
  • Het configureren van Azure netwerk-componenten;
  • Het koppelen van je eigen domeinnaam;
  • Het inrichten van Azure Active Directory;
  • Het inrichten van Azure MFA voor Global Admins;
  • Het inrichten van conditie gebaseerde toegang;
  • Het toepassen van basis Governance op Azure componenten;
  • Het toepassen van basis Compliance op Azure componenten;
  • Een uitgebreide overdracht naar de interne beheerorganisatie door mondeling uitleg over het beheren van de Azure tenant en Azure Active directory;
  • Het bepalen en samen uitstippelen van de vervolgstappen.

items.summary: Get started with Azure Sentinel with our Proof-of-Concept (POC) Offering and gain a definite understanding on the features and capabilities of the Microsoft’s next generation SIEM and SOAR solution.
items.description:
Many organizations face challenges in maintaining their security and threat analysis process thereby protecting systems, data and users is always a challenging part in real world. Microsoft Sentinel delivers intelligent security analytics and threat intelligence across the enterprise, providing a single solution for attack detection, threat visibility, proactive hunting, and threat response.

We will help you get started with Azure Sentinel with its Proof of Concept offering and the program running over 5 days. We aim to provide you a definite understanding of how Azure Sentinel can contribute to your business from securing the enterprise to saving the infrastructure cost.

Key Benefits:

  1. Help you to integrate with supported sources by deploying sentinel agents or using sentinel data connectors
  2. Help you to detect threats using Microsoft's analytics and threat intelligence
  3. Help you to hunt for the malicious threats at scale
  4. help you to respond to the threat rapidly using built-in orchestration and automation

Total estimated cost is based on Scope of Work (SOW)

items.summary: Overstappen naar de Azure Cloud met het ’Transitie Framework’: Een één-daagse workshop. Leer alles over onze Transitie Framework met haar 3 fasen voor een heldere keuze en aanpak.
items.description:
This application is available in Dutch.

Transitie naar de Azure Cloud vraagt om een duidelijke route en strategische keuzes. In een workshops met onze Solution Architecten, brengen we die route in kaart zodat bedrijven op basis van hun huidige IT-landschap de verschillende opties kunnen identificeren en keuzes kunnen maken.

Fase 1: De “Why” We definiëren samen met de klant de reden voor verandering en brengen de ‘transitie drivers’ in kaart. Dit resulteert in een eerste blauwdruk van het transitieframework.

Fase 2: “What” In het framework geven we de architectuur en het design weer van het IT-landschap. Dit helpt om bij de migratie van een enkele omgeving, te verifiëren of met alle onder- en bovenliggende onderdelen en de architectuuraspecten rekening is gehouden.

Fase 3: “How” Met de uitgangspunten en de IT-omgeving in kaart gebracht, komt de transitiefase in zicht. Een transitie naar de cloud kent niet één ideaal scenario. In een ‘Ideation’ sessie onderzoeken wij met onze klanten welke oplossing het best aansluit bij de organisatie.

items.summary: Blue Ocean offers a VDI solution for full-fledged remote work of your employees at anytime and from anydevice with secure access
items.description:
Blue Ocean as a Microsoft Global ISV and Citrix Platinum Plus Partnership offers a robust VDI solution based on Azure Virtual Desktop & Citrix, for the simplest, fastest way to deliver Windows apps and Desktops to meet your users needs. This service offers cloud-based management, provisioning, and managed capacity for delivering virtual apps and desktops to any device. Our solution is aimed to a wide variety Indsutry segments such as Finance, Retail, Telco, Education, Oil and Mining. Our experience with Citrix and Microsoft Azure allows us to guide and help your organization to deliver a great user experience for your workforce and increase the commitment of your employees. Our highly trained Technical and Commercial Team allows us to guide our clients in understanding their needs, designing the architecture that best suits their requirements, implementation in the shortest possible time and subsequent accompaniment and support once the solution is delivered. Blue Ocean VDI Service Provides

Standard Package Features • - Windows Virtual Desktop • - Custom OS Image Support • - Pre-configured Office 365 • - Desktop Based Application Support • - Pre-Mounted OneDrive • - File Share Access Supported • - Access On-premise Resources • - Auto-Scalable

Prerequisites • - Azure Subscription • - User Profile Size (Light / Heavy)

Delivery Time • - 1 Week (w/ 1 Custom Image) • - 2 Days (per Extra OS Image)

Premium Package Features • - Windows Virtual Desktop • - Custom OS Image Support • - Pre-configured Office 365 • - Virtual Application Support • - Client Server Application Support • - Custom Application Support • - Pre-Mounted OneDrive • - File Share Access Supported • - Access On-premise Resources • - Auto-Scalable

Prerequisites • - Azure Subscription • - Express Route / VPN S2S • - User Profile Size (Light / Heavy)

Delivery Time • - Depending up on Count of Applications to be Virtualized and Complexity Aprox. 2 weeks

items.displayName: "Cloud Readiness Check: 3-day Assessment Azure and Dynamics 365 Financials"
items.summary: Das Fundament für Ihr zukunftsfähiges IT-Konzept bildet der Cloud Readiness Check (CRC) für Azure. Minimierung finanzieller Risiken durch Migration mit Dynamics 365 for Financials in die Cloud.
items.description:
Die traditionelle Denkweise von Unternehmen im Hinblick auf IT-Ressourcen und die damit verbundene Datensicherheit hat sich in den letzten Jahren grundlegend verändert. Die Nutzung unterschiedlicher Rechenzentrumsdienste hilft Ihnen, Ihre alltäglichen Anforderungen zu bewältigen und vor allem effizienter zu gestalten. Gründe für die Auslagerung von IT-Infrastruktur können komplexe Sicherheitsanforderungen, Fachkräftemangel oder der hohe Zeitaufwand für Einrichtung und Verwaltung sein. Haben Sie sich schon einmal überlegt, welche Kosten entstehen würden, wenn eine Schadsoftware ihre IT-Infrastruktur für einen Tag oder sogar zwei Tage ausfallen lässt? Was es bedeutet, wenn Sie eine Software bzw. eine Sicherung wieder herstellen müssen? Dienste aus den Rechenzentren geben Ihnen eine grundlegende Sicherheit das E-Mails, bevor sie in Ihr Postfach gelangen geprüft und falls nötig zurückgehalten werden. Zudem sind Sie bei einem Ausfall Ihrer Server geschützt. Auch die Nutzung kann je nach tatsächlich benötigtem Verbrauch hoch und vor allem wieder runter gefahren werden, um Kosten zu optimieren. Ein besonders wichtiger Aspekt ist es gerade in den heutigen Krisenzeiten durch Krieg und Pandemien die finanziellen Risiken abzusichern. Nach dem CRC zeigen wir Ihnen auf, wie Sie diese Risiken mit der Migration in die Cloud auf der Basis von Dynamics 365 for Financials minimieren können. Mehrwerte
  • Hohe Sicherheits- & Datenschutz-Standards – Datenspeicherung in Deutschland (EU-DSGVO konform)
  • Sicherstellung der Geschäftskontinuität ohne Datenausfälle
  • Globale Skalierung – richtige Menge an IT-Ressourcen je nach Bedarfsnutzung
  • Zuverlässig und leistungsstark – hohe Verfügbarkeit noch schneller in der Cloud
  • Bereitstellung lokaler Leistung und Flexibilität
  • Bedarfsorientierte, flexible Lizenzierung
  • Zugang zu Technologien und Innovationen
    • Im Zuge der Digitalisierung ist eine verfügbare und jederzeit betriebsbereite IT-Umgebung essenziell. Gesetzliche Vorgaben fordern, immer auf aktuellem Stand zu sein. Die Hardware muss mit Ihren Betriebsanforderungen und Aufgaben wachsen. Nahezu alle führenden Software-Hersteller verkürzen ihre Support-Zyklen, um dem technischen Wandel Schritt zu halten. Bisher haben Sie alle 5 Jahre eine 5- bis 6-stellige Investition in neue Hardware und Software getätigt. Hardware und Dienste in die Cloud zu verlagern ist im Vergleich dazu eine Möglichkeit. Erfahren Sie, wie weit Ihre Umgebung oder Teile davon zukunftssicher und wirtschaftlich der Digitalisierung und dem Softwarewandel mithalten kann. Das Fundament für ein zukunftsfähiges IT-Konzept bildet der Cloud Readiness Check (CRC). Der CRC wird ausschließlich Remote (via Fernwartung und Teams) angeboten. Dieses Strategiepapier zeigt Ihnen anhand der ermittelten Infrastruktur detailliert auf, inwieweit Sie Cloud-fähig sind in welche Richtung Sie Ihre IT-Strategie und -Umgebung ausrichten können:
  • eingesetzte Software / Schnittstellen (auch 3. Hersteller)
  • eingesetzte Betriebssysteme (Server / Client)
  • Inventarisierung (Betriebskonzept, Sizing)
  • Datenvolumen
  • Bandbreitenanalyse
  • Anforderungsaufnahme
  • Zugriffskonzept (Thin Clients / Terminal Server / VPN / Azure Portal)
  • Identitätsmanagement
  • Datenhaltung
  • Backup
  • Druckermanagement
  • Migrationskonzept
  • Betrieb / Betriebsunterstützung (Managed | Service)
  • Konzepterstellung
  • Sicherheitskonzept
  • Betriebskonzept
  • Migrationskonzept
  • Zugriffskonzept
    • Effizienz steigern, Kosten reduzieren und nachhaltig wachsen: Durch den gezielten Einsatz moderner IT unterstützen wir unsere Kunden dabei, die Chancen der Digitalisierung für ihre Unternehmensziele zu nutzen. Dazu liefern wir nicht nur neueste Systeme und Tools, sondern entwickeln auch zukunftsorientierte, ganzheitliche Lösungen für die individuellen Anforderungen unserer Kunden auf der Basis von Dynamics 365 for Financials in der Cloud.

  • Globale Skalierung – richtige Menge an IT-Ressourcen je nach Bedarfsnutzung
  • Zuverlässig und leistungsstark – hohe Verfügbarkeit noch schneller in der Cloud
  • Bereitstellung lokaler Leistung und Flexibilität
  • Bedarfsorientierte, flexible Lizenzierung
  • Zugang zu Technologien und Innovationen
    • Im Zuge der Digitalisierung ist eine verfügbare und jederzeit betriebsbereite IT-Umgebung essenziell. Gesetzliche Vorgaben fordern, immer auf aktuellem Stand zu sein. Die Hardware muss mit Ihren Betriebsanforderungen und Aufgaben wachsen. Nahezu alle führenden Software-Hersteller verkürzen ihre Support-Zyklen, um dem technischen Wandel Schritt zu halten. Bisher haben Sie alle 5 Jahre eine 5- bis 6-stellige Investition in neue Hardware und Software getätigt. Hardware und Dienste in die Cloud zu verlagern ist im Vergleich dazu eine Möglichkeit. Erfahren Sie, wie weit Ihre Umgebung oder Teile davon zukunftssicher und wirtschaftlich der Digitalisierung und dem Softwarewandel mithalten kann. Das Fundament für ein zukunftsfähiges IT-Konzept bildet der Cloud Readiness Check (CRC). Der CRC wird ausschließlich Remote (via Fernwartung und Teams) angeboten. Dieses Strategiepapier zeigt Ihnen anhand der ermittelten Infrastruktur detailliert auf, inwieweit Sie Cloud-fähig sind in welche Richtung Sie Ihre IT-Strategie und -Umgebung ausrichten können:
  • eingesetzte Software / Schnittstellen (auch 3. Hersteller)
  • eingesetzte Betriebssysteme (Server / Client)
  • Inventarisierung (Betriebskonzept, Sizing)
  • Datenvolumen
  • Bandbreitenanalyse
  • Anforderungsaufnahme
  • Zugriffskonzept (Thin Clients / Terminal Server / VPN / Azure Portal)
  • Identitätsmanagement
  • Datenhaltung
  • Backup
  • Druckermanagement
  • Migrationskonzept
  • Betrieb / Betriebsunterstützung (Managed | Service)
  • Konzepterstellung
  • Sicherheitskonzept
  • Betriebskonzept
  • Migrationskonzept
  • Zugriffskonzept
    • Effizienz steigern, Kosten reduzieren und nachhaltig wachsen: Durch den gezielten Einsatz moderner IT unterstützen wir unsere Kunden dabei, die Chancen der Digitalisierung für ihre Unternehmensziele zu nutzen. Dazu liefern wir nicht nur neueste Systeme und Tools, sondern entwickeln auch zukunftsorientierte, ganzheitliche Lösungen für die individuellen Anforderungen unserer Kunden auf der Basis von Dynamics 365 for Financials in der Cloud.

plans.displayName: "Cloud Readiness Check: 3-day Assessment Azure and Dynamics 365 Financials"
plans.summary: Das Fundament für Ihr zukunftsfähiges IT-Konzept bildet der Cloud Readiness Check (CRC) für Azure. Minimierung finanzieller Risiken durch Migration mit Dynamics 365 for Financials in die Cloud.
plans.description:
Die traditionelle Denkweise von Unternehmen im Hinblick auf IT-Ressourcen und die damit verbundene Datensicherheit hat sich in den letzten Jahren grundlegend verändert. Die Nutzung unterschiedlicher Rechenzentrumsdienste hilft Ihnen, Ihre alltäglichen Anforderungen zu bewältigen und vor allem effizienter zu gestalten. Gründe für die Auslagerung von IT-Infrastruktur können komplexe Sicherheitsanforderungen, Fachkräftemangel oder der hohe Zeitaufwand für Einrichtung und Verwaltung sein. Haben Sie sich schon einmal überlegt, welche Kosten entstehen würden, wenn eine Schadsoftware ihre IT-Infrastruktur für einen Tag oder sogar zwei Tage ausfallen lässt? Was es bedeutet, wenn Sie eine Software bzw. eine Sicherung wieder herstellen müssen? Dienste aus den Rechenzentren geben Ihnen eine grundlegende Sicherheit das E-Mails, bevor sie in Ihr Postfach gelangen geprüft und falls nötig zurückgehalten werden. Zudem sind Sie bei einem Ausfall Ihrer Server geschützt. Auch die Nutzung kann je nach tatsächlich benötigtem Verbrauch hoch und vor allem wieder runter gefahren werden, um Kosten zu optimieren. Ein besonders wichtiger Aspekt ist es gerade in den heutigen Krisenzeiten durch Krieg und Pandemien die finanziellen Risiken abzusichern. Nach dem CRC zeigen wir Ihnen auf, wie Sie diese Risiken mit der Migration in die Cloud auf der Basis von Dynamics 365 for Financials minimieren können. Mehrwerte
  • Hohe Sicherheits- & Datenschutz-Standards – Datenspeicherung in Deutschland (EU-DSGVO konform)
  • Sicherstellung der Geschäftskontinuität ohne Datenausfälle
  • Globale Skalierung – richtige Menge an IT-Ressourcen je nach Bedarfsnutzung
  • Zuverlässig und leistungsstark – hohe Verfügbarkeit noch schneller in der Cloud
  • Bereitstellung lokaler Leistung und Flexibilität
  • Bedarfsorientierte, flexible Lizenzierung

items.summary: Solução de AI para classificar e codificar produtos que possuem variações complexas em suas descrições, associando corretamente seu código ou classe e minimizando erros de logística e entrega.
items.description:
“This offer is only available in Portuguese.

Solução inteiramente personalizável para a construção de modelos de codificação e análise de dados, com base na inteligência artificial e totalmente baseada nos serviços Cognitivos Azure, da nuvem Microsoft.

Na consultoria, que tem duração de 6 meses, vamos criar um algoritmo de classificação único para a necessidade do seu negócio, que, após o pré-processamento e análise, será treinado para execução, visando sempre o máximo de assertividade. Após o lançamento do modelo, a SGA oferece toda a sustentação para curadoria dos dados e monitoramento da performance da solução, por meio de um processo de retroalimentação da esteira de AI.

Adicionalmente, a SGA oferece um roadmap de evolução das tecnologias com diversas integrações que possibilitam maximizar o impacto da solução para o negócio.

Para quem é essa solução:

  • Empresas que desejam reduzir custos operacionais com a classificação e codificação manual.
  • Gestores interessados em aumentar a produtividade, eliminando a devolução de produtos classificados erroneamente.
  • Quem deseja inovar no seu negócio, adotando soluções de codificação com AI.
