items.summary: "Dynamics 365 implementation by MS POS" we will support you in implementing efficient and final ERP system
items.description:
Do you want to implement a reliable, efficient and user-friendly ERP system in your organization? Look no further than our Dynamics 365 implementation services. We provide expert support to both large enterprises and smaller organizations, drawing on our industry knowledge, experience and proven methodology to guarantee scalability, security and confidence with every implementation. Thanks to Dynamics 365, you will use an always up-to-date set of business applications in the cloud (or on-prem), without the need to invest in system updates or adapt applications to current market trends. Our solutions are tailored to the unique needs of your organization, with functionalities dedicated to various markets and industries. Our implementation methodology aims to break away from the bureaucracy associated with paper project documentation, so you can focus on modern technologies and tools. We ensure the confidentiality and integrity of your project information and data, while keeping interaction and feedback time to an absolute minimum with customized and flexible project IT tools. Thanks to Dynamics 365, you will minimize IT support and maintenance costs and gain immediate access to reliable information. You can also improve scalability, increase cost savings, and reduce deployment and lifecycle times for all your processes. Our industry knowledge and experience allow us to constantly improve and develop our solutions and services, offering full transparency, resources and knowledge to guarantee the success of your implementation project.

Our Dynamics 365 Cloud implementation services cover a wide range of areas to meet the specific needs of your organization. Here is a summary of the scope of our implementation services: • Finance and accounting: Our implementation services include setting up finance and accounting modules in Dynamics 365, including fixed assets, controlling and workflow. • Supply Chain Management: We can help streamline your supply chain management processes with Dynamics 365, from procurement to distribution, including inventory management and demand forecasting. • Warehouse management: We offer WMS implementation services in both production and warehouse environments, with the possibility of integration with automated warehouse systems via WCS. • Process manufacturing and quality control: Our process manufacturing and quality control expertise enables us to implement Dynamics 365 solutions that meet the unique needs of your industry. • Validation (GAMP/GMP): We understand the importance of industry compliance and can ensure that your Dynamics 365 implementation meets the necessary validation requirements. • Project management: Our implementation services include setting up project management modules in Dynamics 365 to help you plan, track and manage your projects effectively. • Sales and effective management of sales representatives: we can help you optimize your sales processes with Dynamics 365, from lead generation to order fulfillment, and provide tools for effective sales management. • Integration with industry regulators: Our implementation services include integration with industry regulators to ensure compliance with regulatory requirements. Thanks to our comprehensive Dynamics 365 Cloud implementation services, you can be sure that your organization's ERP system will be reliable, efficient and user-friendly.

items.summary: Our goal is to provide 1-Day Endpoint Management workshop to leverage intelligent security, risk-based controls, zero-touch provisioning, advanced analytics, and deep integration to the Microsoft 365
items.description: Engagement that will help you showcase the value of Microsoft 365, leading with Microsoft Endpoint Manager, to show you how to manage users’ devices, apps, and identities from anywhere. Get an executive deep dive into remote deployment, management, and the security of corporate and BYOD devices in your organization. Our goal is to show you the best ways to manage endpoints at the enterprise level. We’ll provide you with the ability to protect your authorized users’ identities so you can authenticate credentials and manage access while still giving users the freedom to collaborate with others. Particularly we will show you how to: •Improve your management capabilities with Microsoft Endpoint Manager •Discover and protect your endpoints by enforcing policies and deploying security tools •Secure your identities with multi-factor authentication and conditional access from any device •Enable your users to be productive with the applications they need, on the devices they want •Build management policies that protect your users, company data, and devices •Gain insights about your users’ endpoints and their compliance with your IT policies •Determine the best way to give your users access to the apps they need on the devices of their choosing

items.summary: Zones Exchange in a Box allows businesses to migrate their current platform to Exchange Online. As an add-on to Exchange Migrations, we recommend Zones Backup as a Service (ZBaaS) offering.
items.description:
Zones Exchange in a Box allows businesses to migrate their current platform to Exchange Online. As an add-on to Exchange Migrations, we recommend Zones Backup as a Service (ZBaaS) offering, which provides backup services for all your Microsoft 365 workloads and meets every security and compliance requirement.

Expect good things from Zones Exchange in a Box. • NCE Licensing. • Complimentary Exchange Migrations. Zones will provide the Exchange migration free of cost, following our proven Assess, Design, Implement and Manage (ADIM) delivery methodology. • Zones will back up all your Microsoft 365 workloads using Zones Backup as a Service (ZBaaS), so you do not have to.

Zones will provide the Exchange migration free of cost, following our proven Assess, Design, Implement and Manage (ADIM) delivery methodology. • Zones will back up all your Microsoft 365 workloads using Zones Backup as a Service (ZBaaS), so you do not have to.

items.summary: Mit Power Virtual Agents erhalten Sie Zugriff auf intelligente, dialogfähige Bots, welche schnell auf alle Anforderungen Ihrer Kunden reagieren.
items.description:
https://www.business-applications-addons.com/letschatchatbot

Chatbot - Kundenzufriedenheit verbessern

Chatbots sind zu jeder Tageszeit erreichbar, auch wenn die Unternehmen, die den Bot anbieten oder Ihre Mitarbeiter gar nicht mehr am Arbeiten sind. Durch den Einsatz von Chatbots bieten Unternehmen Ihrer Zielgruppe zu jederzeit einen Kommunikationskanal zu Ihrem Unternehmen an.

Mit unserer Implementierung von Power Virtual Agents erhalten Sie genau den Bot, welcher sich tagtäglich um die Probleme Ihrer Kunden kümmert. Ziel ist es, Ihre Kosten damit zu reduzieren, eine Optimierung und Effizienzsteigerung Ihrer Mitarbeiter zu erzielen, Ihre Erreichbarkeit zu verbessern und die Zufriedenheit Ihrer Kunden zu sichern.

Die Vision

  • Der Chat Bot soll durch die Vorqualifizierung von Anfragen die Mitarbeiter entlasten und sie so bei ihrer Arbeit so unterstützen, dass sie den Schwerpunkt auf ihre eigentliche Arbeit legen können. 
  • Der Chat Bot unterstützt Ihre Kunden bei der Erstellung von Tickets und versucht Anliegen direkt zu lösen. Ist ein direktes Lösen des Anliegens nicht möglich, unterstützt der Bot bei der Erstellung eines Ticket und erfragt alle notwendigen Informationen selbstständig.

    • In drei Schritten zur Chatbot Lösung mit Microsoft Dynamics

    Tag 1 - 2 (Delivery):

  • produktive Bereitstellung
  • Unterstützung bei einer einfachen Migration
  • Key User Schulung durchführen

    • Tag 3 - 4 (Configure / Develop ):

  • Umsetzung der Anforderungen
  • Rückkopplung der Ergebnisse
  • Technische Dokumentation der Lösung

    Tag 5 (Discovery & Onboarding):

  • Installation der Chat Bot Anwendung
  • 2x 4h Workshop um die Anforderungen zur Konfiguration zu sammeln

    • Die Lösung im Überblick

    Einmalige Kosten 3.999€ + Lizenzkosten 843€ pro Monat

  • Installation der Lösung
  • Erstellung eines intelligenten Chatbots für automatisierte Antworten
  • Weiterleitung von Chatbot Anfragen an Agent in den Service Desk
  • Anforderungs-Workshop
  • Go Live Deployment
  • Technische Dokumentation

    • Erweiterungsoptionen

    Schnittstellen Implementierung (nach Aufwand)

  • Schnittstellen Definition
  • Erarbeitung einer Architektur
  • Mapping der Felder
  • Implementierung der Schnittstelle
  • Dokumentation
  • Deployment

    • Portallösung (5 PT)

  • Anforderungen für das Portal sammeln
  • Bearbeitung von Formularen und Ansichten im CE
  • Aufsetzen vom Portal
  • 2 h Design Session
  • Lizenzkosten Customer Service Enterprise 80,10€/User/Monat

    • Einführung Dynamics Service (10 PT)

  • Service Modul von Dynamics 365
  • Einrichtung E-Mail zu Ticket Funktion
  • Einrichtung von einer SLA Funktionalität
  • Einrichtung der Wissensdatenbank
  • Anwender E-Mail Benachrichtigung beim Erhalt und Lösen eines Ticket
  • Anbindung an Microsoft Teams

    • Sprechen Sie uns an und sichern sich jetzt noch den Rabatt, bevor dieser entfällt. Wir freuen uns darauf von Ihnen zu hören!

    https://www.business-applications-addons.com/letschatchatbot

items.longSummary: SharePoint WebPart
items.description:
This application is available in german.
Durch das WebPart- "Meine Schnelleinstiege" können Sie Ihre wichtigste Links, die für Ihre Arbeit essenziell sind auf eigenes Linkdashboard hinzufügen. 

Funktionen:
  • Über einen Klick auf den jeweiligen Stern der Linkkachel fügt man bestimmten Link zu "Meinem Dashboard" hinzu oder entfernt diesen wieder.
  • Um die Anzeigereihenfolge der Linkkacheln anzupassen, gibt es den Button "Sortieren". 

Weitere Funktionen können je nach individuelle Anforderung hinzugefügt werden. 
This application is available in german.

items.summary: The CDI Microsoft Office Configurations sets a standard for deployment of Office Applications using cloud based administrative consoles.
items.description:
The CDI Microsoft Office Configuration Baseline sets a standard deployment of Office applications within an organization using administrative consoles similar to the Microsoft 365 admin console.

Configuration of Office applications often go overlooked with moving to the cloud, resulting in default configurations and additional attack vectors for bad actors and bloat on end user devices. The Office Configuration baseline ensures these critical settings are not overlooked as these applications are critical to most organizations and typically are installed on a majority of devices.

The Baseline Includes:

  • Inventory cleanup settings
  • Configuration of 133 policies to Microsoft Security recommendations
  • Office Application Deployment configuration
  • Configure Update policies with 3 different update rings
  • Configuration of application preference policies
  • Testing and revision of all configurations
  • Knowledge Transfer of settings and the Office Apps configuration portal.

items.summary: Com o serviço de "Modernização de Aplicações com Azure" podemos identificar gargalos na aplicação pro meio de um assessment e migra-la para o Microsoft Azure obtendo ótimos resultados de performance

items.summary: Organizations require a modern workplace voice solution with phone system calling capabilities enabled to integrate with their video, meeting room and communication eco-system.
items.description: Diversified’s comprehensive voice, calling, communication, video and device integration expertise provide organizations specialized consultation, implementation and support services required to deliver seamless, collaborative experiences for employees, business partners, and customers. Diversified’s ‘Modernize Communications with Teams Phone Workshop’ is a modular engagement to experience the vision for Microsoft Teams Phone and advanced communication scenarios. This workshop is designed to guide you through the process of a simplified enterprise voice solution with reliable, high-quality, integrated calling. Through ‘Deep Dive’ demonstrations, use-case design, and comprehensive planning you will obtain actionable recommendations and detailed roadmap on how to design, deploy, adopt and support Microsoft Teams Phone.

Through ‘Deep Dive’ demonstrations, use-case design, and comprehensive planning you will obtain actionable recommendations and detailed roadmap on how to design, deploy, adopt and support Microsoft Teams Phone.

items.displayName: "Pay Later" payment platform for GCC retailers
items.longSummary: Drive higher revenue & better conversion in UAE & KSA with Spotii’s “Pay Later” payment plugin
items.description:
Now, more than ever, retailers require new and innovative methods to engage customers and improve conversion rates in order to recover lost revenue following an unprecedented economic collapse. 

Discounts and interest-bearing payment plans are tactics retailers typically employ to attract e-shoppers and remove barriers to online purchasing. However, the former erodes a retailer’s pricing base and while the latter risks alienating customers sensitive to paying additional fees in these uncertain times.  

This is where Spotii can help! Spotii’s Shop Now, Pay Later offering both boosts Merchants and delights Shoppers. 

Spotii is an innovative payment platform for Fashion, Beauty and Lifestyle that empowers shoppers to Shop Now and Pay Later with no interest, no cost and no catch. 

Our unique “Pay Later” service, which works both online and in-store, enables Shoppers to expand their purchasing power by spreading their payments over time with just a few clicks. 

Spotii offers Merchants a risk-free “Pay Later” payment option that includes several benefits not provided by payment gateways:

  • Spotii assumes all chargeback and fraud liability
  • Spotii actively co-markets with Merchants and drives incremental traffic through the Spotii Shop Directory
  • The Merchant gets paid all upfront by bank transfer

Spotii has already helped many prominent GCC retailers generating additional revenue, including:

  • 40% to 50% revenue increase from new shoppers
  • 50% increase in basket size
  • 5x-15x ROI through improved shoppers’ acquisition

Click the “Get It Now” button to learn more and try Spotii today 😊

items.displayName: "Plano de adoção do Microsoft 365: Implementação de 3 Semanas"
items.summary: Desenvolvimento de plano de comunicação e campanha visual de endomarketing para promover o uso da tecnologia. Estratégia e plano de capacitação para levar conhecimento e habilidades para mudança.
items.description:
Esta oferta está disponível em línguas em português e inglês. This offer is available in English Portuguese english languages. Através de metodologia própria, são desenvolvidas ações para implementar e promover o melhor uso da tecnologia em empresas de todos os tamanhos e segmentos, de forma remota ou presencial. Com uma consultoria na identificação personas e cenários de uso do Microsoft365. Desenvolvimento de plano de comunicação e campanha visual de endomarketing para promover o uso da tecnologia. Estratégia e plano de capacitação para levar conhecimento e habilidades para mudança. Execução de treinamentos e workshops nas ferramentas da plataforma. Esta solução requer uma Tenant do Microsoft 365 com licenças do Microsoft Teams para que os colaboradores tenham acesso ao ambiente e possam executar suas reservas e acessos. Com um preço de 6000 USD para o nosso plano básico e com um preço de 10000 USD para o plano intermediário, baseado em toda a infraestrutura utilizada para customização da ferramenta e time técnico responsável pela implementação do mesmo.

Through its own methodology, actions are developed to implement and promote the best use of technology in companies of all sizes and segments, remotely or in person. With a consultancy in identifying Microsoft 365 personas and usage scenarios. Development of a communication plan and endomarketing visual campaign to promote the use of technology. Training strategy and plan to bring knowledge and skills to change. Execution of training and workshops on the platform tools. This solution requires a Microsoft 365 Tenant with Microsoft Teams licenses so that collaborators have access to the environment and can perform their reservations and access. With a price of 6000 USD for our basic plan and with a price of 10000 USD for the intermediate plan, based on all the infrastructure used to customize the tool and the technical team responsible for its implementation.

items.summary: Cluster Reply, thanks to its strong skills in the manufacturing sector, can help companies to strengthen the relationship with their customers, through the Smart Consulting Solution
items.description:
This free 2-hours briefing is focused on how the Smart Consulting Solution could be the main pillar of your company, helping you to create a strong relationship with your customers. This solution will involve different Microsoft products starting from Microsoft Teams in order to automatically provide to your customers a Teams meeting on the preselected day; store data and customer information using Power apps or Dynamics 365 and common data service and, least but not the last, analyze customer voice surveys data directly on Dynamics 365 to know their satisfaction rates. The Smart Consulting approach proposed by Cluster Reply provides many advantages such as:

  • improves the relationship between your company and your customers (using Microsoft Teams as a channel to simplify communication),
  • gives customers high quality support (Storing all customer's data in one place Microsoft Teams App, Power Apps or Dynamics 365)
  • boost Sales & Customer service productivity

We will help our companies deliver a real impact for a better experience, better insight, better performance.

This no-obligation informational briefing is designed for manufacturing companies in order to offer/present them our Smart Consulting Solution approach and technologies involved (Teams, Dynamics 365, Power App). After this meeting, our attendees will be able to evaluate how it can be adapted and applied to their processes.

Deliverables:

  • General overview and presentation of Smart Consulting Solution
  • Review of Smart Consulting capabilities and key features

Agenda

  • Our Mission
  • Main customers needs
  • Live Demo of Smart Consulting Solution
  • Smart Consulting features and benefits
  • Involved Technologies (Teams, Dynamics 365, Power Apps)
  • How can "Smart Consulting" be useful in your company?

items.summary: A oferta Solo Goals tem como objetivo avaliar os desafios de alinhamento de metas e objetivos das empresas, para gerar uma proposta de solução através do uso da plataforma Microsoft Viva Goals.
items.description:
Solo Goals Transforme seus desafios em resultados extraordinários com Microsoft Viva Goals

O que é? O Solo Goals é uma solução abrangente projetada para solucionar os desafios complexos de alinhamento de metas e objetivos enfrentados pelas empresas. Com base na solução Microsoft Viva Goals, a equipe da Solo Network se dedica a realizar um mapeamento minucioso em parceria com os líderes das áreas de negócios da sua organização, identificando e compreendendo a fundo os principais obstáculos e desafios que afetam a gestão de metas e o acompanhamento de indicadores.

Alinhe suas metas e objetivos de maneira efetiva com o Solo Goals Nossa análise minuciosa nos permite oferecer uma solução personalizada que atende às necessidades específicas da sua empresa. Com base em dados e melhores práticas, abordamos de forma eficaz as questões cruciais relacionadas à gestão de metas, buscando otimizar processos e melhorar os resultados organizacionais.

Com o Solo Goals, você aproveitará o conhecimento especializado da nossa equipe em alinhamento estratégico e as avançadas capacidades do Microsoft Viva Goals. Combinando liderança empresarial e tecnologia de ponta, capacitamos a alta direção e os usuários-chave a estabelecer metas claras, acompanhar indicadores de desempenho de maneira eficiente e impulsionar a produtividade em toda a organização.

Entregáveis:

• Engajamento da alta direção, para mapear como é realizada a divulgação dos objetivos da companhia, bem como a definição das metas das áreas de negócio, visando alcançar os objetivos da empresa;

• Engajamento dos usuários chave das áreas de negócios (TI, Financeiro, RH, Comercial, etc...) para o mapeamento das dificuldades encontradas no dia a dia;

• Consolidação dos resultados visando um mapeamento destacado dos principais problemas que impactam a gestão dos indicadores de desempenho dos colaboradores e cumprimento das metas das áreas de negócio;

•Definição de uma estratégia para endereçar os problemas apontados e formas de otimizar a gestão dos indicadores dos colaboradores, através da solução Microsoft Viva Goals;

•Alinhamento estratégico junto aos líderes das áreas de negócios e o plano sugerido;

•Definição de uma matriz de ações com base em priorização para atuação imediata nos pontos mais críticos e com resultados a curto prazo;

•Execução de workshops com duração de até 2 horas demonstrando na prática como as soluções podem otimizar a gestão de indicadores através do Microsoft Viva Goals, com base nos pontos de atenção mapeados inicialmente;

•Realização de uma pesquisa para medir a efetividade das ações e índices de melhora no controle de indicadores dos colaboradores;

•Medir a utilização do produto Microsoft Viva Goals na suíte de produtividade;

Através dos Workshops será possível:

•Gerar conhecimento para que os gestores possam realizar a gestão de indicadores e acompanhamento de metas das áreas de negócio da companhia, através do Microsoft Viva Goals, de maneira simples e efetiva;

•Formar multiplicadores: Os colaboradores que participarem dos treinamentos, além de aprenderem sobre novas tecnologias, poderão replicar de conhecimento;

•Mostrar aos gestores da empresa, os ganhos e aumento da produtividade no dia a dia, ao controlar os indicadores de meta de desempenho, através do Microsoft Viva Goals;

Ao final dos trabalhos será entregue um relatório para a companhia, listado oportunidades de otimização na gestão de indicadores através do Microsoft Viva Goals. Onde será possível:

•Identificar oportunidades de utilização do Viva Goals para de automação e maior controle na gestão de indicadores de desempenho; •Identificar a utilização das licenças da solução, oportunidades de otimização e necessidades de aquisição de licenças para utilização do Viva Goals. •Com base no mapeamento, identificar oportunidades para melhorar a relação com os colaboradores através dos produtos: Microsoft Viva Engage, Viva Insights e Viva Connections.

*This offer is available only in Portuguese.

items.summary: Solução completa de modernização de infraestrutura, através da uma arquitetura ágil utilizando soluções nativas de nuvem.
items.description:
"Solo Infra Modernization: 6-WK Briefing" Os serviços de modernização de infraestrutura da Solo Network são projetados para ajudar sua empresa a migrar ambientes tradicionais para uma arquitetura ágil e escalável utilizando recursos nativos da nuvem de forma segura e eficiente. Da avaliação inicial à gestão contínua, nós cuidamos de cada etapa do processo, seguindo as melhores práticas recomendadas pelo fabricante.

Como podemos ajudar: Introdução ao Microsoft Azure: Avaliaremos suas necessidades de negócios e ajudaremos você a entender como o Microsoft Azure pode atender a essas necessidades. Ampliação do uso do Microsoft Azure: Se você já usa o Microsoft Azure, iremos ajudá-lo a otimizar sua infraestrutura existente e expandir seu uso para atender melhor às suas necessidades em evolução.

Entregáveis:

Fase de Assessment: • Pré-requisitos e escopo de trabalho • Assessment FinOps • Assessment segurança • Alinhamento de expectativas Fase de Planejamento Estratégico: • Definição de cronograma e metas Fase de Arquitetura em Nuvem: • Desenho de arquitetura modernizada na nuvem Fase de Execução: • Reunião de Kick-off • Migração gradual para a nuvem

items.summary: Tenha visão de GAPS de segurança em seu ambiente e como protege-lo de forma efetiva utilizando a suíte Microsoft 365
items.description:
A oferta Solo Microsoft 365 Discovery, tem como objetivo realizar um assessment do ambiente do cliente, a fim de identificar o nível de proteção e maturidade de segurança, ajudando o cliente a desenvolver um plano de ação utilizando as ferramentas disponíveis no Microsoft 365 para aprimorar:

Gestão de arquivos e contudo; Gerenciamento de dispositivos e aplicativos; Gerenciamento de acesso e identidade; Proteção contra ameaças; Proteção de informações; Gestão de conformidade;

A analise também tem como objetivo identificar o nivel de utilização da Suite Microsoft 365 para os clietnes que ja possuem a plataforma contratada, gerando como saida, sugestões sobre como aderir a plataforma para tornar o ambiente mais seguro e produtivo.

Pontos de atenção. Otimização do nível de proteção atual.

*This offer is available only in portuguese

items.summary: Extraia todo o potencial das soluções de produtividade e I.A da Microsoft com o serviço altamente especializado da Solo Network
items.description:
"Solo Optimization by IA: 3WK Briefing" A inovação mais recente da Microsoft em inteligência artificial ao seu alcance. Essa oferta foi pensada para você que deseja extrair todo o potencial das soluções de produtividade e I.A lançada pela Microsoft. Com o Solo Optimization by IA você contará com um time de especialistas que estudarão sua empresa e seus processos para lhe indicar onde o Copilot for Microsoft 365 pode ser melhor aproveitado. Além disso, você contará com nosso apoio para ativação da ferramenta, configuração, treinamentos e muito mais.

Activation​ Durante a fase de ativação do Copilot for Microsoft 365, diversas etapas são executadas para garantir uma integração eficiente. Começando com o Assessment para avaliar as necessidades do ambiente, seguido pela parametrização para configurações necessárias, e concluindo com a ativação efetiva da ferramenta, incluindo testes de validação.​

Training​ Na fase de treinamento do Copilot for Microsoft 365, oferecemos diversos recursos para garantir a familiaridade e eficácia na utilização da ferramenta, incluindo materiais personalizados, como tutoriais em PDFs/Word, e-mails com dicas e vídeos curtos, adaptados à marca da sua organização, além de treinamentos customizados ao vivo e vídeo aulas gravadas do Copilot for Microsoft 365 na nossa plataforma EAD. Também oferecemos orientações específicas para cada público e área de atuação, visando otimizar o uso do assistente de IA da Microsoft no dia a dia dos colaboradores.​

Continuous Improvement​ Na fase de melhoria contínua do Copilot for Microsoft 365, realizamos monitoramento do uso da ferramenta, analisamos relatórios e métricas para identificar oportunidades de melhorias. Aplicamos essas melhorias para otimizar o desempenho da ferramenta em sua organização. Além disso, fornecemos suporte contínuo, webinars e newsletters com novidades e recursos adicionais do Copilot for Microsoft 365

items.summary: A oferta Solo Speed UP tem como objetivo avaliar os desafios de comunicação das empresas, potencializando as mesmas através da utilização de produtos disponíveis na suíte Microsoft 365.
items.description:
A oferta Solo Speed UP tem como objetivo avaliar os desafios de comunicação das empresas, e fazê-las melhorar tal aspecto através da utilização de produtos disponíveis na suíte Microsoft 365.

Nosso time de especialistas irá realizar um trabalho de mapeamento junto aos usuários chave das áreas de negócios da companhia, e entendendo quais sãos o maiores desafios relacionados a comunicação entre colaboradores e as áreas de negócios, da seguinte maneira:

• Engajamento dos usuários chave das áreas de negócios (TI, Financeiro, RH, Comercial, etc) para um mapeamento das dificuldades encontradas no dia a dia, com o intuito de tornar o dia a dia dos profissionais mais produtivos; • Consolidação dos resultados visando um mapeamento destacado dos principais problemas que impactam a produtividades dos colaboradores; • Definição de uma estratégia para endereçar os problemas apontados e formas de otimizar a produtividade dos usuários; • Alinhamento estratégico junto aos líderes das áreas de negócios e o plano sugerido; • Definição de uma matriz de ações com base em priorização para atuação imediata nos pontos mais críticos e com resultados a curto prazo; • Execução de workshops com duração de até 2 horas demonstrando na pratica como as soluções podem otimizar o dia a dia dos colaboradores, com base nos pontos de atenção mapeados inicialmente; • Realização de uma pesquisa para medir a efetividade das ações e índices de melhora de produtividade dos usuários; • Medir a utilização dos produtos disponíveis na suíte de produtividade.

Atraves dos Workshops sera possivel:

• Acelerar a comunicação dos usuarios atraves das ferramentas ja implementadas e não utilizadas em sua plenitude; • Formar multipliacdores, os colaboradores que partiparem dos treinamentos, além de aprenderem sobre novas tecnologias, poderão replicar de conhecimento; • Mostrar aos colaboradores da empresa, os ganhos e aumento da produtividade no dia a dia, ao utilizar os produtos disponiveis na suite;

Ao final dos trabalhos será entregue um relatório para a companhia, listado oportunidades de melhoria na comunicação interna da empresa, que podem ser implementadas através da plataforma Microsoft 365. Atraves dos relatorios sera possivel:

• Identificar a utilização das licenças e oportunidades de otimização; • Identificar produtos disponiveis nos licençiamento atual e não utilizados; • Identificar o nivel de utilização dos produtos ativos no contrato, a fim de criar estratégias para acelerar a adoção para produtos com baixa utilização; • Identificar oportunidades de automação de processos atraves da Suite Microsoft 365; • Identificar oportunidades para redução de custos, através da utilização da Suite 365 incluindo produtos de gerenciamento e segurança;

*This offer is available only in Portuguese.

items.longSummary: A personalized Copilot and Teams App to make AI sound like you & act as a personalized coach.
items.description:
Imagine a world where AI doesn’t just assist you - it amplifies you. Where Copilot knows your values and doesn’t just generate content, it understands you and sounds like you. Making AI feel personal, authentic and human.


With ‘Sounds Like Me’ from iAM, you hyper-personalize Microsoft Copilot and Microsoft Teams to reflect who you truly are. No psychometrics. No predefined models - just AI that reflects who you truly are, an extension of you, your voice, your values, your unique way of working.


Why ‘Sounds Like Me’?

We make AI irresistible by making it human. 76% fear AI will decrease authenticity at work. AI should make us more human, not less. ‘Sounds Like Me’ changes that by embedding the extensibility of Copilot with your unique identity. You can:


  • Drive AI adoption – overcome resistance by making AI feel personal.
  • Boost Productivity – teams work faster without loosing their voice.
  • Enhance Retention – iAM users are 2 x more likely to stay in their role.


✅ Hyper-personalized AI: Copilot generates content that sounds like you.
✅ Personalized coaching: Get instant insights on stress, pressure and growth.

✅ AI-powered authenticity: Write emails, papers and messages in your own style.



How It Works

  • Create your iAM via LMS or at www.soundslikeme.ai.
  • Load it into Microsoft Teams and Copilot.
  • Use ‘Sounds Like Me’ in Teams and Copilot for personalized AI outputs and real-time coaching.
  • Share iAM’s in Teams for team insights & collaboration.


Use Cases for Extensibility of Copilot

  • Productivity – Align work methods to your natural style.
  • Accessibility – define who you are to be your authentic self.
  • Self-awareness & development – discover your superpowers, triggers, and blind spots.
  • Personalized development plans – Tailor professional and personal growth.
  • Inclusivity & belonging – share your iAM to create deeper connections at work in Teams.
  • Managing pressure – develop authentic strategies for handling challenges.
  • Authenticity – Ensure AI-generated content truly reflects you.


Pricing & Deployment

We provide tailored pilot programs and full enterprise rollouts, each supported by our Customer Success Package, including use case guides, prompt libraries, podcasts & onboarding content.

Pricing is per user, with volume based discounts. Annual invoicing with a 20% discount from year two onwards. Your organization receives tokens to allocate to users. Each token grants access to create an iAM and activate the Sounds Like Me™ Agent.


Join the movement. Make AI irresistible - by making it human.

Revolutionize AI with Human-Centric Technology. AI should amplify individuality, not reduce it. Revolutionize AI in your organization. Schedule a demo today.

items.longSummary: なつこフリーライセンス
items.summary: なつこ
items.description:
1. オファーの説明：なつこはMicrosoft365テナント間コラボレーション機能を利用して、ふゆこと連携します。
2. オファーの恩恵を受けるユーザーのタイプ：工事請負業者
3. オファーが解決する顧客のニーズや痛み：工事発注者・請負者間の工事情報共有は従来第三者ASPを介して行ってきましたが、なつこ・ふゆこ連携により直接情報共有できるようになります。　これによりASPでは不可能だったことが、可能になります。　一例を挙げれば電子納品を廃止することができます。

plans.summary: なつこは無料です
plans.description:
なつこは、ふゆこをお使いのお客様の元で利用します。
ご使用時は別途PKGを提供します。

items.summary: Our Threat protection workshop is designed to create customer intent for deploying advanced Microsoft Security products.
items.description:
Purpose

Gain visibility into threats to the customer’s Microsoft 365 cloud environment across email, identity and data to better understand, prioritize and mitigate potential vectors of cyberattacks against your organization. Insentra will help you understand how Microsoft 365 security products can mitigate and protect against the threats found during the period of this engagement.

Topics include:

  • Understanding customers’ security goals and objectives
  • Identifying security threats using a Microsoft 365 E5 trial
  • Providing an overview of the Microsoft Security end-to-end story
  • Showcasing product capabilities through newly designed rich demos
  • Developing joint plans and recommending next steps

Agenda

  • Day 1: Kick-off, Microsoft Defender for Endpoint & Microsoft Defender for Identity
  • Day 2: Threat Landscape, Report Generation
  • Day 3: Threat results presentation, Next steps

items.summary: Our Threat protection workshop is designed to create customer intent for deploying advanced Microsoft Security products.

Gain visibility into threats to the customer’s Microsoft 365 cloud environment across email, identity and data to better understand, prioritize and mitigate potential vectors of cyberattacks against your organization. Topics include:

items.displayName: "需要予測基盤構築サービス: 3ヶ月の実装"
items.summary: 需要予測を基とした最適化のご支援を含め、製造・小売・飲食業等のクライアント様に対して、幅広くデータ活用を支援させて頂いております。
items.description:
This service is available in Japanese. AIを利用することで予測精度の改善や人的工数の削減をするだけでなく、AI需要予測を軸とした他システム(在庫管理・シフト管理など)との連携により発展的なDX推進が可能となります。

またAzureを使用することによって可用性が担保され、導入コストを抑えることができるようになります。内外に散在するデータを集約し、データの利活用やDX推進に繋げていくためのデータ分析基盤を、DATUM STUDIOの知見を活かしMicrosoft Azure上でご提供します。

【お客様の需要予測に最適なデータの選定支援／AIモデル構築】 お客様保有データ、外部データ(天気、他社の事業状況など)などのうち、どのデータを利用すれば予測精度が向上するか、データ利活用の設計段階から専門のデータサイエンティストが支援します。また、最適なデータ選定の基、複数の需要予測モデルを構築し、お客様の事業活用に最適なモデルを選定いたします。

【将来を見据えたデータ基盤構築設計】 DXの取り組みを個別の問題として捉えず、将来に渡る多角的な視点から、有用なデータの蓄積管理を検討いたします。 そして既存システムとの連携、定常的な可視化、日常的なデータ分析による業務支援から新規事業まで見据え、お客様に最適な形でシステム設計いたします。

【多様なDX推進支援】 HRDX(シフト自動割当・最適化)、在庫、発注管理DXの提供や、プロモーション戦略策定・実行支援、顧客コミュニケーション設計をいたします。

items.summary: Engage and empower your staff with a intranet platform complete with rich functionality
items.description:
#Space is an intranet framework built on SharePoint and Microsoft 365 whereby individuals can enjoy all the key features of an intranet platform at a fraction of the cost of a custom build. Deployed to your Microsoft 365 tenant in an automated fashion, #Space blends your values, people, and technology together to deliver a solution that transforms the way your organisation collaborates.

Features include: OneSearch: Our enterprise staff directory enables your staff to quickly view everyone and their attributes within the organisation

Resource hub: This central space provides a single source of truth for company updates, events and important documents

Integrated workflows: Custom workflows that streamline manual processes can easily be created using Power Platform or Nintex.

Collaboration workspaces: Your employees can enjoy a running start to projects with Teams best practices collaboration templates made for cross-functional team work

Mobile responsiveness: #Space has a fully responsive interface that is optimised for the most popular mobile and tablet devices so your staff can keep updated with company news on the go

items.displayName: #stratapp - strategic and daily work in one app
items.longSummary: Making strategy execution successful and day to day work aligned and simple
items.description:
#stratapp is an affordable every-employee SaaS app that solves the disconnect between leaders and teams by allowing everyone to collaborate on strategy execution, with structure and context. #stratapp brings together strategy, plans, KPIs, ideas, risks, tasks, meetings and projects into one seamless user experience.

#stratapp adds value to the client's investment in Microsoft Teams and is built on the highly scalable Microsoft Service Fabric architecture, hosted on Microsoft Azure.

Clients elevate business performance, productivity and culture, whilst becoming ready for the next generation workforce.

#stratapp suits all industries across SMC, and progressive divisions within Enterprise. The buyer is usually the CEO, COO or CIO, commencing a 3 week trial of 10-100 people, followed by progressive org-wide roll-outs over 3 months. #stratapp solves strategy execution with an org-wide app, without the sales barrier of displacing existing technology.  In fact, #stratapp's roadmap will add more value to the existing ecosystem of B2B SaaS.

items.summary: Take advantage of our thorough and affordable Azure migration assessment. Gain valuable insights and key takeaways to learn what specific steps it will take to migrate your on-premise applications.
items.description:
During your workshop with us you and your organization will gain a deeper understanding of the status and migration readiness of your current systems. We will also gather key requirements and assist you with defining a detailed timeline, next steps and high level roadmap of your migration to Azure with the goal of supporting your long-term IT strategy.

##Agenda

  • Assess your environment to determine where cost savings can be realized
  • Asses your current on-premises applications, servers and solutions, also including storage, backup, disaster recovery, and licensing
  • Discuss and understand your unique priorities and drivers to optimize and modernize your IT
  • Share Azure know-how with you and demonstrate how Azure functions and how a migration to Azure works
  • Discuss on-going needs to support your movement to Azure as well as your needs once you’ve migrated to the cloud

##Deliverables

  • Interview with the key stakeholder to determine cloud strategy
  • On-premise IT environment analysis to determine current status and list of applications and servers
  • Learning session covering Azure basics and Azure migration (1 – 2 hour)
  • Azure documentation packet with the most relevant information and links to get started with Azure and expand your Azure knowledge
  • Report of recommendations and roadmap for your migration to Azure
  • Detailed Azure migration project plan

##Please note:

  • The price of the assessment varies with organization size and complexity of existing on-premises and/or Azure environment(s).

About FMT Consultants

Since 1995 | 5,000+ Successful Microsoft Engagements | Among the 1% of Microsoft Partners

Our Microsoft product offerings include:

  • Azure
  • Office 365
  • Infrastructure Security
  • Dynamics 365 Business Central (Mid-Market)
  • Dynamics 365 for Sales (CRM)
  • Dynamics GP
  • SharePoint
  • PowerBI
  • System Integration

items.longSummary: Our Azure managed service enables your business to benefit from our Azure technical and process expertise to manage your Azure environment. &Partners provide cost management and technical support of your Azure subscriptions and resources.
items.summary: &Partners Managed Service for your Azure subscriptions and resources.
items.description:
Our Azure managed service enables your business to benefit from our Azure technical and process expertise to manage your Azure environment. &Partners provide cost management and technical support of your Azure subscriptions and resources.
Our Managed Azure Service includes:
- configuration of your Azure subscriptions and resources
- support of your Azure resources
- monitoring of your Azure resources
- cost management of your Azure subscriptions

plans.summary: Managed Service for Azure subscriptions & resources, including cost management and technical support
plans.description:
Full Managed Service for Azure. 
We manage and support your Azure subscriptions and resources, and you benefit from technical support and Azure configuration expertise.

items.longSummary: &frankly is an innovative way to keep track of and drive employee engagement in your organization, through quick, pulsed questions and actionable insights.
items.description:
Use Microsoft Entra ID to manage user access and enable single sign-on with &frankly. Requires an existing &frankly subscription.

* Enterprise Single Sign-On - Microsoft Entra ID supports rich enterprise-class single sign-on with &frankly out of the box. Users sign in using their organizational accounts hosted in Active Directory.

* Easy Configuration - Microsoft Entra ID provides a simple step-by-step user interface for connecting &frankly to Microsoft Entra ID.

plans.description:
Use Microsoft Entra ID to manage user access and enable single sign-on with &frankly. Requires an existing &frankly subscription.

* Enterprise Single Sign-On - Microsoft Entra ID supports rich enterprise-class single sign-on with &frankly out of the box. Users sign in using their organizational accounts hosted in Active Directory.

* Easy Configuration - Microsoft Entra ID provides a simple step-by-step user interface for connecting &frankly to Microsoft Entra ID.

items.longSummary: A comprehensive platform for managing meetings with intelligent scheduling, performance & AI tools.
items.description:
Description

&money EngageMe Platform is a configurable end-to-end solution that digitalizes and optimizes the entire meeting process within banking, insurance, and pension sectors — directly inside your existing CRM system.

The platform has 4 main services where all services are integrated to the customers CRM system:

  1. BookMe – Advanced scheduling engine for customers, advisors, and partners, maximizing availability for valuable customers, while ensuring the most effective use of advisor resources and competencies.
  2. PrepareMe – Automated pre-meeting process combining AI-driven preparation, customer qualification, and seamless document collection and verification to ensure every meeting starts fully informed and compliant
  3. MeetMe – An AI-powered live assistant that supports advisors in real time during customer meetings — ensuring meeting goals are achieved, relevant products are presented, and sales opportunities are identified. After each meeting, MeetMe delivers personal feedback, enabling continuous advisor development and measurable performance improvement.
  4. AssistMe – Automates creation of leads, cases, and opportunities, and ensures consistent follow-up actions. Summaries and customer focused messages are generated instantly after each meeting.

All modules are no-code configurable via the platform’s Management UI.


Benefits


For Employees

  • A modern, integrated and intuitive CRM experience that reduces administrative effort across the entire meeting lifecycle.
  • Seamless synchronization between Outlook and CRM systems.
  • Real-time AI insights and post-meeting feedback drive measurable improvement in advisory quality and sales performance.


For Customers

  • Digital, frictionless and personalized meeting experiences.
  • Meetings tailored to their specific needs, with clear summaries and actionable next steps delivered automatically.
  • Greater understanding of financial options and transparency in advisory outcomes.

Needs and Pains Addressed


Needs

  • Intuitive, time-saving meeting process integrated with CRM
  • Consistent synchronization across Outlook and CRM
  • Structured, measurable and compliant advisory flow

Pains Solved

  • Time-consuming, fragmented meeting preparation and follow-up
  • Generic, inside-out customer presentations that fail to engage
  • Delayed or missing post-meeting summaries and next steps
  • Reactive instead of proactive advisory approach

items.summary: "The Nous AI Suite offers impactful AI solutions, transforming industries with innovation. Rapidly embrace AI with our five pillar offerings, turning ideas into tangible business value."
items.description:
Comprehensive AI Solution Framework

Landing Zone Overview:

The 'House of AI' landing zone provides a comprehensive framework for organizations to adopt and implement AI solutions on Microsoft Azure effectively. Nous’s professional services are designed to help customers get started or extend their use of Azure by offering expert guidance, tailored assessments, and hands-on support throughout the AI adoption process providing the necessary expertise and capabilities, from initial assessment and architecture planning to deployment and ongoing optimization, ensuring organizations can fully leverage Azure’s AI and cloud services for a successful AI journey

Our consulting services help customers get started with or expand their use of Microsoft Azure by providing the expertise and capabilities needed for successful AI adoption

Benefits of Using the Landing Zone:

  • Accelerated AI Adoption: Provides a structured framework for rapid and effective AI implementation.
  • Risk Mitigation: Mitigates potential risks associated with AI adoption, such as technical challenges and governance issues.
  • Enhanced Business Outcomes: Delivers tangible benefits, including increased efficiency, reduced costs, and improved decision-making.
  • Tailored Approach: Offers flexibility to choose individual components or the complete "House of AI" package based on organizational needs.

AI Readiness Assessment:

Activities:

  • Evaluate the organization's current AI maturity, including data infrastructure, existing ML models, and alignment with business objectives.
  • Identify key pain points and opportunities for AI-driven improvements.

Business Outcomes:

  • Measures the alignment of your IT infrastructure with AI adoption requirements.
  • Potential improvement in KPIs such as efficiency, productivity, or customer satisfaction after AI implementation.

AI Strategy & Planning:

Activities:

  • Develop a comprehensive AI strategy & governance framework, outlining how to leverage AI technologies to achieve strategic business goals.
  • Create a detailed implementation roadmap, specifying AI model development, deployment timelines, and resource allocation.

Business Outcomes:

  • Establish a clear roadmap and identify opportunities for AI-driven automation and process improvements, leading to increased efficiency and reduced operational costs.
  • Develop strategies to manage and mitigate risks associated with AI adoption, ensuring secure and compliant AI deployment.

AI Solution Design & Development:

Activities:

  • Architect and develop AI models and solutions tailored to the organization's specific needs.
  • Finalize AI model design, data pipelines, technical specifications, and workflows, ensuring readiness for deployment.

Business Outcomes:

  • 30% reduction in potential development risks by identifying and addressing technical challenges early in the design phase.
  • Accelerated Time-to-Market in Development and Deployment phase.

AI Implementation & Deployment:

Activities:

  • Execute the AI strategy by deploying AI models and integrating them into existing systems.
  • Ensure seamless deployment of AI solutions with a focus on performance, scalability, and compliance.

Business Outcomes:

  • Benefit from clear, quantifiable improvements in productivity, cost savings, and customer satisfaction for a strong return on investment.
  • 15% reduction in operational costs by automating routine tasks and optimizing processes with AI.

Post-Implementation AI Support & Monitoring:

Activities:

  • Provide continuous support for deployed AI models, including performance monitoring, retraining, and optimization.
  • Implement robust monitoring frameworks to ensure AI models remain effective, accurate, and aligned with business objectives over time.

Business Outcomes:

  • Ensure continuous optimization of AI solutions, adapting to new data and needs.
  • Maximizes the long-term value and impact of your AI investments, ensuring ongoing organizational benefits.

Engagement Model

Whether you are looking to enhance specific areas with individual components or harness the full capabilities of a complete AI package with “House of AI,” the choice is yours. Tailor your AI journey by selecting the offers that meet the best needs of your organization, or unlock your full potential by opting for our all-inclusive package.

items.summary: ‘Secure Multi-Cloud Environments’ Workshop is designed to get a customized threat and vulnerability analysis of your hybrid and multicloud environment, with Microsoft Defender for Cloud + E-Visor.
items.description:
The 'Secure Multi-Cloud Environments' Workshop is an engagement that helps you assess your security landscape, address your most pressing security goals and challenges, and provide an immersive experience that brings the Microsoft security vision and capabilities to life, by using Microsoft Defender for Cloud to discover threats and security vulnerabilities affecting hybrid and multi-cloud workloads.

In this workshop, we will dive into the technologies and strategies needed to create a secure multi-cloud infrastructure, enhanced by advanced technologies like Microsoft Defender for Cloud. Whether you are an IT professional, a cloud architect, or simply interested to improving your multi-cloud security posture, this workshop is aimed at providing valuable insights and recommendations.

This workshop is held online and led by our security experts, who will guide you step-by-step in the implementation of Microsoft Defender for Cloud features. This one-to-one format provides ample time for questions, use cases discussion, and personalized recommendations according to your requirements and best practices to get the most out of these security solutions, and, at the end of the workshop, you will receive a complete report of findings, recommendations, and next steps.

Benefits for your organization: • Threat and vulnerability analysis of your hybrid and multi-cloud environment. • Learn how to build a more robust cloud security system. • Prioritize and mitigate potential threats, while reducing the attack surface area. • Define next steps based on your needs.

The workshop is composed of 4 phases:

PHASE 1: Validate and enable Microsoft Defender for Cloud according to your Azure subscription status.

PHASE 2: Activate the solution and enable Amazon Web Services and Google Cloud Platform connectors.

PHASE 3: Data collection, analysis, and correlation.

PHASE 4: Disable Microsoft Defender for Cloud components and generate the final report.

WHAT WILL YOU RECEIVE AT THE END OF THE WORKSHOP? Synergy Advisors has developed a new version of its E-Visor solution to provide you with a complete report that shows you enriched analytics through correlation of data resulting from discoveries made by Microsoft Defender for Cloud during the assessment.

Through 'E-Visor for Microsoft Defender for Cloud' you will have different views to control:

  • Active and scanned subscriptions.

  • Active alerts in the Microsoft Defender for Cloud portal.

  • Active alerts categorized by high, low, and medium severity levels.

  • Affected resources and locations.

  • Secure Score to help you improve the security posture of Azure resources, hybrid workloads, and multi-cloud environments.

  • Total evaluated resources.

  • Total recommendations provided by Microsoft Defender for Cloud to enhance the security of affected resources.

  • Detailed information about the generated alerts.

  • Table of global recommendations from Microsoft Defender for Cloud for the entire tenant.

  • Insights into your compliance posture based on how you are meeting specific compliance requirements.

items.summary: 10-Day 'veni, vidi, vici' package to conquer Microsoft Power BI and improve your data experience!
items.description:
10-Day 'veni, vidi, vici' package to conquer PowerBI.

In your life you are guided by confidence and your business decisions turn into victories? You want the tool tailored to your needs and full knowledge how to use and develop it with time? This offer is dedicated to you! Veni, vidi, vici - 'I came, I saw, I conquered' - 3 steps to quick victory on the market you are interested in.

Veni - is the first step when you come to us for the pre-implementation analysis. Thanks to it you will get the full picture of implementation with recommendation and requirements. Vidi - is the second step when you see your Power BI system working - the result of our Proof of Concept implementation. Vici - last but not least step when you conquer Power BI by undergoing dedicated training based on your data in your Power BI reporting system.

The scope of the analysis (2 days of the Veni, vidi, vici package):

  • 2-day pre-implementation analysis covering up to 4 areas within company, completed by providing documentation of the work carried out together with the Power BI implementation plan report and the required system architecture.

*the exact schedule of the pre-implementation analysis divided into areas will be agreed with the Client before the implementation date.

The scope of the Proof of Concept (6 days of the Veni, vidi, vici package):

  • 6-day implementation based on analysis and materials provided, required to build significant part of the entire system. This stage would show effectiveness of EBIS employees and how much of the fully productive system can be completed within a given period.

The scope of the workshops:

  • (2 days of the Veni, vidi, vici package)

  • Analysis of problems in currently existing models

  • Creating reports and dashboards - advanced methods

  • Power BI administration - groups, sharing reports

  • Data modeling

  • Power BI solution architecture

  • Work on Power BI models currently existing at the Client's Company - problem solving

items.longSummary: Covid-safe workspace and meeting scheduling solution
items.description:
Reassure both employers and employees that their working environment is safe.

‘Where’s Free?’ extends the capabilities of MS Outlook, making it easier to arrange meetings, book rooms and find desks. In combination with a Real Time Locating System, it is also able to provide employers and employees with comprehensive visibility of ‘Where’s safe?’ in the new workplace.

Key benefits (‘Where’s Free?’ standalone)
• At a glance visibility of room and desk availability and quick scheduling
• ‘When’s Good?’ intelligent computation of optimum times to hold meetings based on people and room availability
• Desk and room availability removal/enablement to implement social distancing and sanitising schedules
• Space usage analytics
• Support for ’hoteling’ models in which the workplace is shared by members of multiple organisations 

Key benefits (Real Time Locating System standalone)
• Proximity logging providing notification of social distance breaches and their durations with a high degree of reliability
• Geo-fencing to demark sensitive/restricted areas – valuable if operating ’hotelling’ and/or ‘Office Airbnb’ models in the workplace

Key benefits (‘Where’s Free?’ in combination with Real Time Locating System)
• all standalone benefits for both systems (listed above) plus:
o Real-time visibility of social distance breaches
o Historic reporting of social distance breaches
o Auto-cancellation if ‘no show’ bookings
o Auto-curtailment of bookings where the meeting finishes ahead of its scheduled end-time

items.longSummary: A Generative AI chatbot that analyzes an utility bill and explains its cost components on the spot
items.description:
30-50% of incoming calls from citizens to Customer Service Representatives at a utility are related to bill inquiries.

To increase CSR productivity we developped a conversational chatbot that analyzes a customer bill on the spot. The chatbot analyzes consumption, billing and payment data of the customer and presents the analysis in an easy summarization. It provides detailed insights into the factors contributing to higher bills.

Key Features:

  • Comprehensive analysis of billing data to identify cost drivers.
  • Clear explanations on the spot
  • Personalized recommendations to reduce future billing discrepancies.

For more questions please contact us.
This application is only available in English.
 

https://www.wetransact.io/

plans.description: Itineris software private plan for Microsoft customers. Contact us directly at ruben.pot@itineris.net to make sure you benefit from the best pricing options.
Private plan for why is my bill high chatbot for BWSC

items.longSummary: Resolving Business Critical AI use cases for SMBs with pre-canned technology
items.description:
Karolium AIPaaS platform bolted with integration layer, advanced modeling, governance and continuous orchestration capabilities. Whether you need predictive analytics, NLP, or computer vision, our zero-code platform allows you to build and deploy AI models effortlessly that align with your business goals.

Key features of Karolium AIPaaS package includes:
  • Data Preparation, Enrichment & Quality Analysis
  • Data Pre-processing & Exploration
  • Data Lake
  • AI Modeling
  • Explainable AI (xAI)
  • Real-time Model Scoring
  • Unlimited AI Scenario planning
  • Hyperparameter Tuning
  • Model Management and Evaluation
  • AI Model Building
  • Analytics Automation
  • Generative AI

Why Choose Karolium AIPaaS?
  • Run, Monitor & Automate the entire AI Lifecycle
  • Save Time Without MLOps
  • Flexible AI Building Blocks
  • Pre-canned Solutions
  • Gain Deep Modeling Insights
  • Immediate ROI with Embedded Decision Optimization
  • Improved Governance & Control
  • Availability of 3rd-Party Resources
  • End-User Training
  • Free add-ons: iPaaS, aPaaS & SCMPaaS

items.summary: Wir ermöglichen den Hybrid Workspace durch Zugriff auf Ihren Desktop und Ihre Anwendungen von überall aus!
items.description:
In einer hochgradig vernetzten Welt, in der Ihre Mitarbeiter oft unterwegs sind und Flexibilität in ihren Arbeitsabläufen benötigen, ist der Zugriff auf lokale Unternehmensdaten, ein großes Sicherheitsproblem. Azure Virtual Desktop (AVD) ist in wenigen Minuten einsatzbereit und ermöglicht sicheres Remotearbeiten in einer vertrauten Windows 10/11 Umgebung. Systemadministratoren können Desktops, Apps und Windows-Server in Azure schnell bereitstellen und verwalten. Dadurch können Kosten gespart und vorhandene Lizenzen wiederverwendet werden. Die komplette Verwaltung und Bereitstellung von AVD kann über das Azure-Portal erfolgen. Mit AVD kann Ihr Unternehmen Ihre Virtualisierungsanforderungen nahtlos skalieren und gleichzeitig von den zahlreichen Sicherheitsfunktionen von Azure profitieren. Lösen Sie Ihre bestehende VDI Umgebung ab und erleichtern Sie Ihren IT-Spezialisten die Arbeit. Damit diese sich auf die wichtigen Themen in Ihrem Unternehmen konzentrieren können. Mit AVD verlassen Ihre Daten nicht das Unternehmensnetzwerk und sind trotzdem bequem, in einer für Ihren Mitarbeiter vertrauten Umgebung, im Zugriff.

Invenate AVD Paket (5 Tage)
Tag 1
  • Kick-Off Workshop
  • AVD Grundlagen
  • Analyse der bestehenden Infrastruktur
  • Entwurf einer Landing Zone
  • Kostenkalkulation im Azure Preisrechner
Tag 2
  • Vorbereitung der Landing Zone
  • Aufbau der Landing Zone
Tag 3
  • Voraussetzungen der Clients schaffen
  • Implementierung der Pilotbereitstellung
Tag 4
  • Begleitung der Pilotbereitstellung
  • Übergabe der Landing Zone
Tag 5
  • Erstellung und Übergabe der Dokumentation

Nach der Übergabe wird die IT in die Lage versetzt die Umgebung eigenverantwortlich zu verwalten.

This application is available in the German language only!
Terms, conditions, and pricing are custom to each engagement!

items.summary: Wir ermöglichen den Hybrid Workspace durch Zugriff auf Ihren Desktop und Ihre Anwendungen von überall aus!
items.description:
In einer hochgradig vernetzten Welt, in der Ihre Mitarbeiter oft unterwegs sind, und Flexibilität in ihren Arbeitsabläufen benötigen, ist der Zugriff auf lokale Unternehmensdaten, und vor allem das Mitführen der Daten auf einem Notebook, ein großes Sicherheitsproblem. „Zugriff auf Ihren Desktop und Ihre Anwendungen von überall aus“, ist die kurze und prägnante Zusammenfassung für Azure Virtual Desktop (AVD). AVD ist in wenigen Minuten einsatzbereit und ermöglicht sicheres Remote Arbeiten in der vertrauten Windows 10 Umgebung. Systemadministratoren können Desktops, Apps und Windows-Server in Azure schnell bereitstellen und verwalten. Dadurch können Kosten gespart und vorhandene Lizenzen wiederverwendet werden. Die komplette Verwaltung und Bereitstellung von AVD kann über das Azure-Portal erfolgen. Mit AVD kann Ihr Unternehmen Ihre Virtualisierungsanforderungen nahtlos skalieren und gleichzeitig von den zahlreichen Sicherheitsfunktionen von Azure profitieren. Lösen Sie Ihre bestehende VDI Umgebung ab und erleichtern Sie Ihren IT-Spezialisten die Arbeit. Damit diese sich auf die wichtigen Themen in Ihrem Unternehmen konzentrieren können. Mit AVD verlassen Ihre Daten nicht das Unternehmensnetzwerk, und sind trotzdem bequem, in einer, für Ihren Mitarbeiter vertrauten, Umgebung im Zugriff.

Lassen Sie sich in einem unverbindlichen Telefonat von unserem Spezialisten darüber Beraten, welche Chancen Ihnen Azure Virtual Desktop (AVD) bietet.

Invenate Infocall (30- 60 Minuten):
  • Azure Virtual Desktop (AVD) Chancen und Vorraussetzungen

This application is available in the German language only!
Terms, conditions, and pricing are custom to each engagement!

items.summary: Migrate to VMware vSphere private clouds built on Azure
items.description:
VMware’s virtual compute, networking, and storage capabilities have provided familiar reliability, but the need for modern cloud services has grown. Modern organizations require greater elasticity, faster provisioning, flexible consumption models, broader scale, expanding geographic reach, and the lower TCO that comes when leveraging native cloud services for AI, analytics, and security. Bring the benefits of these worlds together by deploying your workloads into Azure leveraging 3Cloud and Azure VMware Solution (AVS).

Key Benefits: -Accelerated time to value leveraging existing VMware investments, skills, and tools, including VMware vSphere, vSAN, and vCenter. -Lower costs for Windows and SQL Server, and free extended security updates for older Windows and SQL Server versions. -Migration speed that turns weeks into days when migrating VMware resources into Azure. -Scale, automation, and fast provisioning for VMware workloads on Azure’s global infrastructure. -Lowest possible downtime when migrating resources from current VMware environments to Azure. -Lower TCO compared to on-premise datacenters, with a higher consolidation ratio running vSphere in the cloud. -A single pane of glass to manage vSphere-based and Azure native VMs. -A seamless VMware migration to Azure with 3Cloud, a multiple Microsoft ‘Partner of the Year’ award winner

Popular Use Cases: -Cloud Migration (Rapidly mitigate unforeseen datacenter exits. Transition CapEx to OpEx. Adhere to corporate mandates on cloud migration. Increase uptime of core business functions.) -Datacenter Extension (On-demand capacity for planned or unplanned spikes. Provision/de-provision non-production environments. Provision/de-provision environments for specific projects. Get extended support for legacy Microsoft environments.) -Virtual Desktops in the Cloud (Quickly grow or shrink remote desktop populations. Shorten desktop and cloud applications physical proximity.) -Disaster Recovery (Add sites for both virtual desktop and server environments.)

items.longSummary: Modernisez la sécurité et la sauvegarde de vos clients grâce à la cyberprotection intégrée
items.description:
Acronis Cyber Protect Cloud intègre en une solution unique des fonctionnalités essentielles telles que la sauvegarde, la protection antivirus, la protection anti-malware nouvelle génération pilotée par l'IA et la gestion de la protection des terminaux. Son intégration et ses capacités d'automatisation facilitent le travail des fournisseurs de services en réduisant la complexité, en augmentant la productivité et en diminuant les coûts d'exploitation.

La meilleure solution de sauvegarde et de restauration : sauvegarde et restauration de fichiers individuels et d'images complètes de systèmes permettant de protéger les ressources sur plus de 25 plates-formes, avec des objectifs de délai de reprise (RTO) et de point de reprise (RPO) très courts.

Une cyberprotection essentielle, sans frais : Moteur d'analyse comportementale de pointe piloté par l'intelligence artificielle permettant la neutralisation des malwares, des ransomwares et des attaques zero-day au niveau des ressources des clients.

Gestion de la protection conçue pour les MSP : intégration de fonctionnalités de protection des données, de cybersécurité et de gestion des terminaux en une solution unique avec console de gestion centralisée. Intégration transparente avec les systèmes RMM et PSA.

items.longSummary: Smarter decisions. Sharper insights. Better returns.
items.description:
Transform investment decision-making with our AI-driven intelligence platform. (In)Alpha uncovers hidden patterns and insights from vast volumes of unstructured data, enabling faster, more informed investment decisions while reducing biases and maximizing returns.
Institutional investors face constant challenges navigating large volumes of siloed data and subjective analysis under tight deadlines. Our solution unifies your data, eliminates inefficiencies, and delivers clear, actionable insights that support the Investment Committee’s go/no-go decisions and enhance Investment Managers’ efficiency.
With (In)Alpha, gain confidence in your investment strategy through comprehensive analysis that turns complex information into strategic advantage, ensuring you never miss valuable opportunities and consistently make smarter investment decisions.

Key Features
  • AI-Driven Sourcing: Uncover Hidden Opportunities and Maximize High-Quality Deal Flow.
  • AI-Powered Screening: Quickly Target High-Quality Investments and Reduce Screening Time.
  • AI-Enabled Due Diligence: Mitigate Risk, Enhance Compliance, and Maximize Deal Value.
  • Investment Committee: AI Insights for Confident Decision-Making & Strategic Investment Choices by Streamlining Investment Committee Processes.
  • AI-Driven Portfolio Management: Proactive Monitoring, Risk Mitigation, and Value Creation.
  • AI-Driven Macro Insights: Anticipate Market Shifts and Inform Investment Strategy.

plans.description: Please contact us at sales@inceptionai.ai for pricing options

items.longSummary: Elevate every customer interaction with AI
items.description:
Transform the way employees handle daily tasks by integrating speed, intelligence, and automation into every workflow. Our no-code platform is built to increase employee productivity through a suite of prebuilt, AI-powered workflows that simplify and accelerate work processes.

Quickly search for and access information, generate and personalize content, summarize complex data, and automate repetitive or time-consuming tasks without any need to write code. Unlock immediate value with prebuilt AI capabilities that are quick to deploy—empowering every team to build and launch their own solutions, fostering a culture of innovation and continuous growth.

Key Features:
Intelligent Orchestrator
Our platform works seamlessly across desktop, mobile, and can be embedded directly into enterprise applications. It maintains full context across complex workflows and coordinates multiple specialized AI agents to work together effortlessly.

Smart Enterprise Search
Our RAG-based architecture provides access to knowledge from both structured and unstructured sources, delivering context-aware, personalized
answers that understand user intent and business language.

Pre-Built Agents
Access a library of 150+ AI agents designed to integrate seamlessly with enterprise systems and automate key HR and IT tasks. Ready to deploy across your business applications, this agent workforce accelerates automation and boosts operational efficiency.

AI Agent Builders
Enable teams to create and deploy AI agents across the organization. Streamline workflows by orchestrating multiple AI agents for task execution and knowledge access, operating either autonomously or with Human-in-the-Loop involvement.

Enterprise-grade Security & Control
Built-in AI guardrails, robust security protocols, and privacy safeguards ensure compliance with standards like GDPR and HIPAA, while also enforcing your organization’s business rules.

Integrations
Connect instantly with 100+ prebuilt connectors that integrate effortlessly with leading enterprise systems, including CRM, HCM, ERP, knowledge management, and customer engagement platforms.

plans.description: Please contact us at sales@inceptionai.ai for pricing options

items.longSummary: Complex workflows made simple with AI
items.description:
(In)Business Process empowers you to rapidly build and launch AI-driven applications that simplify even your most complex workflows, making automation faster and easier than ever before.

Transform how you automate knowledge-intensive business processes with intelligent, no-code AI agents. Deploy AI agents across any model, whether commercial, open-source, or custom, and in any cloud environment for full flexibility.

With enterprise guardrails, a centralized management interface, and built-in regulatory compliance, you can automate confidently and securely. Streamline operations, reduce manual work, and eliminate inefficiencies in processes that were once too complex to automate.

Key Features
No-code agent builder
Design, test, and deploy AI agents rapidly without writing a single line of code.

Multi-agent Orchestration
Scale operations using AI agents that can perform tasks autonomously or with human-in-the-loop approvals.

100+ Pre-built Integrations
Instantly connect AI capabilities to enterprise systems using prebuilt integrations.

Performance Optimization
Continuously monitor, refine, and optimize AI agent performance throughout the development process.

Pre-built Prompt Library
Customize AI agent behavior to fit your unique business needs using 75+ prebuilt templates and fine-tuning tools, without any heavy development resources.

items.longSummary: Pull your Chronograph data into Excel in realtime.
items.description:
Please note that this application is now in legacy status and may no longer receive updates, bug fixes, or technical support going forward. Please use our updated application, Chronograph xConnectJS.

Chronograph xConnect provides clients of Chronograph with an intuitive interface through which to access their database, and find investment entities and their attributes within Excel.

FIND AN ENTITY

Using the “Find an Entity” tool, clients can search their whole database to find companies, fund commitments, or other investments easily. Helpful tools and descriptions make choosing the correct entity simple. When an entity is selected, users can easily insert that entity’s ID into Excel, or can continue to construct a formula using that entity.

FIND AN ATTRIBUTE

Chronograph captures all of the data related to your investments, and the “Find an Attribute” tool makes searching and browsing those data points fast and easy. The list of available attributes automatically updates based on the currently selected entity, or conversely shows the entities on which an attribute is available. Selected attributes can be inserted directly into Excel, or can be used in the Formula Builder.

FORMULA BUILDER

The “Formula Builder” automatically updates as you select entities and attributes, and guides users to the parameters required by each attribute (e.g. date, period, currency). Users can test formulae without entering each formula into Excel, or can insert the pre-constructed formula directly into the active cell.

ABOUT CHRONOGRAPH

Chronograph provides cloud-based analytics, data management, and collaboration tools for private equity investors. For more information or to request a demo, please visit https://www.chronograph.pe/.

Note: Chronograph xConnect is a tool intended for use by clients of Chronograph alongside Chronograph’s xConnect Functions (distributed separately), and requires a valid Chronograph account.

Using the “Find an Entity” tool, clients can search their whole database to find companies, fund commitments, or other investments easily. Helpful tools and descriptions make choosing the correct entity simple. When an entity is selected, users can easily insert that entity’s ID into Excel, or can continue to construct a formula using that entity.

FIND AN ATTRIBUTE

Chronograph captures all of the data related to your investments, and the “Find an Attribute” tool makes searching and browsing those data points fast and easy. The list of available attributes automatically updates based on the currently selected entity, or conversely shows the entities on which an attribute is available. Selected attributes can be inserted directly into Excel, or can be used in the Formula Builder.

FORMULA BUILDER

The “Formula Builder” automatically updates as you select entities and attributes, and guides users to the parameters required by each attribute (e.g. date, period, currency). Users can test formulae without entering each formula into Excel, or can insert the pre-constructed formula directly into the active cell.

ABOUT CHRONOGRAPH

Chronograph provides cloud-based analytics, data management, and collaboration tools for private equity investors. For more information or to request a demo, please visit https://www.chronograph.pe/.

Note: Chronograph xConnect is a tool intended for use by clients of Chronograph alongside Chronograph’s xConnect Functions (distributed separately), and requires a valid Chronograph account.

items.displayName: (Outsmart Health) Cancercare Follow up and Management
items.longSummary: Improving cancer surveillance for better life.
items.description:
Cancercare Follow-up and Management (CFAM) is a holistic solution co-developed together with a leading Nordic university hospital and it’s oncologists and cancercare nurses. CFAM is a holistic solution that automates the management and execution of breast cancer follow-up. Ultimate goal for Digital Workforce when developing this solution was to provide our client with a solution that ensures that right things happen at the right time to the right patients – without human involvement.

We are extremely pleased to present our solution to the wider audience, and more importantly, give wider audience access to our solution in order to support your patients. Patients will be assured of consistent quality follow-up according to a defined protocol throughout their follow-up journey. CFAM allows providers to improve breast cancer surveillance based on patient preferences, new treatment practices or risk stratification, for example, by creating new care pathways. The benefits of our solution include patient safety, consistent care, transparency of monitoring, and the elimination of manual human resources in the areas where solution applies.

The solution provides oncology and breast cancer physicians, nurses and other stakeholders with a real-time view of the progress of planned care path for a patient group as well as enabling data management and data utilization in cancer care research.

Key KPIs to impact based on the first deployment:

  • Number of manual tasks handled by clinicians.
  • Visit wait-times
  • Patient satisfaction
  • % of patients using digital channels
  • Time for result to patient notification
  • Oncologist time used with patients (for those needing it the most)

items.longSummary: A suite of digital tools designed to enhance the quality of life in (r)urban areas.
items.description:
A suite of digital tools designed to enhance the quality of life in urban and rural areas.

The (r)urban platform revolutionizes community living with a suite of digital tools designed to enhance the quality of life in urban and rural areas. From real-time traffic analysis to smart waste management, our platform supports sustainable development and efficient resource management, ensuring a greener and more connected community.

Developed in collaboration with public administrations across Europe, leveraging experience from many pilot deployments, the (r)urban platform is adaptable to diverse community needs and integrates seamlessly with existing systems.

The platform integrates a variety of smart city solutions to enhance operational efficiency and citizen engagement. It includes comprehensive City Infrastructure Management, which leverages IoT sensors for real-time asset tracking and predictive maintenance, extending the lifespan of critical infrastructure. Our Display and Facility Management tools streamline content delivery and automate maintenance tasks, reducing downtime and operational costs. To optimize urban mobility, our AI-powered traffic management solutions—such as Real-time Traffic Analysis and Parking Monitoring—improve traffic flow and resource management, leading to reduced congestion and increased road safety. In addition, the platform offers proactive environmental monitoring through systems that assess air, soil, water, and noise quality. Citizen engagement is enhanced with the City Co-Pilot, an AI-driven tool that provides easy access to city services and information through an AI Chatbot, fostering active participation in local governance. Furthermore, our AgriFood Solutions support sustainable farming by integrating Precision Agriculture Tools with a Local Marketplace, allowing farmers to monitor crop health and connect directly with consumers, thereby strengthening local economies and promoting rural-urban linkages. Last, but not least, the Local Enterprise solution promotes entrepreneurship and community involvement, building stronger connections between citizens, businesses, and local governments.
