items.longSummary: Digital healthcare solutions for hospitals, clinics, and other healthcare facilities
items.description:
+Doctor Practice and Clinic Management Software is tailor-made to address your specific needs according to your specialization helping all Medical Practitioners to build and grow their private practice. +Doctor is well-integrated and intelligent software connecting the dots between Patient, Staff and Medical Practitioners. +Doctor allows you to nurture meaningful patient relationships while building a sustainable and financially-viable private physician practice.

Best Features

  • Appointment and scheduling : Easily create new appointments and avoid schedule conflicts. Manage multiple appointments for practitioners who can see more than one patient at a time. Set recurring appointments and view or edit schedules for patients and therapists effortlessly.

  • Patient management : Our software offers a user-friendly patient administration dashboard that provides a summary of patient details, giving consultants a quick overview. This digital patient database includes essential information with clickable functionality for detailed descriptions. Access patient information, appointments, diagnosis details, notes, treatment specialist names, treatments, insurance, referral codes, and more.

  • Invoices and billing : Automatically generate invoices or treatment receipts after consultations. The system manages appointment information, sorts it, and archives it in the patient electronic and accounting interface. Create and dispatch invoices directly to patients seamlessly. Filter invoices by attending practitioners, insurance, date range, and invoice number for convenience.

  • Reports generation : Avoid redundant or misplaced patient records and documents. +Doctor Healthcare software ensures no loss of documents by generating electronic records that are easily stored, backed up, and synced.

  • Custom configuration : This module helps practitioners keep detailed information about patients and the therapies provided.

Some other attractive features of this Physiotherapy software include -

  • Patient - Doctor's information : Stores and manages detailed profiles of patients and doctors for seamless interaction and record-keeping.

  • Treatments & Rates : Maintains a catalog of available treatments with corresponding pricing for easy billing and transparency.

  • EHR Security : Ensures the protection of Electronic Health Records (EHR) with secure access and compliance with privacy regulations.

  • Diagnosis Reports : Allows practitioners to generate, store, and access patient diagnosis reports for better treatment tracking.

  • Locations setting : Supports multiple clinic locations, enabling practitioners to manage operations across different sites.

  • Policy Management : Helps define and enforce clinic policies, including treatment guidelines, cancellations, and payment terms.

items.longSummary: Clinic management software development for Patient Appointment and Physiotherapists
items.description:
+Physio is a comprehensive, reliable Physical Therapy software that streamlines the entire workflow, and offers several benefits for physiotherapists including swift, secure access to operations at any time, seamlessly integrate appointment scheduling, clinical workflow, patient engagement, invoices, and billing. Thus, ensures you get the best returns for your clinic.

Best Features

  • Appointment and Scheduling : Create a new appointment easily and quickly. It automatically prevents schedule clashes and manages to schedule multiple appointments for practitioners who can see more than one patient at a time. With this ERP for doctors, set recurring patient appointments, and easily view and edit schedules of patients and therapists.

  • Patient Management : Our Physiotherapy software provides a simple yet flexible patient administration dashboard. It gives a summary of the patient’s details, that briefs the consultant about the patient at a glance. This digital patient database has all the essential information of a patient entered with a clickable functionality, that can redirect the user to a more detailed description of the patient’s information. The user can thus access patient information, appointments, diagnosis details, patient notes, treatment specialist’s name, treatment, insurance, referral code, etc

  • Invoices and Billing : After consultation, the user/physiotherapist can automatically generate invoices or treatment receipts. The system itself manages the appointment information, sorts it, and archives it in the patient electronic and accounting interface. All the invoices can be created and dispatched directly to the patient seamlessly.The software also has other filter options to filter invoices as per the attending physiotherapists, Insurance, Invoice date range, and Invoice range number which are displayed for your convenience

  • Reports Generation : A common problem faced by most physiotherapists today is redundant or misplaced Patient records and/or documents. +Physio Healthcare software ensures that there is no loss of documents or records by keeping patient information and generating electronic documents that are easily stored, backed up, and synced

  • Custom configuration : This setup and administration module aid the physiotherapists to keep detailed information about the patient and the therapies provided to that particular patient.

    Some other attractive features of this Physiotherapy software include -

    Patient - Doctor's information

    Treatments & Rates

    EHR Security

    Diagnosis Reports

    Locations setting

    Policy Management

items.publisherDisplayName: Tecnología de la Información Achalay C.A.
items.summary: Diagnóstico, Consultoría especializada, implementación de Microsoft 365 y acompañamiento en la Gestión de Cambio para habilitar la oficina híbrida en tu empresa en tres etapas. Se +digital
items.description:
+digital es un conjunto de servicios de implementación y de consultoría organizacional, técnica y de aprendizaje para que puedas sacar el máximo provecho de todos los productos que incluye tu suscripción de Microsoft 365, de esta forma habilitamos tu oficina híbrida, logrando la verdadera transformación digital de tu empresa.

+digital es un servicio diseñado para organizaciones del segmento SMB en países de habla hispana. Fue concebido para ser ejecutado de manera remota, asistida y en 3 etapas (juntas o por separado):

  1. Inicio: sienta los principios de la oficina híbrida en tu empresa, además de implementar Microsoft 365 y habilitar a tus equipos para trabajar de forma segura en su nueva oficina en la nube, los guiamos en la adopción de esta nueva forma de trabajo (Correo, Teams, compartir y colaborar). Incluye diagnóstico de la plataforma TI y consultoría.
  2. Despegue: si ya iniciaste tu oficina en la nube es hora de que tus usuarios comiencen a llevar su trabajo al área digital automatizando varias de sus tareas cotidianas. Activa herramientas que facilitan el seguimiento y control de lo que hacen tus colaboradores. Preparamos a tus equipos de productos, mercadeo, ventas y recursos humanos para presentar y compartir contenidos en formato web como catálogos, presentaciones, boletines, eventos en vivo y más.
  3. Oficina Híbrida: alcanza el máximo nivel de digitalización al activar una intranet básica, tu canal interno de grabaciones de audio y video de reuniones, talleres, cursos y más y, finalmente, tu propia red social que armonizará la interacción de tus colaboradores en un ambiente distendido y social.

+digital incluye evaluación técnica, configuraciones, presentaciones, talleres, manuales, videos y más que te permitirán exprimir Microsoft 365. Todas las etapas prevén el acompañamiento para la Gestión del Cambio. Usamos metodología SCRUM y buenas prácticas apalancadas en 44 años de experiencia

Esta oferta solo está disponible en idioma español.

items.summary: .NET 6 with NGINX on Ubuntu 22.04 LTS, .NET Runtime on Ubuntu
items.description:
Deliver applications with performance, reliability, security, and scale with NGINX Plus on Azure. Deploy quickly and cost-effectively, and benefit from speeds <30ms. NGINX plus is the all-in-one—yet surprisingly lightweight—load balancer, reverse proxy, API gateway and content cache.

Looking for additional security and compliance for your Linux production environment? Then look no further.

Why use Ntegral Certified Apps?

Ntegral certified images are always up-to-date, secure, and built to work right out of the box.

Ntegral packages applications following industry standards, and continuously monitors all components and libraries for vulnerabilities and application updates. When any security threat or update is identified, Ntegral automatically repackages the applications and pushes the latest versions to the cloud marketplaces.

No contract needed: pay per hour

Disclaimer: The respective trademarks mentioned in the offering are owned by the respective companies. We do not provide commercial license of any of these products. Many of the products have a, demo or Open Source license as applicable.

items.longSummary: .NET 8 with Visual Studio Code on Windows Server 2019 offers a robust and flexible development environment for creating modern applications across various platforms.
items.summary: Powerful and flexible development environment to create modern applications.
items.description:
This Virtual Machine comes pre-installed with .NET 8 with Visual Studio Code on Windows Server 2019.

.NET 8 with Visual Studio Code on Windows Server 2019 provides developers with a robust and versatile environment for creating a wide range of modern applications. This powerful combination leverages the latest advancements in the .NET framework alongside a lightweight, highly customizable code editor, enabling seamless development across various platforms.

.NET 8: As the latest version of Microsoft’s open-source framework, .NET 8 brings substantial improvements in performance, security, and developer productivity. Visual Studio Code: This widely-used code editor is celebrated for its speed and versatility. With a robust ecosystem of extensions, it supports multiple programming languages and frameworks, making it an excellent choice for .NET development.

Why Choose Nuvemnest ?

At Nuvemnest, we understand that in today’s fast-paced digital landscape, having a robust and scalable IT infrastructure is crucial. As a result, we provide specialized solutions in the form of Azure Virtual Machines, which are designed to transform the way your business operates in the cloud. Our expert team, armed with extensive experience and a thorough understanding of cloud computing, is committed to providing you with Microsoft Azure Virtual Machine services that not only meet but also exceed your expectations.

  • Expertise That Matters - We bring years of experience in cloud computing and Azure solutions to the table, as well as unparalleled expertise. We have a dedicated team of experts who are passionate about providing exceptional services to our customers.
  • Customer-Centric Approach - Our ultimate goal is your satisfaction. We collaborate with you closely to understand your needs and preferences to deliver solutions that not only meet but exceed your expectations. We prioritize your needs and make certain that our services are perfectly aligned with your business objectives.
  • Future-Ready Technology - It is crucial to stay ahead of the technology curve. Our solutions are built on top-notch technology which makes sure that your business is future-ready. We implement the latest advancements into your VMs thus enhancing adaptability and sustainability.

We do not offer commercial licenses for any of these products. All brand names, product names, and trademarks belong to their respective owners.

items.summary: In this 2-week assessment, Insight technical experts will work with the client to evaluate .NET solutions to determine how well they adhere to best practices while identifying areas for improvement.
items.description:
Make developer efforts within Microsoft Azure more productive with this assessment designed to help organizations optimize .NET solutions for enterprise software development within the Azure environment. This assessment identifies areas in which your .NET solution can be realigned to best practices, providing guidance and/or validation of your priorities for strengthening your .NET solution implementation.

WHAT TO EXPECT: Our team’s close relationship with Microsoft and in-depth knowledge of both Azure and .NET will help you extend the value you your developers can achieve from your Azure environment by optimizing your .NET approach to align with Microsoft Azure consumption and capabilities. This assessment provides recommendations that will be prioritized in alignment with the organization’s goals and architectural guidance related to the solution’s inputs and outputs.

CLIENT PREP (before assessment begins)

  • Identify SMEs with detailed knowledge of application architectures, hardware/software dependencies, system dependencies, security, etc.
  • Collect available architecture diagrams and documentation
  • Prepare access to development environments, source code, & CI/CD pipelines, if available

PROJECT KICKOFF

  • Introductions & process overview
  • Initiation call with project sponsor and participants
  • Distribute application architecture questionnaire

ASSESSMENT

  • Evaluation of short-term and long-term goals
  • Analyze .NET code base and compare with best practices
  • Review business strategy & application questionnaires
  • Review architecture strategy related to .NET solutions

RECOMMENDATION REVIEW

  • Review recommendations and present next steps

PROJECT KICKOFF

  • Introductions & process overview
  • Initiation call with project sponsor and participants
  • Distribute application architecture questionnaire

ASSESSMENT

  • Evaluation of short-term and long-term goals
  • Analyze .NET code base and compare with best practices
  • Review business strategy & application questionnaires
  • Review architecture strategy related to .NET solutions

RECOMMENDATION REVIEW

  • Review recommendations and present next steps

items.summary: Code Review will assess your codebase for health and provide a report on required remediations before modernisation.
items.description:
Application Modernisation unlocks more advanced cloud capabilities such as increased business agility, global scale and improved resiliency of applications and services.

Code Review will assess your codebase for suitability for modernisation on Microsoft Azure including security, code quality, risks, opportunities and provide a report on required remediations before modernisation. These include code health, deprecated libraries, architecture, integration, scalability, maintainability and performance.

The outputs of the review are report document with findings, remediation recommendations (MoSCoW). This report will allow you to understand any remediations that need to be completed to ensure a successful App Modernisation to Microsoft Azure.

items.summary: Kin + Carta will assess the current state of your applications & software development processes to create a baseline that will help measure progress as you move forward to .NET App Modernization.
items.description:
Kin + Carta will assess the current state of your applications & software development processes to create a baseline that will help measure progress as you move forward to .NET App Modernization. We will help you create a plan you can actually implement that will meet your business goals.

Challenges:

  • Organizations have on-premises applications that would benefit from the rapid innovation, scalability, and reduced maintenance of the cloud but lack migration experience and how to best configure & maintain the Azure environments to support them.
  • Organizations understand the value of Platform-as-a-Service but lack the knowledge of how best to set up infrastructure-as-code and CI/CD pipelines that are efficient, secure, and enable rapid delivery of value.

Solution:

  • We will collaborate with your application stakeholders, IT organization, Security, Finance and Governance to identify apps that would benefit from a migration to Azure
  • We will recommend an architecture and tech stack that will meet the needs of your organization
  • We will create a scorecard that will show your maturity as a modern software development organization in comparison to industry standards that you can use a baseline to help identify gaps in your organization.
  • We will work with you to create a roadmap for migrating your applications and a playbook to migrate the first workload.

Assessment/Workshop Activities:

  • Walk through Azure Developer Velocity Assessment
  • Understand business goals
  • Understand current state processes and any existing integrations required on current Azure deployments.
  • Analyze app portfolio to identify & prioritize candidates to move to Azure App Services
  • Analyze & assess current DevOps & CloudNative development skills within team
  • Create alignment between business goals and app migration plan
  • Define measurable outcomes for application migration

DELIVERABLES

  • Assessment of Cloud-Native Maturity
  • Assessment of Application Estate
  • Identification of Gaps & Opportunities
  • Roadmap for Application Migration
  • MVP workload identified and playbook for moving to Azure
  • Outline approach to deployment options following Microsoft Best Practices

items.summary: This 3 stage modernisation service is for enterprise clients who have legacy .NET on-premise Apps and want to operate on Azure.
items.description:
Our .NET Centre of Excellence and our esteemed Microsoft Specialisation in Modernizing Enterprise Applications, highlights our dedication to meeting the rigorous requirements of the Microsoft Cloud Adoption Framework - to offer the absolute best possible service and experience to you.

Our Migration & Modernization strategies include:

  • Re-host: Migrate to a different platform without changes. No changes to the existing application.
  • Re-platform: Move to a new platform with minimal changes. If the application uses older .NET versions, you might consider upgrading to the latest .NET Core or .NET 5+ versions.
  • Re-factor: Rework or rewrite parts of the application. Refactor the App for true PaaS compatability e.g. with Container services with minimal changes to code.
  • Re-architect: Redesign the application's architecture. For complex applications, especially those originally built as monoliths, breaking them down into microservices can be beneficial for scalability and maintainability.
  • Rebuild: Completely rewrite the application. Especially useful if new requirements to cater for changing business needs.
  • Replace: Substitute with a modern off-the-shelf solution.

PROCESS OVERVIEW

Stage 1: Modernization Assessment & Design

What We Do: The application modernisation assessment process is a structured 8-step approach that begins with data gathering and inventorying. Intelligent tools are used to catalog and categorise applications, assessing their usage patterns, technology stacks, and relevance to different business units. This is followed by filtering redundant or outdated applications and using AI-powered tools for deep analysis, pinpointing performance bottlenecks and interdependencies. Engaging with stakeholders through interviews, the needs and challenges are captured, which helps in prioritising applications based on various criteria like business criticality, user engagement, and potential for modern improvements. Following this prioritisation, a pilot phase is initiated by selecting a diverse subset of applications to test modernisation strategies, ensuring their effectiveness and refining the approach as needed. The insights, findings, and recommendations are thoroughly documented, culminating in a comprehensive phased roadmap that charts out the journey for modernising the entire application portfolio. The design and planning phase for the selected in-scope applications, addresses architecture, scalability and security and selects the best modernisation approach such as Azure App Service, Container Apps and maps out DevOps practices.

What You Get:

  • Assessment Summary
  • Modernisation Strategy & Recommendations
  • Phased Roadmap for your unique modernisation journey

Stage 2: Modernization PoC

The next step is preparing and implementing the application for Modernization. This includes:

  • Setting up of the Environment: A dedicated Azure environment as your production environment, along with deployment checklists, testing and security assessments.
  • Modernization Implementation: Configuring the Azure Container architecture & refactor of the application, implementing DevOps and Security. Conducting regression testing and performance testing.
  • Validation of Business Benefits: Review cost/benefit (RoI & TCO). Submit the Application for user testing and feedback.

Stage 3: Post Modernization Cloud-Support-Services

The App can be either transitioned back to your IT team, Supported by OpenSky's dedicated support team or a Hybrid scenario.

  • Transition to in-house IT: Conduct knowledge transfer to your IT team
  • OpenSky Support: OpenSky's .NET Centre of Excellence is a hub of collaborative expertise encompassing a range of professionals - from certified developers who turn concepts into efficient, high-performing applications, to project managers who ensure timely and smooth project execution, achieving a 98% average SLA response rate. Our meticulous QA teams uphold rigorous standards, maintaining our ISO 20000, ISO 27001, and ISO 9001 accreditations, ensuring the highest quality outputs, while our data scientists harness advanced analytics to enhance .NET solutions' efficiency and innovation. Additionally, our business analysts bridge technical and business worlds, ensuring tailored solutions aligned with strategic objectives. This collective synergy drives unparalleled innovation and makes OpenSky a trusted name in .NET development.

Our Modernization PoC is priced at refactoring using Containers and is subject to scoping depending on actual application migration scenario to validate the pricing model.

items.summary: Accelerate Your .NET Application Modernization with Accolite
items.description:
Seamlessly Transition Your .NET Applications to the Cloud with Expert Guidance

In today's digital landscape, businesses are powered by robust applications. Yet, the maintenance of legacy applications consumes a significant portion of IT budgets, making it challenging to stay current with necessary upgrades and migrations. This often depletes resources before any tangible business benefits are realized. To thrive in the fast-paced business environment, applications require modernization to meet the evolving demands of the digital era. Accolite stands ready to guide your organization through the .NET application modernization journey, ensuring your applications are cloud-ready and aligned with your business and technology objectives.

Our Comprehensive Approach to Modernization.

Accolite offers a tailored approach to modernization, starting with a thorough Portfolio Assessment to review and create a strategic application disposition roadmap. Our services are designed to meet your organization at its current state and propel it towards achieving its future goals:

● Framework Modernization: Upgrade your .NET applications to the latest .NET Core technology.

● Legacy Platform Modernization: Transition to modern platforms such as .NET Core, .NET Core Blazor, and .NET MAUI.

● Monolith to Microservices: Apply the Strangler Fig pattern to methodically reduce risk and modernize your applications

● Customized Hosting Solutions: Design an optimal hosting strategy utilizing Azure App Service, Azure Container Apps, Azure Functions, AKS, and more.

Aligning with Microsoft’s Well-Architected Framework Our architecture designs are crafted to align with Microsoft’s Well-Architected Framework, focusing on the five pillars of Reliability, Security, Cost Optimization, Operational Excellence, and Performance Efficiency. This ensures that your applications are not only modernized but also optimized for the cloud environment.

.NET Application Modernization Assessment Accolite’s .NET Application Modernization Assessment is a cornerstone of our approach, offering:

● A detailed assessment of your current application landscape.

● A review of the current state architecture and a blueprint for the future state.

● A strategic plan to develop a proof of concept, demonstrating the value and effectiveness of the proposed modernization strategy.

By partnering with Accolite on your Azure migration journey, we commit to modernizing your .NET applications to accelerate your organization’s business objectives, leveraging our deep expertise and the latest technologies to ensure a seamless transition to the cloud.

Empowering Your Journey with Accolite Accolite is more than a service provider; we are your partner in innovation and growth. Our methodologies and solutions are designed to empower your organization, allowing you to focus on business growth while we handle the complexities of application modernization. Accolite brings a wealth of knowledge, specialized skills, and a commitment to excellence in every project. Our approach is not just about migrating and modernizing; it's about transforming your applications to be future-ready, ensuring they are scalable, secure, and aligned with your strategic goals. For a partnership that moves you forward, choose Accolite. Together, we will navigate the complexities of modernization, ensuring your .NET applications are primed for the cloud era. Visit us to learn more and embark on your modernization journey with confidence https://www.accolite.com/

Please note the price may vary based on scope of work.

items.summary: Accelerate Your .NET Application Modernization with Accolite
items.description:
Seamlessly Transition Your .NET Applications to the Cloud with Expert Guidance

In today's digital landscape, businesses are powered by robust applications. Yet, the maintenance of legacy applications consumes a significant portion of IT budgets, making it challenging to stay current with necessary upgrades and migrations. This often depletes resources before any tangible business benefits are realized. To thrive in the fast-paced business environment, applications require modernization to meet the evolving demands of the digital era. Accolite stands ready to guide your organization through the .NET application modernization journey, ensuring your applications are cloud-ready and aligned with your business and technology objectives.

Our Comprehensive Approach to Modernization.

Accolite offers a tailored approach to modernization, starting with a thorough Portfolio Assessment to review and create a strategic application disposition roadmap. Our services are designed to meet your organization at its current state and propel it towards achieving its future goals:

● Framework Modernization: Upgrade your .NET applications to the latest .NET Core technology.

● Legacy Platform Modernization: Transition to modern platforms such as .NET Core, .NET Core Blazor, and .NET MAUI.

● Monolith to Microservices: Apply the Strangler Fig pattern to methodically reduce risk and modernize your applications

● Customized Hosting Solutions: Design an optimal hosting strategy utilizing Azure App Service, Azure Container Apps, Azure Functions, AKS, and more.

Aligning with Microsoft’s Well-Architected Framework Our architecture designs are crafted to align with Microsoft’s Well-Architected Framework, focusing on the five pillars of Reliability, Security, Cost Optimization, Operational Excellence, and Performance Efficiency. This ensures that your applications are not only modernized but also optimized for the cloud environment.

.NET Application Modernization Assessment Accolite’s .NET Application Modernization Assessment is a cornerstone of our approach, offering:

● A detailed assessment of your current application landscape.

● A review of the current state architecture and a blueprint for the future state.

● A strategic plan to develop a proof of concept, demonstrating the value and effectiveness of the proposed modernization strategy.

By partnering with Accolite on your Azure migration journey, we commit to modernizing your .NET applications to accelerate your organization’s business objectives, leveraging our deep expertise and the latest technologies to ensure a seamless transition to the cloud.

items.summary: Discuss your legacy .NET application challenges and discover solutions to modernize your applications, improving performance, security, maintainability, and scalability.
items.description:
SSW's .NET Application Modernization Briefing offers an opportunity to discuss your legacy .NET application challenges with our expert consultants. Whether you're dealing with outdated technology, performance issues, security vulnerabilities, or scalability limitations, we offer tailored solutions using modern .NET and Azure technologies. In this 1-hour session, we'll discuss your specific needs, explore potential issues, and give advice on how you can modernize your applications.

Who Should Attend?

This briefing is ideal for CTOs, CIOs, IT managers, and senior developers who are looking to modernize their existing .NET applications to improve performance, security, and scalability.

Agenda

1. Introduction

  • Meet your SSW experts and introduce your team
  • Provide a brief overview of your current .NET applications and challenges

2. Problem Exploration
Discuss your application's pain points, focusing on:

  • Performance bottlenecks
  • Security vulnerabilities
  • Scalability limitations
  • Maintainability concerns
  • Outdated technology stack

We will ask targeted questions to better understand your current environment and identify areas for improvement.

3. Solution Proposals
Based on the discussion, we will suggest tailored modernization solutions, including:

  • Re-architecting applications using microservices and containers (Docker, Kubernetes)
  • Enhancing security measures with Entra ID, Key Vault, and other Azure security services
  • Improving performance and scalability with Azure App Services, SQL Database, and other cloud-native technologies
  • Leveraging DevOps practices for continuous integration and continuous deployment (CI/CD) pipelines
  • Migrating to the latest .NET versions and frameworks

We will explore how these solutions can be integrated with your existing systems to ensure seamless operation.

4. Q&A and Next Steps

  • Answer any remaining questions
  • Discuss next steps if you decide to proceed with our .NET Application Modernization Assessment or Implementation services

Benefits

  • Tailored to your needs: We focus on your specific application modernization challenges
  • Expert insights: Gain advice from consultants with extensive experience in .NET and Azure
  • Actionable outcomes: Leave with recommendations and next steps to modernize your .NET applications, ensuring they are secure, scalable, and maintainable for the future

items.summary: Upgrade your .NET application with our modernization service, using .NET 8 and Azure for improved performance, scalability, and easier maintenance.
items.description:
Update Your Legacy Application for Modern Performance

A well-executed application modernization can significantly boost your business's agility, efficiency, and competitive edge. Our 2-week .NET App Modernization Implementation service provides a comprehensive solution to upgrade your application, fully leveraging .NET 8's advanced features and Azure's cloud capabilities.

Deliverables:

Our implementation service includes the modernization and optimization of your .NET application, fully integrated with Azure's cloud services. We provide end-to-end solutions that include:

  • Application Modernization and Azure Integration: Refactor your codebase and architecture to .NET 8, migrate key components to Azure for improved scalability and performance, and optimize databases and APIs for cloud-native features like microservices and serverless functions.
  • Security, Compliance, and Monitoring: Implement comprehensive security measures, ensure compliance standards are met, and set up advanced monitoring & analytics for proactive management.
  • UI/UX and CI/CD Modernization: Refresh your UI/UX with modern frameworks like Blazor, and optimize CI/CD pipelines with enhanced testing suites for efficient development and deployment.
  • Documentation and Knowledge Transfer: Provide detailed documentation and conduct knowledge transfer sessions on the modernized application and new technologies, ensuring your team is fully prepared to manage and enhance the solution.

*Pricing and timeframe vary based on the scope of the engagement. Licensing costs are additional to the engagement fees.

items.summary: SSW will work closely with you to understand your needs, providing an analysis, backlog, and roadmap with cost/effort estimates to help you lay strong foundations for modernization.
items.description:
Formulate Your Modernization Strategy with Expert Insights

Understanding the scope, requirements, and any potential challenges is crucial before beginning your application modernization journey. SSW’s .NET Application Modernization Assessment and Scoping service provides you with a detailed blueprint and roadmap, enabling you to make informed decisions about your project's future.

Our assessment and scoping offering, also known as a Specification Review, is designed to thoroughly evaluate your existing .NET web application and help you devise a phased plan to migrate to .NET 8, enabling better integration with Azure's cloud infrastructure.

Why .NET 8?

  • The latest LTS (Long Term Support) version of the platform – migrating now will futureproof your application.
  • Providing robust enterprise functionality and cloud-native development all within a stable ecosystem backed by Microsoft.
  • Offering the ultimate developer experience for your team, with state-of-the-art features like C# 12, Native AOT (Ahead of Time Compilation), and source code generation.
  • With exceptional performance, with faster response times and lower compute power requirements compared to other popular frameworks.
  • Trusted and secure, Microsoft quickly releases updates when threats are discovered.
  • Boasting a large ecosystem, with over 5,000,000 .NET developers worldwide, providing access to a vast array of libraries and community support through the NuGet package manager and Visual Studio Marketplace.

Our phased migration approach:

  1. ASSESSMENT: Assessing your current solutions and their features in a Specification Review.
  2. STRATEGY: Gauging the appropriate strategy based on your needs and priorities (Strangler Fig or Big Bang).
  3. PLAN: For each component, either:
    • Refactor: modernize the code to run with .NET 8
    • Replace: find a product with the same functionality
    • Rewrite: if no equivalent exists, rewrite from scratch
  4. MIGRATE: Executing the migration in a safe and controlled manner, minimizing disruption and mitigating risk.
  5. OPTIMIZE: Provide post-migration support and check-in to ensure your software performs as expected.

Our deliverables include:

  • A Detailed Specification Review: We examine your current specifications or ideas to understand your vision and requirements fully.
  • Blueprint Creation: We create a comprehensive blueprint for your application, detailing the architecture, required Azure services, and integration points.
  • Backlog with Effort Estimates: We provide a comprehensive list of features and enhancements, complete with effort estimates/story points, allowing for accurate budgeting and planning.
  • Strategic Roadmap: We design an in-depth plan that outlines the steps necessary for successful modernization or development, considering your business objectives and timelines.

*Pricing and timeframe vary based on the scope of the engagement.

items.summary: Fundierte Analyse und Modernisierungsstrategie für bestehende .NET-Anwendungen mit Fokus auf Architektur, Sicherheit und Migration.
items.description:
Zukunftsfähig mit .NET: Ihre Anwendungen modernisieren, Azure-ready machen und migrieren

Mit dem Medialesson .NET Azure Modernization Workshop analysieren wir gemeinsam Ihre bestehende .NET-Anwendung und entwickeln einen individuell abgestimmten Modernisierungspfad. Ob klassische .NET Framework-Anwendung oder bereits teilweise modernisierte Lösung – wir unterstützen Sie dabei, technische Altlasten zu identifizieren, Risiken zu minimieren und eine tragfähige, Cloud-optimierte Architektur für die Zukunft zu entwerfen.

Ziel des Workshops ist es, einen klaren Überblick über den aktuellen Stand Ihrer Anwendung zu gewinnen und konkrete, umsetzbare Empfehlungen für Modernisierung, Cloud-Readiness und Migration zu erarbeiten. Der Fokus liegt dabei auf technischen, sicherheitsrelevanten und organisatorischen Aspekten sowie auf der Optimierung für Azure-Cloud-Services.

Der Workshop wird von einem erfahrenen .NET Software Engineer durchgeführt und kann entweder als zweitägiger Online-Workshop (jeweils 4 Stunden pro Tag) oder als eintägiger Vor-Ort-Workshop nach individueller Absprache stattfinden.

📃 Inhalte des Workshops:

Analyse der bestehenden .NET-Lösung Wir verschaffen uns gemeinsam einen Überblick über Aufbau, Komponenten, Abhängigkeiten und verwendete Technologien Ihrer aktuellen Anwendung.

Potenzialanalyse der Softwarearchitektur Welche Teile Ihrer Lösung sind gut aufgestellt – und wo bestehen Modernisierungschancen hinsichtlich Modularisierung, Clean Code, Testbarkeit und Erweiterbarkeit?

Bewertung der Security Readiness Wir prüfen gemeinsam, wie sicher Ihre Anwendung ist – etwa in Bezug auf Authentifizierung, Zugriffskontrollen, Datenhaltung und Abhängigkeiten.

Analyse des Migrationspotentials & Cloud-Readiness Bewertung der Voraussetzungen für den Betrieb in der Cloud mit Fokus auf Azure Web Apps, Azure Container Apps und Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS). Wir identifizieren notwendige Anpassungen für Skalierbarkeit, Konfigurierbarkeit und Resilienz.

Optimierung für Azure Cloud Services Empfehlungen zur Nutzung moderner Cloud-Services statt klassischer Technologien, z. B. Azure Blob Storage statt lokaler Filesysteme, Azure Cache for Redis, Azure Key Vault und Azure Application Insights für Monitoring und Sicherheit.

Entwicklung eines Migrations- und Modernisierungspfads Basierend auf dem Ist-Zustand erarbeiten wir konkrete Migrationsszenarien – z. B. von .NET Framework zu .NET, von Monolith zu Microservices, oder On-Premises zu Azure Cloud. Integration von Containerisierung und Orchestrierung mit AKS, um Ihre Anwendungen cloud-native zu machen.

✅ Ergebnisse

Am Ende des Workshops verfügen Sie über ein belastbares Verständnis Ihrer aktuellen .NET-Landschaft, deren Cloud-Readiness und wissen, welche Schritte notwendig sind, um Ihre Anwendungen modern, sicher und zukunftsfähig weiterzuentwickeln. Sie erhalten zudem eine potenzielle Roadmap mit priorisierten Maßnahmen, Verantwortlichkeiten und Empfehlungen für Tools, Ressourcen und Vorgehensweisen.

Der Medialesson .NET Modernization Workshop – Ihr Einstieg in eine zukunftsfähige, cloud-optimierte und nachhaltige Modernisierungsstrategie.

items.summary: Praxisworkshop zu EF Core für .NET – von Basics bis Performance, DevOps und Testing. Ideal für Entwickler:innen, Architekt:innen und Teams mit Datenbankfokus.
items.description:
Datenzugriff professionell und performant – mit EF Core und Microsoft Azure in modernen .NET-Anwendungen

Entity Framework Core ist das Standard-ORM für moderne .NET-Anwendungen. Im Workshop „.NET Entity Framework Core & Azure Data Services“ vermitteln wir Entwickler:innen und Architekt:innen praxisnah, wie sie EF Core effizient, sicher und performant in ihren Anwendungen einsetzen – von den Grundlagen bis zur produktionsreifen Anwendung mit Cloud-Integration.

Der Workshop deckt sowohl Einsteiger- als auch fortgeschrittene Themen rund um Entity Framework Core ab. Er kombiniert Theorie mit umfangreicher Live-Demo und praktischen Übungen. Sie lernen, wie Sie mit EF Core arbeiten, typische Fehler vermeiden und das volle Potenzial im Zusammenspiel mit verschiedenen Microsoft Azure-Datenbanken, DevOps und Tests ausschöpfen.

Je nach Wissensstand und Zielsetzung des Kundenteams kann der Workshop entweder als kompakter 1-tägiger Einsteigerworkshop oder als 3-tägiger Intensivworkshop mit erweiterten Inhalten durchgeführt werden. Dieser Workshop richtet sich an .NET-Entwickler:innen, Software-Architekt:innen und DevOps-Engineers, die mit Entity Framework Core professionell arbeiten möchten – insbesondere im Azure-Ökosystem.

📃 Agenda

  • Einführung in Entity Framework Core und seine Architektur
  • Entity Design Best Practices: Key-Konfigurationen, Navigation Properties, DTOs, EF-Projekttypen
  • Database Providers: Fokus auf Azure SQL Database, Azure Cosmos DB (EF Core Provider), SQL Server, PostgreSQL, SQLite u.a.
  • Abfragen & Optimierung: LINQ, Tracking, Projections, Lazy/Eager Loading
  • Performance Best Practices: Caching, Indexe, No-Tracking, Split Queries – mit Azure-spezifischen Tipps für skalierbare Cloud-Anwendungen
  • Migrations & Datenbankpflege: Workflows mit Code First, EF CLI und Azure SQL Managed Instances
  • Logging & Monitoring: Diagnostik mit ILogger, EF Events, Azure Application Insights, Tools wie MiniProfiler
  • Testing mit EF Core: In-Memory-Provider, Mocking, Integrationstests
  • DevOps & CI/CD: Automatisierung von Migrationen und Deployments mit Azure DevOps Pipelines, GitHub Actions und Infrastructure as Code (ARM Templates, Bicep)
  • Azure SQL Query Optimizations: Interpretation und Maßnahmen von automatisierten Query Optimierungen durch Azure SQL
  • Cloud-Deployment: Best Practices für den Betrieb von EF Core-Anwendungen in Azure

✅ Ergebnisse

Nach dem Workshop ist Ihr Team in der Lage, Entity Framework Core zielgerichtet und sicher in neuen oder bestehenden Projekten einzusetzen. Sie kennen sowohl die technischen Möglichkeiten als auch die Risiken und lernen Best Practices für skalierbare, wartbare und performante Datenzugriffsschichten in der Cloud.

Sie erhalten:

  • Beispielcode, Übungen und Workshop-Material
  • Empfehlungen zur Projektstruktur, Datenbankwahl mit Fokus auf Azure SQL und Cosmos DB sowie Performance-Tuning in Azure
  • Eine individuelle Roadmap für produktive EF Core-Nutzung inklusive Cloud-Strategien und DevOps-Prozessen

Entity Framework Core – richtig eingesetzt mit Medialesson und Microsoft Azure.

items.summary: Discuss your mobile app development needs and explore expert solutions tailored to your requirements, enhancing performance, user experience, and cross-platform compatibility.
items.description:
SSW's .NET MAUI Mobile Application Briefing provides an opportunity to discuss your mobile app development challenges with our expert consultants. Whether you're concerned about performance, user experience, or cross-platform compatibility, we offer tailored solutions using .NET MAUI to help you overcome these obstacles. In this 1-hour session, we'll discuss your specific needs, explore potential issues, and give advice on how to improve your mobile application while leveraging Azure’s scalable cloud infrastructure.

Who Should Attend?

This briefing is ideal for CTOs, CIOs, and senior IT professionals who are looking to improve the quality, performance, and user experience of their mobile applications.

Agenda

1. Introduction

  • Meet your SSW experts and introduce your team
  • Brief overview of your mobile application and current challenges

2. Problem Exploration
Discuss your mobile app’s pain points, focusing on:

  • Performance bottlenecks
  • User experience issues
  • Cross-platform compatibility challenges
  • Integration with backend services and cloud infrastructure using Azure

We will ask targeted questions to better understand your environment.

3. Solution Proposals
Based on the discussion, we will consider potential solutions to:

  • Improve app architecture with best practices in .NET MAUI
  • Enhance user experience with modern UI/UX design
  • Increase performance and cross-platform compatibility using .NET MAUI
  • Leverage Azure for scalable backend services, including databases, authentication, and monitoring
  • Ensure your app is prepared for future growth with Azure’s cloud scalability

4. Q&A and Next Steps

  • Answer any remaining questions
  • Discuss next steps if you decide to move forward with our .NET MAUI Mobile Application Assessment or Implementation services

Benefits

  • Tailored to your needs: We dive into the specific issues that matter to your business
  • Expert insights: Get advice from industry-leading consultants with extensive experience in .NET MAUI, Azure and mobile app development
  • Actionable solutions: Leave with advice for improving your mobile app’s performance, user experience, and cross-platform compatibility

items.summary: SSW will work closely with you to understand your needs. Giving a detailed analysis, backlog, and roadmap, with cost/effort estimates. Enabling you to lay down the foundations for mobile development.
items.description:
Formulate Your Modernization Strategy with Expert Insights

Understanding the scope, requirements, and potential challenges is crucial before embarking on your mobile app modernization journey. SSW’s .NET MAUI Mobile App Scoping and Assessment service provides you with a detailed blueprint and roadmap, empowering you to make informed decisions about your project's future.

Our scoping and assessment offering, also known as a Specification Review, is designed to thoroughly evaluate your existing mobile application or conceptualize a new project from the ground up, focusing on integration with Azure's cloud infrastructure.

Our deliverables include:

  • A Detailed Specification Review: We examine your current specifications or ideas to understand your vision and requirements fully.
  • Blueprint Creation: We create a comprehensive blueprint for your mobile app, detailing the architecture, required Azure services, and integration points.
  • Backlog with Effort Estimates: We provide a comprehensive list of features and enhancements, complete with effort estimates/story points, allowing for accurate budgeting and planning.
  • Strategic Roadmap: We design an in-depth plan that outlines the steps necessary for successful modernization or development, considering your business objectives and timelines.

*Pricing and timeframe vary based on the scope of the engagement.

items.summary: SSW will work closely with you over the course of 4 weeks to modernize or develop your mobile application using .NET MAUI and integrate it seamlessly with Azure cloud infrastructure.
items.description:
Modernize Your Business with Cutting-Edge Mobile Solutions

Mobile technology is adaptable and can offer significant advantages for your business.

For Enterprises:

  • Mobilize Your Workforce: Enable your team to work from anywhere, increasing productivity and efficiency by providing essential tools and information on the go.
  • Cost Reduction: Streamline operations and reduce overheads with efficient processes and digital solutions tailored for mobile users.
  • Enhanced Security: Benefit from advanced security features like hardware encryption and secure offline storage to protect your data.

For Consumer Apps:

  • Direct Engagement: Foster a direct connection with your users through personalized experiences and notifications.
  • Trust and Credibility: Capitalize on the trust users place in app store vetted applications, enhancing your brand's reputation.
  • Access to Advanced Features: Utilize hardware and OS APIs for innovative features like augmented reality and sensor data, setting your app apart.

Deliverables:

Our comprehensive implementation service encompasses the modernization and development of mobile applications using .NET MAUI, fully integrated with Azure's cloud infrastructure. We provide end-to-end solutions that include:

  • Mobile App Development: Craft stunning, responsive, and efficient mobile applications that offer superior user experiences.
  • Azure Cloud Integration: Seamlessly integrate with Azure services, including APIs, storage solutions, authentication, Notification Hub, and databases, to enhance app functionality and scalability.
  • DevOps Pipelines: Implement robust build and release pipelines for cloud infrastructure, ensuring smooth deployments and updates for your mobile apps and backend services.

*Pricing and timeframe vary based on the scope of the engagement. Licensing costs are additional to the engagement fees.

items.summary: Microsoft’s .NET Modernization one-day workshop is to get you started on modernizing .NET apps using Azure.
items.description:
*Offer Description

Microsoft’s .NET Modernization in a Day workshop is built to help you evaluate your applications, prepare them for migration and host them on managed tools in Azure that were purpose-built for .NET. we will go through the story for the web applications sales play, with a pitch designed for customers looking to migrate web applications to the cloud. We will focus on the value of fully managed services in Azure – with a special focus on App Service, the hero service for web applications – as well as how customers can incorporate innovation in their apps after going through their migration journey.

In our workshop, you will better understand:

• How to evaluate and prioritize .NET applications for modernization • How Microsoft technologies can help you increase .NET application resiliency and allow them to scale easily • How to modernize your existing applications with minimal interruptions

The morning session will focus on best practices, design patterns and common obstacles to avoid, and mapping out your migration/modernization strategy. The afternoon session will be dedicated to hands-on training with our Migration Assistant and the easy to use Azure App Service and Azure SQL Database offerings that have been custom built to host and power .NET applications.

items.longSummary: .NET is a popular software development framework developed by Microsoft. It provides a platform for building and running various types of applications, including web, desktop, mobile, cloud, and gaming applications.
items.summary: Version 9.0.300 + Free Support on Ubuntu 20.04
items.description:
The .NET SDK is a powerful software development kit that provides developers with the tools, libraries, and templates necessary for building modern, scalable, and secure applications. Whether you're creating desktop, web, or cloud-based solutions, the .NET SDK ensures robust application development and deployment capabilities.

Features of the .NET SDK:
  • Comprehensive libraries for developing cross-platform applications.
  • Integrated tools for debugging, testing, and deployment.
  • Support for multiple programming languages including C#, VB.NET, and F#.
  • Seamless integration with Visual Studio and other popular IDEs.
  • Extensive documentation and community support for developers.
  • Built-in support for cloud services like Azure for scalable deployments.
  • Enhanced performance and security features for enterprise-grade applications.
  • Open-source flexibility with contributions from a global developer community.

To check the .NET SDK version: $ dotnet --version

Disclaimer: The .NET SDK is an open-source software distributed under the MIT License. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any specific organization other than the .NET Foundation. The .NET SDK is provided "as is," without any warranty, express or implied. Users utilize this software at their own risk. The developers and contributors to the .NET SDK are not responsible for any damages, losses, or consequences resulting from its use. Users are encouraged to review and comply with licensing terms and any applicable regulations when using the .NET SDK.

items.longSummary: The .NET SDK (Software Development Kit) is a collection of tools, libraries, and resources provided by Microsoft to enable developers to build applications targeting the .NET platform.
items.summary: Version 9.0.203 + Free Support on Ubuntu 20.04
items.description:
The .NET SDK, or Software Development Kit, is a comprehensive set of tools, libraries, and resources provided by Microsoft to facilitate the development of applications for the .NET platform. It offers a robust framework for building various types of applications, including web applications, desktop applications, mobile apps, cloud services, and more.

Features of the .NET SDK:

  • Comprehensive set of tools and libraries for building .NET applications.
  • Support for cross-platform development on Windows, macOS, and Linux.
  • Flexible runtime environment with just-in-time compilation and garbage collection.
  • Rich base class libraries for common programming tasks.

To Check Version Run $ dotnet --version

Disclaimer: The .NET SDK is provided by Microsoft and is subject to the terms and conditions of the Microsoft Software License Terms. Users should review and comply with the licensing terms and any applicable regulations while using the .NET SDK. Microsoft disclaims any warranties or liabilities associated with the use of the .NET SDK.

items.summary: Version 8.0.303 + Free Support on CentOS 8.5
items.description:
.NET is an open-source developer platform created by Microsoft for building various types of applications, including web, mobile, desktop, and cloud-based solutions. It provides a comprehensive and unified development environment with robust tools and libraries.

Features of .NET:

  • Supports multiple languages, including C#, F#, and VB.NET, allowing developers to choose the language that best fits their needs.
  • Provides a wide range of libraries and frameworks, such as ASP.NET for web development and Xamarin for mobile apps.
  • Offers a powerful runtime with Just-In-Time (JIT) compilation and Just-In-Time (JIT) optimizations for performance improvements.
  • Includes a rich set of development tools in Visual Studio, with features like debugging, code analysis, and testing tools.
Access the .NET command-line interface and check your installation by running the following commands on your VM:

To check the version of .NET SDK, run command :
sudo su
cd /opt
dotnet --version

Disclaimer: .NET SDK is an open-source software distributed under the MIT License. It is developed and maintained by Microsoft and the .NET community. .NET SDK is provided "as is," without any warranty, express or implied. Users utilize this software at their own risk. Microsoft and the .NET community hold no responsibility for any damages, losses, or consequences resulting from the use of this software. Users are advised to carefully review and comply with licensing terms and any applicable regulations while using .NET SDK.

items.description:
The .NET SDK, or Software Development Kit, is a comprehensive set of tools, libraries, and resources provided by Microsoft to facilitate the development of applications for the .NET platform. It offers a robust framework for building various types of applications, including web applications, desktop applications, mobile apps, cloud services, and more.

Features of the .NET SDK:

  • Comprehensive set of tools and libraries for building .NET applications.
  • Support for cross-platform development on Windows, macOS, and Linux.
  • Flexible runtime environment with just-in-time compilation and garbage collection.
  • Rich base class libraries for common programming tasks.

To check version : dotnet --version

Disclaimer: The .NET SDK is provided by Microsoft and is subject to the terms and conditions of the Microsoft Software License Terms. Users should review and comply with the licensing terms and any applicable regulations while using the .NET SDK. Microsoft disclaims any warranties or liabilities associated with the use of the .NET SDK.

items.summary: Version 10.0.100 + Free Support on Ubuntu 24.04
items.description:
The .NET SDK, or Software Development Kit, is a comprehensive collection of tools, libraries, and components provided by Microsoft to support the development of applications on the .NET platform. It enables developers to build web applications, desktop software, mobile apps, cloud-native services, microservices, and more using modern programming languages such as C#, F#, and Visual Basic.

Features of the .NET SDK:

  • Comprehensive toolchain for building, running, testing, and publishing .NET applications.
  • Cross-platform support for application development on Windows, macOS, and Linux.
  • High-performance runtime environment with JIT (Just-In-Time) compilation and automatic memory management.
  • Extensive base class libraries for handling networking, file operations, data processing, and more.

Dotnet-SDK Usage Instructions:

$ sudo su
$ cd ~/dotnet-build/sdk
$ check version - dotnet --version
$ Get started with .NET SDK, a powerful, modern, and cross-platform development toolkit used to build high-performance web applications.

Disclaimer: The .NET SDK is provided by Microsoft and is governed by the Microsoft Software License Terms. Users must review and comply with all applicable licensing conditions and regulations. Microsoft disclaims any warranties or liabilities arising from the use of the .NET SDK.

plans.summary: The .NET SDK (Software Development Kit) is a collection of tools, libraries, and compilers used for building, running, and publishing .NET application
plans.description: It includes everything needed to develop .NET applications, such as support for web, desktop, mobile, and cloud-based apps.

plans.summary: The .NET SDK (Software Development Kit) is a collection of tools, libraries, and compilers that developers use to build, run and publish the software.
plans.description: The .NET SDK (Software Development Kit) is a collection of tools, libraries, and compilers that developers use to build, run, and publish applications on the .NET platform. It includes the .NET runtime (which executes apps), the C# and F# compilers, the dotnet CLI tool for project management, and libraries for building different types of apps like web, desktop, cloud, and mobile. In simple terms, the SDK provides everything needed to develop applications, while the runtime alone is only for running them.

items.longSummary: The .NET SDK (Software Development Kit) is a set of tools, libraries, and runtime components needed to develop, build, run, and publish .NET applications.
items.summary: Version 9.0.200 + Free Support on Debian 12
items.description:
.NET SDK (Software Development Kit) is a collection of tools, libraries, and runtime components required for developing, building, running, and publishing .NET applications. It supports multiple application types, including web, desktop, cloud, and mobile development.

Features of .NET SDK:

  • Includes the .NET CLI for command-line development and project management.
  • Supports multiple programming languages, including C#, F#, and Visual Basic.
  • Provides libraries for building web applications, APIs, and desktop applications.
  • Offers cross-platform compatibility, allowing development on Windows, Linux, and macOS.
  • Integrates with popular IDEs such as Visual Studio and Visual Studio Code.

To verify the installed .NET SDK version, run $ dotnet --version in your terminal or command prompt.

Disclaimer: .NET SDK is an open-source project maintained by Microsoft under the MIT license. It is provided "as is" without any warranty, express or implied. Users are responsible for configuring and using .NET SDK according to their development needs.

items.longSummary: The .NET SDK is a comprehensive software development kit that provides all the tools needed to build, run, test, and deploy applications.
items.summary: Version 10.0.101 + Free Support on Ubuntu 24.04
items.description:
.NET SDK is an open-source, cross-platform development kit used for building, running, and deploying modern applications across web, desktop, mobile, cloud, IoT, and gaming platforms. It provides a unified and high-performance framework along with a rich set of libraries, tools, and compilers to boost productivity and simplify application development.

Features of .NET SDK:

  • The .NET SDK offers a robust compiler and runtime supporting C#, F#, and Visual Basic, enabling the creation of scalable and secure applications.
  • Its high-performance execution engine and optimized garbage collection allow building lightweight, cloud-native, and enterprise-grade solutions efficiently.
  • The SDK includes an extensive package ecosystem via NuGet, giving developers access to thousands of reusable libraries and integrations.
  • It simplifies development workflows through command-line tools, project templates, cross-platform builds, and seamless deployment automation.
Dotnet-SDK Usage Instructions: 
$ sudo su
$ sudo apt update
$ dotnet --version

Disclaimer: .NET SDK is an open-source software framework distributed under the MIT License and maintained by the .NET Foundation and contributors. It is provided “as is,” without any warranties, express or implied. Users assume full responsibility for risks associated with installation and usage. Neither the developers nor contributors of the .NET SDK shall be held liable for any damages or consequences arising from its use. Users are encouraged to review licensing terms and comply with applicable policies and regulations when using .NET SDK.

plans.summary: The .NET SDK is a cross-platform, open-source development kit used to build, run, and deploy modern applications.
plans.description: The .NET SDK is a comprehensive, open-source development platform designed to empower developers to build fast, secure, and scalable applications across a wide range of platforms and operating systems. It includes powerful compilers, command-line tools, project templates, and a unified runtime that simplifies the entire development cycle.

items.summary: SSW's comprehensive .NET course covers everything from the latest .NET open-source cross-platform framework.
items.description:
.NET 8 is the latest Long-Term Support (LTS) version in .NET.

Our .NET experts can get you ready to use the most powerful version ever. This fast-paced 1-day course covers many topics, such as Cloud-Native (Azure) Web Application development with ASP.NET Core, data access with EF Core, automated testing, and many other enterprise topics.

You will finish the day with a solid understanding of why you should be using .NET 8 for all your small, medium and enterprise business projects.

Agenda

1. Getting Started with .NET 8

  • Learn how to get up and running quickly with .NET and the new language features of C# 12

2. Minimal APIs with ASP.NET Core

  • Build functioning web APIs quickly without the boilerplate
  • Add authentication using the new ASP.NET Core Identity
  • Generate Client code to consume your API using Kiota

3. Working with Entity Framework Core

  • Enterprise data access with Entity Framework Core

4. Communication with Backend APIs in .NET
Learn about the different API communication options available in .NET:

  • REST
  • Web API
  • Minimal APIs
  • gRPC
  • GraphQL
  • SignalR

5. Modern Web Dev with Blazor

  • Building an interactive UI that uses C# in the browser!

6. Cloud Native Development
Building a production-ready distributed application that is resilient, observable, and hosted in the cloud

  • DAPR
  • .NET Aspire
  • Deploy to Azure using AZD

7. Simplified Automated Testing
Learn how to write automated tests

  • Unit testing with xUnit and NSubtitute
  • Integration Testing with TestContainers and Respawn

8. Migrating to .NET 8
How to migrate your old .NET or .NET Framework apps to .NET 8

  • Upgrade Assistant in Visual Studio
  • Migration Patterns
  • YARP (Yet-Another-Reverse-Proxy)

9. Source Generators
How to leverage source generators

  • Add code at compile time
  • Enhance your applications without losing performance

*Pricing is based on a per-person rate, and the engagement is limited to the specified event times. If you would like to arrange a workshop for your organization outside of the specified event times, please contact us. Pricing for these events will vary.

items.displayName: .NET and Java Apps Modernization & Migration to Azure
items.summary: Modernize your .NET and Java applications with a fast, low-risk, engineering-led migration to Azure AKS and App Service by WCT.
items.description:
𝗣𝗿𝗲𝗱𝗶𝗰𝘁𝗮𝗯𝗹𝗲, 𝗦𝗲𝗰𝘂𝗿𝗲, 𝗘𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗽𝗿𝗶𝘀𝗲-𝗚𝗿𝗮𝗱𝗲 𝗔𝗽𝗽 𝗠𝗼𝗱𝗲𝗿𝗻𝗶𝘇𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗯𝘆 𝗪𝗖𝗧

Modernize your .NET and Java applications with a fast, low-risk, engineering-led migration to Azure AKS and App Service by WCT. We containerize and optimize your existing workloads without changing business logic to deliver higher scalability, resilience, and release velocity.

Our program upgrades your on-prem or multi-cloud apps into cloud-native solutions with built-in performance tuning, cost controls, and zero-downtime deployment strategies.

𝗪𝗖𝗧'𝘀 𝟱-𝗣𝗵𝗮𝘀𝗲 𝗔𝗽𝗽 𝗠𝗼𝗱𝗲𝗿𝗻𝗶𝘇𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗙𝗿𝗮𝗺𝗲𝘄𝗼𝗿𝗸

• Discovery & Assessment — Week 1: Application portfolio analysis, dependency mapping, and cloud-readiness evaluation

• Architecture Design (Week 1-2): Target state architecture (AKS vs. App Service), containerization strategy, and modernization roadmap

• Containerization & Refactoring (Week 2-3): Application packaging, configuration externalization, and cloud-native optimization

• Migration & Deployment  (Week 3-5): Automated CI/CD pipeline setup, staged migration, and production deployment

• Optimize & Transition (Week 5-6): Performance tuning, cost optimization, monitoring setup, and knowledge transfer

𝗪𝗵𝘆 𝗪𝗖𝗧 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗔𝗽𝗽 𝗠𝗼𝗱𝗲𝗿𝗻𝗶𝘇𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻?

We don't just lift-and-shift, we optimize. Our team brings deep expertise in both legacy app architectures and modern cloud-native patterns, ensuring your migration delivers immediate value while positioning you for future innovation without change in business logic.

• 𝗔𝗽𝗽-𝗳𝗶𝗿𝘀𝘁 𝗮𝗽𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗮𝗰𝗵: We understand your business logic, not just infrastructure

𝗢𝗽𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝟯: 𝗥𝗲𝗳𝗮𝗰𝘁𝗼𝗿 (𝗖𝗹𝗼𝘂𝗱-𝗡𝗮𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝗧𝗿𝗮𝗻𝘀𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗺𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻)

• Redesign applications as microservices with full Azure PaaS integration, event-driven architectures, and serverless components.

𝗦𝘂𝗽𝗽𝗼𝗿𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗧𝗲𝗰𝗵𝗻𝗼𝗹𝗼𝗴𝗶𝗲𝘀

• .NET Stack: ASP.NET MVC, Web API, .NET Framework 4.x, .NET Core, .NET 5/6/7/8, Blazor, WCF services

• Java Stack: Spring Boot, Tomcat, WebLogic, JBoss EAP, WebSphere, Jakarta EE

• Databases: SQL Server to Azure SQL, Oracle to PostgreSQL, MongoDB to Cosmos DB

• Integration: Azure Service Bus, Event Hubs, API Management, Logic Apps

𝗚𝗲𝘁 𝗬𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝗔𝗽𝗽𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗥𝗼𝗮𝗱𝗺𝗮𝗽

Start with a complimentary 30-minute application assessment, we'll evaluate your application portfolio, recommend the optimal Azure target platform, and outline a phased modernization strategy.

Contact WaferWire Cloud Technologies (WCT) at 𝗶𝗻𝗾𝘂𝗶𝗿𝘆@𝘄𝗮𝗳𝗲𝗿𝘄𝗶𝗿𝗲.𝗰𝗼𝗺

Accelerating your journey to cloud-native excellence.

items.summary: Deliver fresh new features in your business web application using .NET development in Azure.
items.description:
Objectives:

  • Ensure high level of security
  • Leverage Azure services to acheive business value
  • Follow cloud developmenet best practices
  • Follow DevOps best practices

What we do:

  • Development of the components required to support the business requirements identified and described by product managers, as agreed with the Nexus team during the iterration planning meeting.
  • Automated testing and other actions that ensure the delivered components are production quality and meet the Definition of Done established by the delivery team.
  • All the artifacts and activities of the Scrum Agile methodology (Daily, Planning, Grooming, Retro and Demo).
  • Project management and analysis on each stories of the sprints.
  • The necessary collaborative actions to help it deliver the project on time.

items.displayName: .NET to Azure OpenShift 4-Week Proof of Concept
items.summary: Take your ASP.NET app to the cloud with Perficient and Azure Red Hat OpenShift
items.description:
In just 4 weeks, Perficient will get your ASP.NET MVC app up and running in an Azure Red Hat OpenShift (ARO) cluster. Your app will be running inside of a fully-managed Kubernetes cluster on Azure, which will set up your app up beautifully for a microservices architecture moving forward. Perficient brings app development and DevOps expertise and will guide your app onto Azure ARO. This POC includes full DevOps YAML CI/CD pipelines.

Have a legacy ASP.NET MVC app running on the .NET Framework instead of .NET Core? No problem, we will port it over to .NET Core for you.

4 Weeks to a .NET Core App in ARO

Project Basics

  • Fully managed Azure Red Hat OpenShift (ARO) cluster
  • Port app from .NET to .NET Core
  • Refactor configuration and dependencies

Outcome and Deliverables

  • Fully-provisioned ARO cluster
  • CI/CD Azure DevOps YAML pipelines
  • Infrastructure-as-code OpenShift YAML template files
  • Knowledge transfer session
  • Application POC

Key Activities

  • Porting app to .NET Core (if necessary)
  • Architecting and designing your app's necessary OpenShift resources
  • Building and executing Azure DevOps pipelines
  • Documentation for how to build and deploy your app to OpenShift

items.summary: Azure app modernization accelerates enterprise transformation, and ensures seamless Azure migration, enhanced by DevOps CI/CD and governed by Azure Governance.
items.description:
Presenting the Modernization Bootcamp

A 4-week POC program for revitalizing .NET/Java/OSS applications. Our comprehensive app modernization initiative extends beyond adaptation, leveraging Azure Container App and Azure App Services for a seamless transition. The bootcamp focuses on a smooth migration to Azure, ensuring a shift and a strategic move towards future-ready, scalable operations.

Nous offers tailored app modernization services, addressing unique business needs. Our process goes beyond Azure migration, optimizing and future-proofing applications. Azure integration services are pivotal in creating a dynamic, interconnected digital infrastructure that adapts to evolving business needs.

Engagement Plan

Week 1

  • App modernization bootcamp
  • Engagement scope and target application* definition
  • Review app architecture, resource usage, dependencies, etc.
  • Assessment, analysis, and requirements baselining
  • Analyze architectural options; identify end-state architecture

Week 2

  • Define/build microservices architecture for identified application(s) in scope
  • Migrate application(s) and integrate into Azure App Services
  • Deploy Azure DevOps CI/CD pipeline for development services

Week 3

  • Test run, validation, verification
  • Release management workflow
  • Blue-Green deployment strategy

Week 4

  • Azure control plane telemetry and log dashboards
  • Declarative resource management – continuous monitoring, alarm setup, incident mgmt. workflows
  • Auto-scaling
  • Governance, security, support framework definition

Deliverables

  • Azure App Services Bootcamp
  • Modernization approach documentation
  • Azure governance, policies and security blueprints
  • Fully architected and modernized application in customer Azure account for selected application(s) and use case(s)
  • Azure DevOps CI/CD pipeline with automated tasks
  • Best practice guide to operating and manage Azure App Services environment

items.displayName: .NETアプリケーションのAzureへのモダナイズ支援：2ヶ月の概念実証（PoC）
items.summary: 既存プログラムがAzure上で動作するかどうか、実際のAzureを使った概念実証（PoC）の技術支援を実施し、 IaaSへのリフト、PaaSへのリファクタリング、コンテナへのリアーキテクト、など最適な移行形態をご提示いたします。
items.description:
オンプレミス環境で動作する.NETアプリケーションのAzure PaaSやコンテナへのモダナイゼーションを支援します。 既存プログラムがAzure上で動作するかどうか、実際のAzureを使った概念実証（PoC）の技術支援を実施し、IaaSへのリフト、PaaSへのリファクタリング、コンテナへのリアーキテクト、など最適な移行形態をご提示いたします。

ご提供サービス

1.Azure上での.NETアプリケーションの検証支援（PoC支援）：2 Month

  • 実際のAzure環境を利用した概念実証（PoC）を実施いたします。 *当社エンジニアが具体的なAzureでの実装方法などをQAにて技術サポートします。 *このPoCでより具体的なAzureリソースの選定を行い.NETアプリケーションのCloud化への計画方針を決定いたします。

2.上記プロセスを踏まえ、実際の移行における開発支援も別途ご相談いただけます。

まずは無料相談でご相談ください

This Service is only available in Japanese.

オンプレミス環境で動作する.NETアプリケーションのAzure PaaSやコンテナへのモダナイゼーションを支援します。 既存プログラムがAzure上で動作するかどうか、実際のAzureを使った概念実証（PoC）の技術支援を実施し、IaaSへのリフト、PaaSへのリファクタリング、コンテナへのリアーキテクト、など最適な移行形態をご提示いたします。

ご提供サービス

1.Azure上での.NETアプリケーションの検証支援（PoC支援）：2 Month

  • 実際のAzure環境を利用した概念実証（PoC）を実施いたします。 *当社エンジニアが具体的なAzureでの実装方法などをQAにて技術サポートします。 *このPoCでより具体的なAzureリソースの選定を行い.NETアプリケーションのCloud化への計画方針を決定いたします。

2.上記プロセスを踏まえ、実際の移行における開発支援も別途ご相談いただけます。

まずは無料相談でご相談ください

This Service is only available in Japanese.

items.displayName: .NETアプリケーションのAzureへのモダナイズ：1ヶ月のアセスメント
items.summary: オンプレミス環境で動作する.NETアプリケーションのAzure PaaSやコンテナへのモダナイゼーションを支援します。 既存プログラムが最新のアーキテクチャに適合するかどうかのアセスメント評価を実施し、IaaSへのリフト、PaaSへのリファクタリング、コンテナへのリアーキテクト、など最適な移行形態をご提示いたします。
items.description:
オンプレミス環境で動作する.NETアプリケーションのAzure PaaSやコンテナへのモダナイゼーションを支援します。 既存プログラムが最新のアーキテクチャに適合するかどうかのアセスメント評価を実施し、IaaSへのリフト、PaaSへのリファクタリング、コンテナへのリアーキテクト、など最適な移行形態をご提示いたします。

ご提供サービス

1.アプリケーション評価（アセスメント）：1 Month

  • 既存の.NETアプリケーションのソースコードを解析し、IaaS、PaaS、コンテナへの移行においてどの程度のソースコード改修が必要かを分析しレポートします。 同時に、SQL Server、MySQLなどの使用しているデータベースの解析・レポートも実施いたします。

2.上記プロセスを踏まえ、実際の移行におけるPoC、開発支援も別途ご相談いただけます。

まずは無料相談でご相談ください

This Service is only available in Japanese.

items.summary: As a .NET development company with an extensive portfolio, Groove Technology is mentioned as a good candidate with years of expertise in managing comprehensive .NET Development Services.
items.description:
Groove Technology leverages Azure services to help you develop:

  • Purpose-built applications, operational systems, and client portals.
  • Software for front-end engagement, back-end control, or both.
  • Custom features to match your processes and deliver the outcomes you need.
Process Overview
  1. Application Discovery:
    • Discuss your .NET development needs and challenges
    • Assess and plan for the integration of Azure services
    • Propose an FSD that describes the app's capabilities, appearance, custom integrations, and estimation
  2. Design and Development: At Groove, we will put together a team of dedicated staff who will blend smoothly into your workflow and take good care of your app. If you want to expand the requirements beyond the scope of the FSD, we will help extend the team quickly to cope with the demand and boost capacity.
    • UI /UX design and prototype
    • Develop .NET solution
    • Customise Azure integrations
    • Testing and feedback
Implementation Outcomes
  • Reliable and faster response time
  • Safe and highly secure environment
  • Robust and easy to scale as you need
  • Optimised development cost and maintenance

Overall, Groove Technology provides reliable full-cycle technology services to tackle the most challenging market issues. From modernizing IT approaches, updating outdated infrastructure, hosting, maintaining, and rebuilding product, we've covered you.

items.summary: Evaluate .NET solutions running On-premises or Azure environment to determine how well the applications adhere to best practices and identify areas for improvement.
items.description:
This assessment designed to help organizations optimize .NET solutions for enterprise software development running On-premises or Azure environment. This assessment identifies areas in which .NET solution can be realigned to best practices, providing guidance and/or validation of priorities for strengthening .NET solution implementation.  Evaluate .NET solutions to determine how well the applications adhere to best practices while identifying areas for improvement.

Yash team will perform the following activities as part of this assessment

  • Evaluation of short-term and long-term goals
  • Analyse .NET code base and compare with best practices
  • Special emphasize on any below 5 categories
    • Correctness
    • Efficiency
    • Integrity
    • Reliability
    • Usability
    • Maintainability
    • Flexibility
    • Testability
    • Portability
    • usability
    • Interoperability
    • Security
  • Review business strategy & application questionnaires
  • Review architecture strategy related to .NET solutions

Following are some of the benefits of this assessment

  • Get a prioritized list of architecture and codebase improvements to be made.
  • Receive detailed recommendation on immediate blockers
  • Receive validation on improvement areas in existing code base.
  • Gain clarity on Azure Modernization approach

Following are some of deliverables of the assessment

  • Assessment Report containing best practices, evaluation criteria and recommendations
  • Guideline and implementation roadmap

items.summary: Cyber Infrastructure, CIS, is a Top Application Development company offering Azure based software development and migration services with 1000+ team size in USA, India, UK and Africa offices.
items.description:
This is a 5 days Assessment of .Net Consulting & Application Development services, for custom quotes please contact us.

Cyber Infrastructure, "CIS" a Microsoft Gold Partner and globally trusted Microsoft Development Company provides dependable Azure, Office 365, Microsoft Dynamics 365, SharePoint & .Net development (MVC, Core, C#) services helping you in deploying hybrid and on cloud solutions on the myriad of technologies associated with Microsoft Azure Platform.

HOW IT WORKS

  • Tell us what kind of talent you need.
  • After we get the information, our internal team of experts will review it and connect with you in order to answer any questions and to get an even better understanding of your exact needs.
  • We’ll find you the perfect match.

CIS OFFERINGS

  • Azure:- we provide App development services such as Web Apps, Mobile Apps, Logic Apps, Azure Functions, Azure WebJobs, Azure Storage, Azure API.
  • .Net:- We provide the web and desktop based solution as per business requirement.
  • Sharepoint:- We help you to manage your documents using Microsoft secured, documents management model.
  • Microsoft Dynamics CRM:- Microsoft Dynamics CRM:- Provide Customization, Configuration, Migration, and integration for the different module, such as Sales, Service, Marketing, Field and Project Service Automation. And helps to boost your business.
  • Xamarin Mobile App:- We provide a mobile-based solution for your business enterprise.

DELIVERABLE

By the end of this 5-days assessment, the client would have received

  • Scope Identification
  • Requirement Clarification
  • Requirement Understanding document (Wire-frame)
  • Estimation of Work
  • Resource Identification

This engagement is delivered remotely. Travel is optional (if required).
