items.longSummary: Streamline governance, risk, and compliance with the .legal GRC Platform.
items.description:
.legal - Unified Digital Compliance Platform

[BOOK DEMO]

Manage IT security standards and legal requirements in one intuitive platform, built for collaboration across your entire organisation.

Why .legal?

.legal brings together information security, data protection, contracts, and vendor management in a unified platform that actually makes sense. Whether you're working with ISO 27001, GDPR, NIS2, or managing supplier audits, everything connects where it should. One data breach assessment informs your risk register, GDPR compliance, and vendor reviews automatically.

.legal is designed for teams, not just compliance experts. IT security professionals, legal teams, and leadership work from the same source of truth, with unlimited users and full onboarding support included.

Integrated with Microsoft Entra ID for seamless single sign-on, .legal fits into your existing Microsoft environment without adding complexity.

Solutions

Frameworks
Navigate multiple compliance frameworks from a single control library. Map requirements across ISO 27001, NIS2, GDPR, AI Act, Data Act, CIS18, and more to see where your work overlaps. Track implementation progress, assign responsibilities, and demonstrate compliance without duplicating effort across standards. Read more.

Information and Cyber Security
Build and maintain your ISMS with practical tools for risk management, asset tracking, and control implementation. Document security measures, conduct risk assessments, and generate audit-ready reports. Your security work feeds directly into other compliance areas where relevant. Read more.

Data Protection
Handle GDPR, data processing agreements, and records of processing activities in context with the rest of your compliance work. When you assess a vendor, your data protection review connects to your security risk register and contract management automatically. Read more.

Vendor Management and Audits
Centralise supplier assessments, security questionnaires, and audit documentation. Track vendor risks, manage review cycles, and maintain evidence for regulatory requirements. Vendor data flows into your risk assessments and compliance reporting where needed. Read more.

Contracts
Manage contracts with built-in compliance context. Link agreements to relevant frameworks, processing activities, and vendor assessments. Search across your contract library, set review reminders, and maintain oversight without switching between systems. Read more.

Modular and Transparent

Choose only the modules you need right now. Add others when your requirements grow. Every module works independently but connects seamlessly when you need the bigger picture.

Unlimited users, onboarding, and support are included. You pay for functionality, not headcount, with transparent pricing and no hidden costs. Read more.

[BOOK DEMO]

Learn more at dotlegal.com

plans.description: Access the core .legal platform with user management, basic documentation, and collaboration features. Add modules as your needs grow. Read more

items.longSummary: L'hub digitale per la gestione dei processi di vendita e distribuzione dei prodotti di largo consumo
items.description:
This application is available only in Italian, English


.one è il nuovo tavolo virtuale che riunisce gli stakeholder di un’organizzazione abbattendo i silos informativi che spesso rendono difficile la collaborazione tra team.

Nasce come unico hub digitale che abbraccia l'intera supply chain: raccoglie infatti tutti i dati necessari per far funzionare le vendite e la distribuzione dei prodotti di largo consumo, sia per le aziende che distribuiscono all’ingrosso, sia per quelle che distribuiscono al dettaglio.


È costituito da un insieme di applicazioni che soddisfano le esigenze di stakeholder diversi e consentono di:

  • avere una visione completa dell’intero parco clienti e della storia delle loro transazioni: ordini di vendita, ordini di acquisto, fatture, documenti di spedizione, ticket, task programmati
  • costruire le relazioni con i clienti e gestire l’intero processo di sviluppo del business: nuovi clienti, upselling e cross-selling
  • arricchire il patrimonio aziendale con i dati dei prodotti: prezzo, condizioni commerciali, trade promotion management, attivazione campagne, materiale di corredo per certificarne la qualità, supportarne il post-vendita o la distribuzione logistica
  • organizzare il commercio al dettaglio, sia in sede, sia nei punti vendita: pianificazione delle operazioni di riordino, inventario in tutte le sue forme, tracciamento di tutte le attività di supporto all’interno del negozio, gestione dei compiti assegnati alle singole persone o ai gruppi di lavoro, assistenza alla vendita, vendita
  • garantire la tracciabilità dei prodotti lungo la catena di fornitura verso l’ingrosso e il dettaglio
  • consentire la collaborazione tra le persone favorendo lo scambio di informazioni, rispondendo ai bisogni espressi in linguaggio naturale grazie alle funzionalità abilitate dall’intelligenza artificiale.

plans.description:
.one è un unico hub digitale, potenziato dall'intelligenza artificiale, che abbraccia l'intera supply chain: raccoglie infatti tutti i dati necessari per far funzionare le vendite e la distribuzione dei prodotti di largo consumo, sia per le aziende che distribuiscono all’ingrosso, sia per quelle che distribuiscono al dettaglio.

.one è stata pensata per soddisfare i bisogni di settori di mercato diversi: contattaci per approfondire la proposta mirata alle tue esigenze.

items.longSummary: create revolutionary new visions for interior design in retail, residential and real estate settings
items.description:
This application is available in english and german. 

.rooms is a mixed reality solution designed for everyone who wants to create revolutionary new visions for interior design in industrial, residential, and real  estate settings.
Designing interior spaces had not changed much for generations and are sometimes very stressful and difficult for the end customer. People are spending a lot of money, but they must try to imagine how everything will look based on just a few sketches and product photos, and then they have to wait a long time to see the outcome.
Using a unique combination of the Microsoft HoloLens 2 and the .roomstablet app, Island Labs has found a way to design interior spaces that allows customers to holographically experience interior designs in any location through mixed reality glasses, way before the actual production has even begun. For the first time, this offers customers the opportunity to interactively and "playfully" participate in designing their interiors in actual sizes and real dimensions. Cabinet heights and passage widths can be tried out virtually, adapted to ergonomic requirements and the individual spatial perception. Future structural changes such as wall openings, architectural alterations or the future colour scheme can also be visualised via the technology.

Scalability 
.rooms is ultra mobile and ultra scalable solution that could grow along with the customers business, enabling them to expand into new territories andmarket sectors.

Cross-platform solution 
.rooms is a collaborative, mixed-reality solution built on Microsoft Azure and HoloLens  2, which is a game changer in terms of customer-centric interior design and the ability to visualize expensive, complex projects. It provides a unique immersive experience for customers and is an exceptional design tool for sale consultants.

Immersive full-scale visualization 
The solution allows customers to holgraphically experience interior designs in any location through mixed reality glasses, before the actual production. Customers have the opportunity to interactively and “playfully” participate in designing their interiors in actual sizes and real dimensions. Cabinet heights and passage widths can be tried out virtually, adapted to ergonomic requirements and the individual spatial perception.

.rooms is a collaborative, mixed-reality solution built on Microsoft Azure and HoloLens  2, which is a game changer in terms of customer-centric interior design and the ability to visualize expensive, complex projects. It provides a unique immersive experience for customers and is an exceptional design tool for sale consultants.

Immersive full-scale visualization 
The solution allows customers to holgraphically experience interior designs in any location through mixed reality glasses, before the actual production. Customers have the opportunity to interactively and “playfully” participate in designing their interiors in actual sizes and real dimensions. Cabinet heights and passage widths can be tried out virtually, adapted to ergonomic requirements and the individual spatial perception.

items.longSummary: Automate multi-step business processes: task orchestration, team coordination, approvals
items.description:
🔄 Multi-Step Process Automation for Business Central

Stop manual process coordination through email chains and spreadsheets. 0-Code Advanced Work Flow for Business Central orchestrates multi-step business processes automatically—task sequencing, team coordination, progress tracking, escalation management, and accountability without coding.

Automate employee onboarding, purchase approvals, vendor setup, credit reviews, inventory replenishment, service requests, contract approvals, month-end tasks, and multi-step Business Central workflow processes.


⚡ Key Features:

✓ Full Task Orchestration
Define workflows with task dependencies. Sequential, parallel, conditional, or dependent tasks. All only by configuration, no programming required.

✓ Team Coordination & Assignment
Assign tasks to users, teams, or roles. BC determines correct assignee. Workload balancing and manager visibility.

✓ Real-Time Progress Tracking
See every workflow's status instantly. View current task, assigned user, completion percentage. Identify bottlenecks immediately.

✓ Automatic Escalation & Reminders
Configure escalation rules per template. Reminders before due dates. Manager escalation if overdue.

✓ Built-In Business Rules Engine
Includes complete Business Rules engine for task validation. 10 action types: Error, Message, Confirmation, Notification, Email, Assign, URL, Custom Action, Power Automate, Insert Record.

✓ Complete Audit Trail
Every task logged with assigned user, due date, completion date, completer, notes, validation results.

✓ Universal BC Compatibility
Works with all Business Central tables: standard Microsoft tables, ISV extensions, custom tables and fields.


📋 Real-World Workflow Scenarios:

👥 Employee Onboarding: HR documentation → IT account setup → Equipment assignment → Training → Manager introduction → Payroll enrollment.

✅ Purchase Approvals: Manager review → Budget verification → Purchasing evaluation → Director approval → PO generation. 5-day average vs. 15 days manual.

🏢 Vendor Setup: Purchasing review → Tax forms → Payment terms → Finance approval → System configuration → First order.

💳 Credit Limit Increases: Sales assessment → Credit report review → Finance analysis → Director approval → AR notification → Customer communication.

📦 Inventory Replenishment: Purchasing review → Vendor selection → PO creation → Receiving → Quality check → Bin placement.

🔧 Service Requests: Request logging → Technician assignment → Parts ordering → Scheduling → Execution → Verification → Follow-up.

📅 Month-End Closing: Journal preparation → Department review → Reconciliation → Adjustments → Approval → Final close → Reporting.


⭐ Why Choose 0-Code Advanced Work Flow?

✓ Simple and Intutive Interface
Business analysts configure workflows using BC's familiar interface—no IT specialists required.

✓ Complete Process Management
Real-time workflow status visibility. Team workload tracking. Bottleneck identification.

✓ Comprehensive Process Automation
Beyond approvals: 19+ workflow scenario types including onboarding, operational processes, notifications, compliance, cross-department coordination.

✓ No External Systems
Everything runs within Business Central. No middleware. No separate workflow system.

✓ Built-In Validation Engine
Complete Business Rules engine for task validation. One platform for workflow orchestration AND business rule automation.

✓ Business Central Native

items.longSummary: No-code automation platform: validate data, send emails, trigger actions from BC events
items.description:
🔧 No-Code Automation Platform for Business Central


Stop expensive AL customizations for business logic. 0-Code Business Rules for Business Central is a comprehensive automation platform that validates data, sends emails, triggers notifications, populates fields, integrates systems, and enforces policies—all without writing code.

Far beyond validation: 10 action types automate every aspect of Business Central business rules through simple configuration. Business analysts configure rules. Developers focus on complex requirements. Save thousands of dollars per customization.


⚡ Key Features:

✓ 10 Action Types for Complete Automation
Error: Block invalid transactions. Message/Confirmation: Display prompts. Notification: Send BC notifications. Email: HTML emails with reports. Assign: Auto-populate fields. URL: Open web pages. Power Automate: Trigger flows. Insert Record: Create audit logs.

✓ Formula-Based Conditions
Configure business logic using BC filter syntax. Cross-table validation. Complex AND/OR logic. Date comparisons. User role checking. Formula calculations.

✓ Transaction-Level Execution
Rules execute before BC commits transactions. Block invalid data before database touched. Guarantee data integrity automatically.

✓ Universal BC Compatibility
Create business rules for any Business Central table: standard Microsoft tables, ISV extensions, custom tables and fields. Works across all BC modules.

✓ Complete Audit Trail
Every rule execution logged: timestamp, user, condition result, actions executed, fields modified.


📋 Real-World Business Rule Automation:

✅ Conditional Mandatory Fields
Require fields based on document status. Rejection reasons when quote lost. Budget codes when amount exceeds threshold. Dynamic field requirements based on business context.

📝 Auto-Populate Based on Business Logic
Copy dimensions from customer category. Calculate margin alerts. Set priorities based on customer tier and order value. Auto-assign cost centers using cross-table logic.

🚫 Advanced Duplicate Prevention
Block duplicate emails across contact types. Prevent duplicate vendor invoice numbers. Cross-table duplicate checking. Custom uniqueness validation.

💳 Custom Validation & Blocking
Block orders when customer has overdue invoices. Prevent payments without matching receipts. Require manager override for policy exceptions. Custom business policy enforcement.

📧 Event-Driven Email Notifications
Email customers when orders ship with tracking. Notify procurement when inventory hits reorder point. Alert managers when high-value quotes lost. Custom HTML emails with BC data and PDFs.

🔒 Cross-Table Data Validation
Verify credit limits across companies. Check item availability before commitment. Validate project budgets. Ensure territory matches location. Multi-table relationship enforcement.


⭐ Why Choose 0-Code Business Rules?

✓ Replace AL Development Costs
AL customizations cost thousands of dollars per requirement. Business Rules configuration costs fraction—typically hours instead of weeks.

✓ Empower Business Analysts
Business users configure rules themselves using familiar BC interface. No waiting for developer availability. No deployment cycles.

✓ Comprehensive Automation Platform
One platform handles validation, email automation, field population, notifications, audit logging, external integration.

✓ Enterprise-Grade Reliability
Transaction-level execution. Automatic retry logic. Error tracking. Performance optimized. Battle-tested in production.

✓ Business Central Native
Installs from AppSource. Uses BC data directly. Works with BC Online and on-premises.


Get Started Today

Install from AppSource in minutes. Configure your first validation rule in under 30 minutes. Free trial with full functionality.

Request a free demo: Schedule your personalized demonstration

Documentation & Support: Visit our support page for guides

Fully transactable app with licensing and payment through Microsoft AppSource. All subscriptions and billing managed by Microsoft.

Available in all countries where Business Central is available.

items.longSummary: Send automated emails from Business Central with dynamic content and report attachments
items.description:
Automate Business Central Email Communication

Stop manually sending invoices, purchase orders, and customer communications. 0-Code Email Automation for Business Central automatically sends professional HTML emails triggered by your business processes—with report attachments, dynamic content, and full customization without coding.

Automate invoice delivery, order confirmations, shipment notifications, payment reminders, quote emails, and Business Central email communication across all modules.


⚡ Key Features:

✓ Rich Text Email Designer
Create email templates with rich formatting, company branding, images, professional layouts. Built-in rich text editor or paste custom HTML. Preview before activation.

✓ Dynamic Content Placeholders
Insert BC data automatically: customer name, order number, invoice amount, due date, salesperson, item details. Reference any BC field using placeholder syntax.

✓ Report Attachments
Attach any BC report as PDF: invoices, purchase orders, statements, packing slips, quotes, reminders. Reports generate automatically using current record data.

✓ Conditional Email Sending
Send emails based on business rules. Configure conditions using BC filter syntax—no coding needed.

✓ Multiple Recipients
Email customers, vendors, employees, managers, teams. Define recipients from BC contact data. CC and BCC supported.

✓ Email History & Audit Trail
Track every email sent: timestamp, recipient, subject, status, attachments. Complete audit trail for compliance.

✓ Universal BC Compatibility
Works with all Business Central tables: standard Microsoft tables, ISV extensions, custom tables and fields.


Real-World Email Automation:

📄 Sales & Invoicing
Invoice delivery with PDF when posted. Order confirmations when created. Quote emails with PDF and terms. Shipment notifications with tracking. Payment reminders for overdue invoices.

📦 Purchasing
Purchase order emails to vendors when PO creates. Receiving notifications when goods arrive. Payment confirmations when processed. RFQ emails to multiple vendors.

🔧 Customer Service
Service order confirmations when requests logged. Technician assignment notifications. Service completion with invoice attached. Follow-up survey emails.

📊 Inventory & Operations
Stock level alerts when inventory low. Transfer order notifications to warehouse. Cycle count task emails. Quality issue alerts to managers.


Why Choose 0-Code Email Automation?

✓ Replace Manual Email Sending
Stop copying data into templates manually. Automate 100% of transactional emails—invoices, orders, confirmations, reminders.

✓ Professional Branded Communication
Rich text formatting ensures emails match your brand. Dynamic data prevents typos. Report PDFs deliver professional documentation.

✓ Instant ROI
Configuration takes hours, not weeks. No development costs. Unlimited emails included. Immediate time savings.

items.longSummary: Trigger Microsoft Power Automate flows from Business Central events with conditional logic
items.description:
🔗 Connect Business Central to 500+ Cloud Services

Integrate Business Central with Microsoft Teams, SharePoint, CRM, SMS services, and 500+ cloud applications—without custom development. 0-Code Power Automate Connector for Business Central triggers Power Automate flows automatically from BC events with rule-based conditions.

Post to Teams when high-value orders create. Upload documents to SharePoint when invoices post. Send SMS alerts when inventory drops. Update CRM when customers change. All automated Business Central Power Automate integration without coding.


⚡ Key Features:

✓ Conditional Flow Triggering
Trigger flows based on business rules: only for high-value orders, VIP customers, specific item categories. Configure conditions using BC filter syntax. Flows trigger when needed, not for every record.

✓ Dynamic JSON Payload Composition
Send BC data to flows: customer details, order amounts, item information, posting dates, any BC field. Compose JSON payload with simple field mapping. Flows receive structured data ready for processing.

✓ Real-Time Webhook Delivery
HTTP POST to flow webhook URLs when triggers fire. Real-time delivery with automatic retry logic.

✓ Multiple Flow Integration
Connect one BC event to multiple flows. Send Teams notification AND create SharePoint document AND update CRM—all from single BC trigger.

✓ Event History & Monitoring
Track every flow trigger: timestamp, event type, condition result, payload sent, flow response. Complete audit trail for troubleshooting.

✓ Universal BC Compatibility
Works with all Business Central tables: standard Microsoft tables, ISV extensions, custom tables and fields. Integrate all BC modules with cloud services.


📋 Real-World Power Automate Integration:

👥 Microsoft Teams Collaboration
Post to sales channel when high-value orders create. Notify service team when urgent requests logged. Alert managers when approvals pending. Share shipment updates in customer-specific channels.

📁 SharePoint Document Management
Upload posted invoices to SharePoint library. Create vendor folders when new vendors set up. Archive purchase orders with metadata. Generate approval documents when workflows trigger.

💼 CRM Synchronization
Update Dynamics 365 Sales when BC customer data changes. Sync opportunities to external CRM. Create activities when orders close. Push invoice data to accounting systems.

📱 Communication & Alerts
Send SMS messages when shipments dispatch. Email executives daily sales summary. Post social media updates about product launches. Send Slack notifications for operational alerts.

🌐 External System Integration
Update e-commerce platforms when inventory changes. Push data to marketing automation. Sync pricing to external quote systems. Integrate production data with MES systems.


⭐ Why Choose 0-Code Power Automate Connector?

✓ Gateway to 500+ Services
Unlock entire Power Automate ecosystem: Teams, SharePoint, Outlook, Excel, OneDrive, plus 500+ third-party services like Salesforce, Slack, DocuSign, Shopify.

✓ Rule-Based Intelligence
Conditional logic ensures flows execute only when business conditions met—reducing unnecessary flow runs and costs.

✓ No Custom Development
Standard BC connector requires AL development. Power Automate Connector handles any integration through configuration—no coding needed.

✓ Visual Flow Design
Build complex integrations using Power Automate's visual designer. 400+ pre-built connectors and actions.

✓ Business Central Native

items.displayName: 0 0 1 Agent PDF 2 OCR UBL 2 Txt 4 Peppol
items.longSummary: 001 Agent converts Pdf, UBL, Image or XML files into readable documents and detailed invoices.
items.description:
001 Agent PDF 2 OCR UBL 2 TXT 4 PEPPOL

Your Smart Document Decoder for Business Central


Why Choose 001 Agent?

Managing complex file formats like UBL, PEPPOL, XML, and PDF can be overwhelming. 001 Agent is your intelligent assistant that converts, organizes, and displays these documents directly in Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central.


Key Features That Set Us Apart

✔ All-in-One File Handling
Process UBL, PEPPOL, XML, Pictures and PDF files with ease. View embedded PDFs from UBL files directly inside Business Central.

✔ Advanced OCR Technology
Turn scanned PDFs into structured, usable data for faster processing.

✔ Smart Posting Logic
Automatically apply predefined G/L accounts when creating purchase invoices. Add dimensions like cost centers and profit centers for accurate reporting.

✔ Posted Purchase Receipts Management
Collect and process posted purchase receipts for complete traceability.

✔ Mailbox Integration
Import documents directly from your email inbox for seamless workflow.

✔ Native Business Central Integration
Work entirely within your Business Central environment—saving time and reducing errors through automation.


Benefits for Your Organization

  • Efficiency: Automate document handling and reduce manual work.
  • Transparency: Clear, readable documents at your fingertips.
  • Control: Accurate financial allocation with dimensions and G/L accounts.

Our Mission

From data chaos to document clarity—001 Agent transforms your invoice processing by decoding UBL, PEPPOL, Pdf, Images and XML, managing receipts, and importing emails effortlessly.

Ready to simplify your workflow?
Contact us today and start with 001 Agent PDF2OCR UBL2TXT4PEPPOL.

items.longSummary: Easy and simple invoice or payment approval
items.description:
Introducing MatrixApproval: Revolutionize Your Approval Workflows!

Are you tired of manual, time-consuming invoice and payment approval processes? Look no further! MatrixApproval is here to transform the way you manage approvals.


Dynamic Approval Flows: Say goodbye to rigid, one-size-fits-all workflows. MatrixApproval adapts to your organization’s unique needs. Whether it’s department-specific, amount-based, or tied to specific dimensions, our app splits approvals seamlessly.

Efficiency Unleashed: Registering approval processes has never been smoother. With MatrixApproval, you’ll streamline your entire workflow, reduce bottlenecks, and accelerate decision-making.

Security First: Trust is paramount. MatrixApproval ensures data integrity and compliance. Your approvals remain confidential, and our robust security protocols keep sensitive information safe.

Cloud-Powered: Access MatrixApproval from anywhere, anytime. Cloud-based architecture means no more paperwork, no more delays. Stay productive on the go!

Tailored for You: Customize approval dimensions, set rules, and watch MatrixApproval adapt effortlessly. Whether it’s multi-level hierarchies, project-based approvals, or cross-functional teams, we’ve got you covered.

User-Friendly Interface: No tech headaches here! MatrixApproval’s intuitive design ensures quick adoption. Your team will love how easy it is to navigate.


Why Choose MatrixApproval?

  • Speed: Get approvals faster, without the hassle.
  • Precision: Fine-tune workflows to match your business intricacies.
  • Compliance: Stay audit-ready with transparent approval trails.
  • Collaboration: Foster teamwork with seamless communication.
  • ROI: Save time, reduce costs, and boost productivity.

Ready to elevate your approval game? MatrixApproval awaits!

plans.description: Use the Approval Matrix functionality for unposted invoices or posted invoices (payment approval). The price is per user.

items.longSummary: Turn complex UBL and Peppol electronic invoices into clear, readable documents — instantly.
items.description:
The UBL / Peppol Document Viewer allows you to open any UBL or Peppol BIS Billing 3.0 XML invoice and display it as a clean, human‑readable invoice layout. No technical knowledge is required: simply open the XML file, and the app renders a structured invoice with supplier details, buyer information, invoice lines, VAT totals, payment data, and more — just like a traditional PDF invoice.

If the UBL file contains an embedded PDF, the app automatically detects it and displays or extracts the original PDF.

The viewer is designed for anyone working with electronic invoicing — including accountants, SMEs, developers, and Business Central or ERP users — and is ideal for countries where structured e‑invoicing is mandatory (such as Belgium’s Peppol requirement).


Key Features

  • Readable Invoice Rendering
    Opens UBL / Peppol XML files and displays them as clear invoice layouts, including supplier, customer, line items, VAT, totals, and payment instructions.

  • Embedded PDF Support
    Automatically detects and displays any PDF embedded inside the UBL file

  • Peppol BIS Billing 3.0 Compatibility
    Supports modern e‑invoicing standards commonly used across Europe.

  • Secure Local Processing
    All invoice rendering occurs locally on your device

  • Clean, Professional Layout
    View invoices in a printable, user‑friendly format that mirrors real business documents.

  • Perfect for Accounting & Compliance
    Suitable for environments where structured invoicing is mandatory (e.g., Peppol infrastructure).


Who Is This App For?

  • Businesses receiving UBL / Peppol invoices
  • Accountants and financial administrators
  • IT and ERP consultants (e.g., Dynamics Business Central users)
  • Developers analyzing UBL invoice contents
  • SMEs transitioning to e‑invoicing workflows

plans.description:
The Team Plan provides full, unrestricted access to the UBL PEPPOL Document Viewer for organizations that require a scalable solution supporting between 6 and 100 active users. This plan is designed for companies that work extensively with electronic invoices and Peppol/UBL document flows and need every team member to benefit from unlimited viewing and processing capabilities.

With this plan, all assigned users can view, interpret, and validate UBL and Peppol BIS Billing 3.0 documents without any functional limitations. The plan includes complete access to embedded PDF visualization, and all advanced features the app offers. Ideal for finance teams, accounting departments, shared-service centers, and companies standardizing on electronic invoicing.

This plan grows with your business, allowing you to add or remove users within the 6–100 user range at any time, ensuring flexibility and predictable licensing for organizations of all sizes.

The Small Team Plan is designed for individuals, freelancers, and compact teams that require reliable access to the UBL PEPPOL Document Viewer. This plan allows 1 to 5 users to fully utilize the app without any feature limitations. Every licensed user receives complete access to all capabilities, including embedded PDF preview, and full UBL/Peppol BIS Billing 3.0 document support.

Ideal for small businesses, accountants, consultants, and organizations with modest electronic invoicing needs, this plan offers an efficient and cost‑effective way to adopt structured e‑invoicing. Users can work simultaneously, process incoming UBL documents, and seamlessly view readable invoice layouts without restrictions.

This plan provides the same high‑quality functionality as larger tiers but packaged specifically for smaller teams who require professional capabilities at a manageable scale.

items.longSummary: 1 Alpha Leaf is a feature rich Cannabis solution on Business Central
items.description:
1 Alpha Leaf fills the missing gaps in Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central to manage your Cannabis business processes.


Why 1 Alpha Leaf?

1 Alpha Leaf’s adds seed-to-sale functionality to Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central and makes it the only complete cloud-based application to serve the needs of the cannabis industry in a single solution. 1 Alpha Leaf also fully integrates with METRC. 

Functionality

At a Glance added functionality:

  •     Strain Management
  •     Plant Lifecycle Management
  •     Plant Harvesting
  •     Packaging
  •     METRC Integration

Supported Editions:

  •     This app supports the Essentials and Premium Editions of Dynamics 365 Business Central.

Supported Countries:

  •     United States
  •     Canada

Supported Languages:

  •     This app is available in English (United States)

items.displayName: 1 Day - Azure Stack HCI Hardware Design Assesment
items.summary: In this workshop our Azure Stack HCI experts will guide you on making the right choices when choosing hardware (vendor). Contact us for more information.
items.description:
Choosing the right hardware (vendor) for Azure Stack HCI can be ambiguous, especially with HCI infrastructures. Although all hardware vendors provide guidelines and pre-designed setups we come across a lot of design mistakes that are expensive to change when the hardware is already ordered. In this workshop we will help you make decisions for your new Azure Stack HCI solution based on your input.

We will go through:

  1. The requirements set by your organization.
  2. Input on current environment and future sizing.
  3. Azure Stack HCI OS or Windows Server 2022.
  4. Hardware components - HDDs, SSDs, NVMes, NIC vendors, RDMA types, Storage switches, Bandwidth requirements etc.
  5. Create a hardware design document which you can hand-over to the vendor of choice.

Let the experts of Splitbrain help you with your new Azure Stack HCI solution and don't encounter surprises when installing it.

Reach out to us for more information.

https://www.splitbrain.com/

items.displayName: 1 Day Training: UTA Power BI Training
items.summary: Unveil the power of data visualization with Power BI, and through our training and through our training, equip your team to transform raw data into insightful dashboards for strategic decision-making.
items.description:
1. Advanced visualization design principles: In our Power BI Data Visualization Specialization Course, you will learn advanced design principles to create visually stunning and impactful visualizations that effectively communicate complex data insights.
  2. Custom visualizations and using the Power BI marketplace: Discover how to create custom visualizations and leverage the Power BI marketplace to incorporate a wide variety of visuals into your reports and dashboards, enhancing the user experience.
  3. Bookmarks and storytelling with data: Master the art of storytelling with data using Power BI bookmarks, transforming raw data into compelling narratives that drive informed decision-making and engagement. Advanced data modeling techniques
  4. Advanced data modeling techniques: Learn advanced data modeling techniques in Power BI, enabling you to create robust and efficient data models that simplify data manipulation and analysis.
  5. DAX formulas and calculations: Become proficient in using Data Analysis Expressions (DAX) formulas and calculations in Power BI, empowering you to perform advanced data transformations and calculations for deeper insights.
  6. Dashboards and report design: Gain expertise in designing and building interactive Power BI dashboards and reports, ensuring that your data visualizations are both visually appealing and highly functional.
  7. Future topics shaped by your team's needs: The journey doesn't stop here! Depending on your team's requirements, we're ready to introduce future topics or additional technology training, providing an adaptable learning experience you won't find elsewhere.

Flexible Program Duration ( 1 day or longer), online or onsite. 4.500€ Euros+ VAT per training day remote, training classes typically between 7-9 people. Travel expenses for onsite training in addition.

https://www.ultratendency.com/en/academy/course/power-bi/

Flexible Program Duration ( 1 day or longer), online or onsite. 4.500€ Euros+ VAT per training day remote, training classes typically between 7-9 people. Travel expenses for onsite training in addition.

https://www.ultratendency.com/en/academy/course/power-bi/

items.summary: LiveRoute offer end to end services to help organizations implementing and migrating to Microsoft Azure Windows Virtual Desktop Services for Desktop as a Service or Application Virtualization needs.
items.description:
One Day workshop to help you explore Windows Virtual Desktop feasibility as a virtual desktop or application delivery solution for your organization. In this workshop, we will present and brainstorm with you:

  • Introduction to Windows Virtual Desktop (WVD) technology
  • WVD use cases, implementation and integration guidelines (native and 3 rd party vendors)
  • WVD sizing and pricing models
  • Quick assessment of existing digital state, readiness and requirements gap analysis.
  • Build a roadmap covering:
  • Best fit use case for your organizations
  • Recommendations and considerations
  • Define High level implementation / enhancement strategy
  • High level requirements
  • Recommend next steps

items.displayName: 1 Day Workshop : Hybrid Cloud powered by AzureStac
items.summary: Azure와 On_Prem을 연계하는 AzureStack 기반의 Hybrid Cloud를 구현을 위한 Workshop
items.description:
“This Service is only available in Korean Language”

높은 TCO 절감 및 기업의 민첩성을 향상시키고자 Azure를 사용하면서 초저지연시간과 보안성을 확보하고자 Hybrid Cloud에 대한 기업의 관심은 높아지고 있습니다.

[Service Overview]

  • Service Goal : Hybrid Cloud로의 여정을 위한 1 Day Workshop
  • Service Scope : Azurestack 소개 및 Azurestack 도입시의 예상되는 문제점 파악을 위한 Workshop

[대상 고객]

  1. On Azure로의 이행을 검토중인 고객
  2. Iot 등에 관심이 높은 고객
  3. 보안성 확보때문에 Public Cloud로의 전환에 어려움이 있는 고객

items.publisherDisplayName: Trianz IT and Cloud Solutions Pvt. Ltd
items.summary: A 1-day working session, designed for business and IT stakeholders, that guides your business in understanding the AI products and services offered by Azure and how best to use them.
items.description:
As an experienced Azure Gold Partner, Trianz understands business' intense focus on Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Cognitive Services as a means of gaining a competitive advantage. However, the cost, time investment, and knowledge necessary can be substantial, when you don't know where to begin.

The Trianz AI workshop includes is a single day of breadth and depth on Azure's various AI products and services. Included in the workshop are topics such as:

  • Understanding if AI, ML, and Azure's Cognitive Services are right for you
  • How best to experiment with these products (including services like Azure Cognitive Search, Azure Bot Service, LUIS, Machine Learning Studio, etc.)
  • A review of real-world use-cases
  • An high-level implementation plan, for a given AI product or architecture
  • A Q&A session to fill any remaining gaps in understanding Azure AI products and services
  • Following this assessment, Trianz will provide you with an action plan to move forward with your AI journey

Microsoft's democratization of AI has made it easier than ever to experiment with the most cutting edge machine intelligence technologies available. Ask us how Trianz can help you take advantage of these products and services.

items.summary: Discover the possibilities of the Manufacturing module
items.description:
A specially prepared workshop program will allow your employees to become familiar with the possibilities of Microsoft Dynamics 365 in the Manufacturing area. If your organization is considering implementing a new ERP system - this training is especially for you.

What will you get after the workshop ?:

  • Knowledge about the possibilities of Microsoft Dynamics 365 in the area of production management
  • You will learn the best practices regarding the use of modern ERP systems
  • You will learn about the implementation project and how to prepare for it.

For whom?: Manufacturing managers, IT directors, board members.

items.summary: Jump start your Netbackup migration with a comprehensive migration assessment!
items.description:
Protect your data from ransomware or unexpected downtime with NetBackup from Veritas, deployed on Microsoft Azure. NetBackup and Azure ensure your data is easy to migrate and recover, so you can keep your business running and meet your compliance needs.

Chances are organizational, operational and technological changes have impacted your data protection operations. Adjusting to changing demands is an essential facet of safeguarding information. Veritas NetBackup Migration Services will provide expert technical resources to perform these maintenance and reconfiguration activities on your NetBackup systems.

Key Benefits with a NBU Migration:

  • Fully managed solution designed to support the specific needs of your digital transformation agenda, bridging the gap between physical and digital.

  • Reduce Cost and Time: Migrations tend to signal high cost and significant downtime. VAST methodologies enable organizations to migrate data at an affordable cost with virtually no down time.

The business drivers for a data migration vary, but include displacing legacy hardware, the adoption of cloud or SaaS based offerings or corporate reorganizations. Regardless of the reason, the need for data to be seamlessly and securely migrated as quickly as possible without loss of accessibility is essential. Veritas NetBackup Migration Services delivers rapid, secure end-to-end migrations with first-class data fidelity.

Briefing includes information on:

 * Assessment process
 * Migration process
 * Tooling
 * Pricing

In this one hour briefing VAST will walk you through the assessment and migration process for your Veritas NetBackup workloads to Azure virtual machines and Azure cloud storage technologies.

items.summary: Plan, design, and deploy a Veritas Enterprise Data Protection solution in your Microsoft Azure tenant
items.description:
Veritas Netbackup Implementation Services in Azure provides overall data protection of customer’s data in their Azure tenant. Our professional services team manage all phases of the project from planning, design, deployment, and testing to project closure. Our Veritas NetBackup services will include but is not limited to:

  • Planning and design session(s) to assist with architecting the desirable data protection solution in the cloud utilizing NetBackup’s data protection features

  • The deployment of following data protection services: * Initial setup of Netbackup instances in Azure * Utilize intelligent NetBackup backup policies to protect cloud data and workloads within the customer’s tenant. * Configuring data protection backup workflows leveraging Azure incremental snapshots and NetBackup’s data protection features. * Setting up self-service options for the Cloud Administrator to manage their data protection environment. * Reduce any on-premises tape storage and costs by protecting long term retention data using Azure Archive Storage. * Deduplicate and tier data to diverse cloud vendor infrastructures from a single deduplication pool.

Service Benefits

• Reduce the effort required to upgrade your NetBackup data protection solution • Ease upgrade concerns and shorten maintenance windows • Improve NetBackup knowledge with demonstrations and opportunities for hands-on experiences

VAST engineers average 12+ years of tenure and our call center is staffed with only senior level personnel. We provide a focal point for Veritas technical support and other technologies employed in the data center.

Our core competencies include: • Training & Certification – VAST has passed certification testing for all of the products that are a part of VAST’s IT solutions, and map to our customer’s environments. • Call Handling – VAST closes over 92% of the service calls without escalation to Veritas or other partners. This is the highest category of performance. • Contract Administration – VAST has a renewal rate of 98% of its service contracts within the timeframe of the renewal period. We have 100% reference-able customer base. • Customer Satisfaction – VAST scores in the highest percentile with respect to customer satisfaction, as measured, and evidenced by the high renewal performance. Currently there are only a few Veritas TSPP partners in the US. VAST ranks in the highest category for overall performance, especially in the area of service call handling and closures.

items.description:
This Service is available in Spanish

Esta evaluación está dirigida a organizaciones que buscan un análisis en profundidad, así como una solución tangible que profundice en sus procesos empresariales, identifique ineficiencias y proporcione un camino claro para la mejora a largo plazo utilizando tecnologías Microsoft. Las empresas obtendrán un profundo conocimiento de sus operaciones actuales y un plan estratégico claro para transformar y optimizar los procesos, en consonancia con sus objetivos empresariales a largo plazo, así como la capacidad de "dar vida" a soluciones que tengan como núcleo sus procesos, su personal y sus objetivos comerciales.

En el transcurso de un mes, nuestro equipo de expertos trabajará estrechamente con las partes interesadas para comprender a fondo sus operaciones, descubrir ineficiencias e identificar oportunidades de mejora significativas. Esta evaluación va más allá de la tecnología para centrarse en alinear sus procesos y formas de trabajar con sus objetivos comerciales estratégicos, ya sea mejorar la satisfacción del cliente, aumentar los ingresos o mejorar la eficacia operativa. Le proporcionaremos una hoja de ruta completa que le guiará en la implantación de cambios que generarán un valor empresarial significativo. Para las organizaciones en las etapas iniciales de adopción de Dynamics 365 o Power Platform, esta evaluación garantiza que su inversión está estratégicamente alineada con sus objetivos de negocio. Le ayudaremos a integrar estas plataformas en sus operaciones de forma que favorezcan el crecimiento, impulsen la innovación y resuelvan retos empresariales críticos, preparándole para el éxito a largo plazo desde las fases más tempranas. Los usuarios existentes de Dynamics 365 o Power Platform se beneficiarán de una nueva perspectiva sobre cómo optimizar sus operaciones actuales. Nuestra evaluación identificará mejoras en los procesos y mejoras estratégicas que le ayudarán a cumplir mejor sus objetivos empresariales, ya sea a través de una mejor toma de decisiones, una mayor eficiencia o un mayor compromiso con el cliente. Esta evaluación nos da una gran cantidad de tiempo para profundizar realmente en su negocio al tiempo que garantiza que es una evaluación rápida y eficiente que se racionaliza para minimizar la interrupción de sus operaciones y las partes interesadas. Resultados: Análisis detallado de los procesos: Representaciones escritas y visuales de los métodos de trabajo actuales y de los procesos optimizados que se consideran susceptibles de mejora o introducción. Informe exhaustivo de análisis de carencias: Identificación de áreas críticas de mejora que representan riesgos comerciales o técnicos que deben abordarse a corto plazo. Hoja de ruta estratégica: Un plan de aplicación por fases con plazos y recursos necesarios. Hackathon/POC: Previo acuerdo en la fase inicial de la evaluación, se puede llevar a cabo un Hackathon, o desarrollar una Prueba de Concepto, para asegurar que las soluciones se llevan a la vida con el fin de obtener confianza y comprensión de lo que se podría lograr aprovechando el equipo de expertos de Telefónica Tech y la Plataforma Power.

items.displayName: 1 Sprint Microsoft Copilot Studio - 11 Jours - Implémentation
items.summary: Créer un agent relié à une ou plusieurs bases de connaissances et mener un pilote d'un mois
items.description:
Créer un agent à l'aide des dernières nouveautés Microsoft Copilot Studio sur un cas d'usage concret et comprendre les apports des réponses génératrices, des actions et les différents paramétrages disponibles :

  • 1 atelier de présentation de Microsoft Copilot Studio et des différentes options de paramétrage
  • Identification des bases de connaissances à intégrer et l'orchestration globale
  • Définir des objectifs visés lors de la phase pilote et critères d'évaluation de l'agent
  • Configurer l'agent Microsoft Copilot Studio et être en support des équipes client pour le déploiement dans Teams ou dans Microsoft 365 Copilot
  • 1 enquête d'usages et récole de feedbacks suite au pilote
  • 1 document de synthèse reprenant les opportunités et difficultés rencontrées
  • 1 atelier de roadmap pour présenter les actions à mener suite au retour pilote et projection pour généraliser la pratique à d'autres équipes métiers

La prestation se concentre sur Microsoft Copilot Studio et son intégration dans Microsoft Teams ou dans Microsoft 365 Copilot. La prestation peut être menée en français ou anglais.

items.summary: Nous vous proposons de vous accompagner pour cadrer votre gouvernance Teams en déployant la solution Powell Teams pour disposer de tableaux de bord de suivi et de statistiques d'utilisation.
items.description:
Appliquer votre gouvernance Teams à l'aide de Powell Teams :

  • 2 ateliers de conception fonctionnelle pour définir les paramétrages de l'outil Powell Teams ( 2 Jours)
  • Déploiement de Powell Teams sur le tenant Microsoft 365 du client ( 2 Jours)
  • Paramétrage de Powell Teams pour des typologies d'équipes (maximum de 8-10 types d’équipes) (2 Jours)
  • 1 atelier de prise en main / formation de 2h30 pour que le client soit autonome ( 1 Jour)

La prestation utilise Microsoft Teams et Powell Teams (licences non incluses). La prestation peut être menée en français ou anglais.

items.displayName: 1 Sprint Power Virtual Agents - 8 Jours - Implémentation
items.summary: Créer un chatbot relié à une base de connaissances interne grâce à la puissance des réponses génératrices
items.description:
Créer un chatbot Power Virtual Agents relié à une base de connaissances interne grâce à la puissance de l’IA générative :

  • 1 atelier de présentation de Power Virtual Agents et du fonctionnement des réponses génératrices
  • Identification de la base de connaissances SharePoint à intégrer en réponse génératrice
  • Définir des objectifs visés lors de la phase pilote et critères d'évaluation du chatbot
  • Configurer le chatbot Power Virtual Agents et être en support des équipes client pour le déploiement dans Teams
  • Réaliser une session de présentation du mode de fonctionnement à l'équipe pilote
  • 1 document de synthèse reprenant les opportunités et difficultés rencontrées
  • 1 atelier de roadmap pour présenter les actions à mener suite au retour pilote et projection pour généraliser la pratique à d'autres équipes métiers

La prestation se concentre sur Power Virtual Agents et son intégration dans Teams. La prestation peut être menée en français ou anglais.

items.summary: Erhalten Sie am Ende des Assessment eine Übersicht, wo Sie auf dem Weg der digitalen Transformation stehen.
items.description:
WO STEHEN SIE AUF DEM WEG IHRER DIGITALEN TRANSFORMATION? LASSEN SIE UNS DAS HERAUSFINDEN. Abhängig davon, wie traditionell ein Unternehmen ist, können die Herausforderungen auf dem Weg der Digitalisierung unterschiedlich stark sein. Aber wissen Sie genau, wo Ihre Herausforderungen liegen und welche Aufgaben es zu bewältigen gibt? Unser Cloud Readiness Assessment wurde designed um Ihnen mit minimalem Zeitaufwand aufzuzeigen, wo Sie stehen und welche Aufgaben vor Ihnen liegen und wie sich ihre Aufgaben mit Microsoft 365 und Azure Diensten vereinfachen lassen.

Das Paket enthält: - 4 Stunden aufgezeichnetes Lernmaterial, um Ihnen einen Überblick zum aktuellen Stand der Technik zu geben - Einen Fragebogen zur Bestimmung ihres Standes auf dem Weg der Digitalisierung

Ergebnis: - Basierend auf dem Fragebogen erhalten sie eine personalisierte Executive Summary in Schriftform - Wenn Sie eine mehr persönliche Beratung haben möchten, sprechen Sie uns an

The offer is only available in german

Unser Cloud Readiness Assessment wurde designed um Ihnen mit minimalem Zeitaufwand aufzuzeigen, wo Sie stehen und welche Aufgaben vor Ihnen liegen und wie sich ihre Aufgaben mit Microsoft 365 und Azure Diensten vereinfachen lassen.

Das Paket enthält: - 4 Stunden aufgezeichnetes Lernmaterial, um Ihnen einen Überblick zum aktuellen Stand der Technik zu geben - Einen Fragebogen zur Bestimmung ihres Standes auf dem Weg der Digitalisierung

Ergebnis: - Basierend auf dem Fragebogen erhalten sie eine personalisierte Executive Summary in Schriftform - Wenn Sie eine mehr persönliche Beratung haben möchten, sprechen Sie uns an

The offer is only available in german

items.summary: Sie möchten Telefonie in Microsoft Teams nutzen? Dies ist das richtige Angebot, um loszulegen.
items.description:
Kommunikation und Kollaboration sind zu einem wichtigen Bestandteil des Tagesgeschäfts geworden. Neben den Standardfunktionen Chatten, Austauschen von Dateien und Links, Planen von Meetings und Abhalten von Videokonferenzen bietet Microsoft Teams viele weitere Funktionen, wie Microsoft Teams-Anrufe.

Sie haben noch eine bestehende Telefonanlage und möchten diese in Microsoft Teams integrieren oder ersetzen? Vielleicht interessieren Sie sich auch für die Art und Weise, wie Sie Anrufe ohne Ihre eigene Telefonanlage durchführen können?

Dieses Angebot beinhaltet:

Übersicht Kommunikationsfunktionen Endbenutzergeräte und Teams-Raumsysteme Lizenzierung Migrationsszenarien (Skype 4 Business, PBX-Implementierung etc.) Funktionen für Teamanrufe Anrufpläne vs. direktes Routing

Nach diesem Workshop haben Sie einen ausreichenden Überblick, um mit einer Implementierung der Teams Telefonie starten zu können.

The offer is only available in german

items.displayName: 1 Tag Workshop: Transformationskonzept für MS Dynamics 365 Business Central von Aproda AG
items.summary: In diesem Workshop bieten wir Ihnen Beratung betreffend Systementwicklung über die nächsten Jahre sowie einen Abgleich zwischen dem heutigen und dem zukünftigen Ansprüchen und Zukunkftsthemen.
items.description: Leistungsangebot In unserem Workshop bieten wir Ihnen: * Beratung betreffend Systementwicklung über die nächsten 1 – 3 Jahre * Abgleich zwischen der heutigen Nutzung des Systems und den zukünftigen Ansprüchen zu ermöglichen * Zukunftsthemen bereits heute zu berücksichtigen Detailinhalt - Ist und Zukunfts-Situation genauer untersuchen - Kostenoptimierung erarbeiten (z.B. Reports, neue Standardelemente von Dynamics 365) - Neue Möglichkeiten aufzeigen- Wo haben Sie einen Hebel? (z.B. Outlook-Integration oder PowerPlatform) - Unterstützung in der Entscheidung der Lizenzmigration Digitalisierung - Wie hilft Ihnen die Software im Markt erfolgreicher zu sein? - Erste Rahmenbedingungen betreffend Systemupgrade erarbeiten - Inhaltlich (Prozesse und Schnittstellen) - Betriebsform (Cloud oder lokaler Betrieb) - Kosten | Termin Das Ziel von unserem Workshop ist … - Mehrwert einer Transformation aufzuzeigen - Status Quo analysieren - Zukunftssituation aufzeigen - Entscheidungsgrundlagen Lizenzierung kennenlernen - Ihre Unternehmensvision umsetzen zu können Agenda 9 – 10 Uhr - Block I Digitalstrategie: - Begrüssung / Ziele - Diskussion Leitfragen zur Digitalstrategie - Leitfragen IT-Infrastruktur 10 - 12 Uhr Block II Systemanpassungen: - Diskussion Anpassungen gem. System-Doku - Verkauf, Kalkulation - Einkauf, Planung / Logistik - Berichte / Statistiken 13.00 – 14.00 Uhr Block II Sytemanpassungen: - Berichte / Statistiken - Schnittstellen 14.30 – 15.30 Uhr Block III Zukunftsthemen: - Digitalisierung - Schnittstellen - Drittsysteme 15.30 – 16.00 Uhr Block IV Projektplanung: - Themen Vorprojekt - Teil des Projekts - Abgrenzungen - Kosten- und Phasenplanung - Leistungsumfang 1 Tage Workshop beim Kunden 1 Tag Vor- und Nachbereitung Ergebnis in Power Point-Form Projektscoping - Themen Vorprojekt - Teil des Projekts Abgrenzungen: Kosten- und Phasenplanung Migrationskonzept Inhaltliche Eckpunkte der künftigen Lösung Schnittstellen Umsysteme Datenübernahme Betriebsform Innovation Digitalisierung Schnittstellen Umsysteme (Drittprodukte) This consulting service is only available in German. Dieser Consulting Service ist auf Deutsch.

items.summary: Agile 365 for Teams Enables you to accelate your digital transformation
items.description:
It is a Microsoft Teams assessment developed by inove to help companies transform the way they communicate and collaborate with their teams, departments and customers. Based on the Agile methodology we go through the steps below for the success of your project: 1 - Envisioning Workshop: workshop for IT staff and key users where we will present the tool's full potential + integrations with other Office 365 features and workspace adaptation with other services, e.g. Trello, GitHub, Adobe and many others.

2 - Solution Assessment: Immersion in the way departments and teams work, considering the business objectives combined with the most appropriate technologies: SharePoint, Stream, Planner, Power Automate.

3 - Pre-Game & Deployment: We prioritize and plan the subsequent sprints, considering deliverables that already transform the client's business from the very first week.

4 - Adoption: Training of the IT team (administration, security and compliance) and training of users.

items.displayName: 1 Week Assessment Azure Cloud Cost Optimization
items.summary: Going the cloud way to lower spending and optimize billing eventually increase ROI
items.description:
Navisite’s Azure Cloud Cost Optimization (ACCO) service offers immediate discounts on key Azure services, includes access to CloudCheckr-a powerful tool for optimizing Azure cost and security--and provides direct access to a dedicated team of FinOps experts. ​

Get Lower Rates. Get lower rates for Azure resources as a result of joining Navisite’s CSP program.​

Expert Cost Guidance Included. Quarterly or monthly guidance from automated tools that has been validated by Azure experts. ​

Control Spending Alerts. Get alerted about cloud spending spikes before it's too late.​

Simplified Support Platform support through Navisite instead of navigating Microsoft ticket process.​

Understand your Bill: Leverage our Azure billing experts to understand how your money is being spent.​

Access to Experts. Access to recurring management and project services from an Azure Expert MSP.​

items.summary: 1 Week CIO Assessment for Current State IT for Microsoft Technologies (Azure, Office 365, Dynamics 365, Intune, SCCM)
items.description:
Advisory Services: Assess & Benchmark Current State of IT from a business <-> technology perspective

Perform an assessment (interviews, questionnaires) to determine the current IT landscape and generate:

Deliverable: an executive deliverable with action plans & next steps for the IT Roadmap on your Microsoft Platform (Office 365, Azure, Dynamics). 

Assessment can be performed in a few ways (but only one of): 
CIO Business Vision
CIO-CEO Alignment
Current State IT Assessment

items.summary: I løpet av en heldagsworkshop loser vi dere gjennom viktige aspekter ved god governance. Her deler vi erfaringer og har fokus på å definere konkrete aksjonspunkter.
items.description:
This service is available in Norwegian.

Ta kontroll over AI-revolusjonen: Sikre god styring over utvikling på Power Platform med vår ekspertise.

AI og nye applikasjoner gir enorme muligheter, men det er lett å miste oversikten i jungelen av muligheter og trusler. Vi hjelper mange små og store virksomheter i Norge både med utvikling og sentralisert styring av Power Platform, og får skryt fra Microsoft for å løfte kundene våre til å bli markedsledende. Som en av Norges mest erfarne Power Platform-eksperter, hjelper vi dere å navigere trygt og effektivt, slik at dere kan utnytte potensialet i Power Platform fullt ut. Vår workshop gir dere konkret oversikt over verktøyene Microsoft har laget og en skreddersydd handlingsplan for å trygt og effektivt utnytte potensialet i Power Platform.

Vi tilpasser workshopen til deres behov og preferanser, ut ifra deres modenhet og ambisjoner. Workshopen varer vanligvis en arbeidsdag og kan gjøres fysisk, digitalt eller en kombinasjon. Ta med IT-ledere, sikkerhetspersonell, IT-administratorer og interessenter i Power Platform-initiativet. Før workshopen tar vi en prat med nøkkelpersoner for å skreddersy programmet til deres spesifikke utfordringer. Etter workshopen får dere en oppsummering med presentasjonen, konkrete anbefalinger og en tydelig handlingsplan.

items.summary: Mastering Prompt Engineering For Microsoft Copilot: 1 day Training Course
items.description:
Are you eager to harness the transformative power of AI? This course is meticulously crafted to empower a diverse range of professionals and enthusiasts, offering you the tools to unlock AI's potential and master Microsoft Copilot.

Discover the art and science behind crafting prompts for AI models, gain invaluable hands-on experience, and unearth best practices to optimise your outputs. Join us on this transformative learning journey and step into the realm of AI mastery.

Course Objectives: 1: Understand the Fundamentals of Microsoft Copilot: 2: Design Effective Prompts for Copilot and the Microsoft 365 suit 3: Hands-on Experience with Copilot 4: Best Practices and Pitfalls for AI prompts

Module 1: Introduction to Prompt Engineering

  • Definition of prompts in AI
  • Role of prompt engineering in AI models
  • Importance of designing effective prompts Module 2: Fundamentals of Prompt Engineering
  • Types of prompts: completion, classification, question-answering, and more
  • Case studies of successful prompt design
  • Exercise: Understanding prompt types and their applications Module 3: Designing Effective Prompts
  • Principles of prompt design: clarity, specificity, context
  • Best practices for crafting prompts for GPT models
  • Exercise: Creating prompts for a text generation task Module 4: Advanced Prompt Engineering Techniques
  • Strategies for fine-tuning prompts
  • Addressing bias and harmful outputs
  • Exercise: Crafting prompts

5 Reasons to Attend:

  • Master a Crucial Skill: Acquire a deep understanding of prompt engineering, a critical skill in the rapidly evolving field of AI. This course provides you with the knowledge and expertise needed to design effective prompts for various AI models.
  • Hands-On Experience: Gain practical experience through interactive exercises and real-world case studies. This hands-on approach ensures that you not only understand the theory but can apply your knowledge immediately to enhance your AI projects.
  • Stay Ahead of the Curve: In the competitive landscape of AI, staying ahead is crucial. By attending this course, you will learn the latest techniques and strategies for prompt engineering, ensuring that you are at the forefront of industry trends.
  • Address Bias and Harmful Outputs: Learn advanced techniques for fine-tuning prompts and addressing bias in AI outputs. Equip yourself with the skills to create responsible and ethical AI models, a key consideration in today's technology-driven world.
  • Networking and Collaboration: Connect with like-minded professionals and experts in the field during the Q&A sessions and group discussions. Expand your professional network, exchange ideas, and foster collaborations that can propel your career in AI forward.

Pricing is per delegate

items.longSummary: 1 month paid one time
items.description: • 1 month paid one time

plans.description: • 1 month paid one time

items.summary: Nous vous proposons de vous accompagner pour cadrer un cas d’usage, le mettre en œuvre et vous rendre autonome pour la réalisation et maintenance de vos prochaines applications.
items.description:
Mettre en œuvre des cas d’usage en Power Platform demande de s’adapter à de nouvelles méthodes de travail. Nous vous proposons de vous accompagner pour cadrer un cas d’usage, le mettre en œuvre et vous rendre autonome pour la réalisation et maintenance de vos prochaines applications.

  • Analyse d’un cas d’usage et proposition d’une conception technico-fonctionnelle pour la mise en œuvre dans votre environnement (3 jours)
  • Réalisation de votre cas d’usage, du développement à la mise en production : par nos équipes où en accompagnant les vôtre (7 jours)
  • Formation de vos équipes pour maintenir l’application, comprendre les méthodes de travail propre à la Power Platform et vous fournir le support nécessaire à la maintenance de votre cas d’usage (2 jours)

La prestation peut utiliser les solutions Power Apps, Power BI ou Power Automate en fonction de besoins métiers. La prestation peut être menée en français ou anglais.

items.displayName: 1 week Azure Security design & review workshop
items.summary: The Redapt Azure Security QuickStart workshop enables organizations to understand current state and enhance their security posture and operations.
items.description:
Redapt’s Azure Security discovery and design offering where we identify the operational model, supporting tools and security operations processes that are aligned to support the future state of the organization. ▪ Security Standards, Policy review & gap analysis ▪ Compliance requirements & gap analysis ▪ Cloud Architecture review and identify services to meet security and regulatory certification standards and requirements ▪ Identify access management and review for organizational control over cloud-based services ▪ Secure operations management recommendations based on industry standard security best practices ▪ Microsoft Azure security portfolio review including Azure AD, Azure Key Vault, NSG, ATP, Azure monitor, Azure security center, Azure Sentinel

A typical agenda includes: Day 1 – Threat protection and Identity and Access Management review Day 2 – Azure Architecture review, Security Integration & Networking Day 3 – Cloud security governance Day 4 – Compliance requirements & gap analysis Day 5 – Security Operations management & Microsoft Azure security portfolio review

items.displayName: 1 week Proof-of-concept BI with Power BI
items.longSummary: Proof-of-concept (PoC) Business Intelligence (BI) solution using Power BI as a visualization tool.
items.description:
This application is available in Norwegian and English.

In this Business Intelligence Service, the customer will receive a proof-of-concept (PoC) Business Intelligence (BI) solution using Power BI as a visualization tool. The service will be useful for customers who are considering implementing a larger BI solution, or for customers who are inexperienced with the use of Business Intelligence and analytics. The solution can be run as a pilot project where the customer can subsequently evaluate the value and possible further development.

 

Business Intelligence helps to promote a data-driven culture where decision-making is to a greater extent supported by data and thus increase the quality of future decision-making.

 

The Proof-of-concept solution will include:

·       A Brief and precise mapping of the customer's desire for the finale result.

·       A maximum use of two data sources. Authentication and access to data sources must be facilitated in advance due to time efficiency as the main focus is the BI solution.

·       Data sources are directly linked to Power BI, and can come from on-premise or from various cloud providers.

·       Transformation and cleansing of data, in addition to KPIs, as well as measurements that will be carried out in Power BI.

·       Design of Power BI report and Dashboard for laptop and smartphone view.

·       Review of Power BI PoC and customer training.


Price: NOK 89 000

items.summary: Optimize your investment in Microsoft Azure with managed cloud services from Navisite
items.description:
We help you manage and monitor your Azure cloud deployments. From cloud system pricing and design to implementation and 24x7x365 support. Our services cover both IaaS and PaaS deployments, with strategic advisors providing unbiased guidance. items.summary: SEEPATH's 1 week Azure security implementation gives customers a centralized way to optimize, secure and manage their Azure workloads and be compliant
items.description:
SEEPATH's 1 week Azure security implementation gives customers a centralized way to optimize, secure and manage their Azure workloads and be compliant

The 1 week implementation process covers a) Discovery session to understand and analyze the security posture of your current cloud infrastructure. b) Identify Security Gaps, Vulnerabilities and various attack vectors including Ransomware c) Document and deliver Security Assessment reports. d) Identity and recommend right solution for Securing workloads on Azure based on the assessment reports. e) Implement action plan to secure workloads f) Recommendations for continual improvement

DELIVERABLE'S: a) Azure Infrastructure Security Assessment Reports. b) Recommendation Reports. c) Implementation Reports / Project Documents.

items.longSummary: Smart telephony features of 1&1 Business Phone integrated in Microsoft Teams
items.description:
Integrate 1&1 Business Phone smart telephony features into Microsoft Teams. Start and schedule meetings or easily join a video meeting.

1&1 Business Phone App for Microsoft Teams brings all your communication needs together in one convenient place. Make calls, start or schedule video meetings, and take advantage of powerful business telephony features directly from Microsoft Teams.

1&1 Business Phone App for Microsoft Teams enables users to:

  • Use of all functions of an enterprise PBX

  • Access to 1&1 Business Phone contacts from the Teams environment

  • The entire call history in one application: both from 1&1 Business Phone and Microsoft Teams

Less distractions, more productivity.

All PBX features are immediately available. So the combination of cloud telephony with Microsoft Teams enables quick access to streamlined internal processes and more time for concentrated work.

Use your favourite telephony features:

  • Settings

  • Favourites

  • Voicemail

  • Logging in/out of queues

To get started with the 1&1 Business Phone Microsoft Teams integration, you need an active 1&1 Business Phone account.

If you do not have an account yet, please contact our sales team under 08008040200 or request an expert consultation here: https://www.1und1.net/kontakt?themen_interessent=telefon&thema_kunde=telefon

Also, it is essential to install our desktop application and/or mobile applications to make phone calls or start and join meetings.

You can download the desktop app here: https://doc.1und1-businessphone.de/en/11-versatel-insights/downloads

The mobile apps are only available in Germany in the respective app stores (iOS & Android).

The 1&1 Business Phone Meet & Share Add-In makes it easy to schedule 1&1 Business Phone Meetings from your Outlook Calendar.

With this add-in, you can quickly add a 1&1 Business Phone meeting to any new or existing calendar event.

To register for 1&1 Business Phone's cloud telephone system, please contact our sales team.

items.longSummary: ReportServer on Hardened Ubuntu 14.04 LTS is an open source business intelligence (OSBI) platform with powerful reporting and analysis tools.
items.summary: Enterprise security at fraction of cost (< 1 cent
items.description:
A Report Server is a stateless server that uses the SQL Server Database Engine to store metadata and object definitions.Report Server comes with a flexible authentication mechanism that can be extended via Report Server's hook able plugin infrastructure.

This Image is made specially for Customers who are looking for deploying a self managed Community edition on hardened kernel instead of just putting up a vanilla install.

A Report Server is owned by A Report Server (https://reportserver.net/en/) and they own all related trademarks and IP rights for this software.

Disclaimer:The respective trademarks mentioned in the offering are owned by the respective companies. We do not provide commercial license of any of these products. Many of the products have a free, demo or Open Source license as applicable.

For Stack specific support :Contact Stack Developer Team(Since we do not own the IP for the stack,Stack developers should be contacted for any support)

For Image related support: Contact SecureAnyCloud Team

Installation Instructions for Ubuntu

1.The default installation path will be on your web root folder “/var/www/html”

2.Default ports :

  • 80/443: Webservers( NATing done to Internal endpoints which are normally 8080/8443)
  • 3389: RDP( For Windows Servers Only-Please modify this to Non Standard Port)
  • 22: SSH( For Linux Servers Only-Please modify this to Non Standard Port)

3.Default Login Details:

  • Username: azureuser
  • Password Details : /n [ Password has been provided in a ReadMe File on the Windows Desktop or is available after Successful SSH login in Linux on the console itself(Just after the logo all credentials shall be visible on your putty or SSH client) . If you still face issue, please look at the help link at the bottom of this page or reach out to support link on left side. ].
For more information on the Cognosys Secured Report Server Ent on Ubuntu 14.04 LTS visit our website Report Server Ent

Note: ReportServer is a famous open source provided by https://reportserver.net/en/

Cognosys is the world's largest publisher on All public Clouds with over 750+ images and 150+ Containers on Azure Marketplace. If you need any specific OS with any specific Open Source or proprietary stack which is not available on Microsoft Azure cloud ,We can provide you with your custom azure marketplace image without any additional charges. Please send a Custom Image Request using link on Left side

In some cases, these might be unique use cases, where you might have a proprietary IP which you want to provide to your client or to your Development team and do not want to share on any public domain. We provide confidential images locked to only your subscription also with a NDA signed for confidentiality. Please send us a an email or use the form on the left. We work with large Enterprise clients to help them build their Golden Image repository.

We are the only Cloud Marketplace publisher in the world to have 24x7 live chat support as well as Free Enterprise level email support with response times anywhere from 5 mins to 8 hours in any Time Zone across holidays and weekends.

items.summary: Ein gemeinsames Assessment zur Identifikation der Möglichkeiten von Voice Interaction & KI mithilfe von von Azure AI Services mit Fokus auf Service- & Produktinnovationen.
items.description:
Die Agenda des Assessment wird mit dem Kunden vorab individuell besprochen und auf den jeweiligen Teilnehmerkreis bezogen sowie auf deren Needs abgestimmt und festgelegt.

Agendapunkte/Arbeitsschritte:

  • Vorbereitung mithilfe Ihres Briefings zu den Zielen des Projektes
  • Potentiale entlang der Customer Journey erarbeiten und dokumentieren
  • Analyse, Identifikation und Definition von Voice & KI Möglichkeiten auf Basis von Azure AI Services

Ergebnisse/Outcomes:

  • Management Summary inklusive Maßnahmenkatalog & Handlungsempfehlungen
  • Dokumentation der Requirements
  • Technologieempfehlung / Rearchitecting

Dieser Service ist in deutscher Sprache verfügbar.

items.summary: Our visioning workshop will provide you with a clear road map and blueprint to implement Microsoft Azure Data & AI products.
items.description: As part of our Azure Visioning Workshops we’ll work with you to identify critical data sources within your organisation and show your how to bring them together in an Azure Modern Data Platform. We use Microsoft technologies to accelerate the development of data pipelines, power bi dashboards and machine learning models. We use the vision workshop as a starting point for you journey to analytics in the cloud. The visioning workshop helps senior executives, analytics managers and data professionals to obtain a better understanding of how Microsoft Azure products can help you achieve your data & analytics aspirations.

items.summary: In depth Azure DevOps workshop covering Azure Boards, Azure Repo's, Azure Pipelines, Azure Artifacts and Azure Test plans.
items.description:
In this one-day workshop we learn how to use Azure DevOps for your organization. Our experts in DevOps and Azure will take you on the DevOps journey from work item management to the automated release of your software to Azure.

This workshop is also an excellent basis for obtaining the AZ-400 certificate. The workshop is intended for developers, devops and infrastructure engineers. A technical background is therefore required.

items.summary: For companies transitioning from traditional analytics using DW & BI towards AI and Azure, this assessment covers strategy, infrastructure, and personnel needs to make it happen.
items.description:
You realize the value of building your own Data & AI capability. However, you have challenges with understanding

  1. How specific roles in Analytics serve company needs (Data Scientist, ML Engineer, Data Engineer, BI Developer, PowerApps Developer)?
  2. What are performance and pay scale expectations for tiered roles (e.g., Level-1 vs Level-4 Data Scientist)?
  3. What tools and infrastructure are available to meet the objectives? e.g. Power BI, Azure Machine Learning Service, Power Apps etc


Divergence.AI offers a 1-day consultation that

  1. Assesses the state of current capabilities and identifies gaps that include personnel, infrastructure and tooling.
  2. Maps analytics objectives for the year to specific use cases and KPIs

Based on your goals, our customized report

  • Defines obstacles and primary needs
  • Maps company personnel needs to specific roles (e.g., Machine Learning Engineer Level-1, Data Scientist Level-4, BI Developer Level-2)
  • Maps company infrastructure needs to specific tools (e.g., Azure Machine Learning Service, Azure Auto ML, Power BI, Power Apps with AI Builder)
  • Clarifies experience and certifications fundamental to those roles. e.g., DP-100 for AI Solutions on Azure, 70-768 for Power BI)
  • Compares available tools & technologies for achieving objectives e.g., Azure Machine Learning vs PowerBI)

items.description:
You realize the value of building your own Data & AI capability. However, you have challenges with understanding

  1. How specific roles in Analytics serve company needs (Data Scientist, ML Engineer, Data Engineer, BI Developer, PowerApps Developer)?
  2. What are performance and pay scale expectations for tiered roles (e.g., Level-1 vs Level-4 Data Scientist)?
  3. What tools and infrastructure are available to meet the objectives? e.g. Power BI, Azure Machine Learning Service, Power Apps etc


Divergence.AI offers a 1-day consultation that

  1. Assesses the state of current capabilities and identifies gaps that include personnel, infrastructure and tooling.
  2. Maps analytics objectives for the year to specific use cases and KPIs

Based on your goals, our customized report

  • Defines obstacles and primary needs
  • Maps company personnel needs to specific roles (e.g., Machine Learning Engineer Level-1, Data Scientist Level-4, BI Developer Level-2)
  • Maps company infrastructure needs to specific tools (e.g., Azure Machine Learning Service, Azure Auto ML, Power BI, Power Apps with AI Builder)
  • Clarifies experience and certifications fundamental to those roles. e.g., DP-100 for AI Solutions on Azure, 70-768 for Power BI)
  • Compares available tools & technologies for achieving objectives e.g., Azure Machine Learning vs PowerBI)
