items.description:
This 1-Day Workshop is for business and technical leaders and key stakeholders and is held onsite at the client's facility.

Attendees:

Program Key Stakeholders (Business and IT)

Duration:

1 Day Onsite

Objectives:

Facilitate discussion and documentation of…

  • Business Value and Outcomes
  • Solution Architecture
  • Ongoing Operations
  • Timeline/Horizons Provide deliverables that…
  • Demonstrate business alignment
  • Outline initiatives, priorities, and time horizons
  • Highlight expected value

Agenda:

  • Business Context – Detailed use case review and success criteria
  • Architecture Review
  • Cloud Services Review
  • Ongoing Operations
  • Program/Project Time Horizons and Enabling Roadmap

  • Discussion / Wrap up

items.publisherDisplayName: CELERITAS YAZILIM VE DANISMANLIK LTD. STI.
items.summary: Discover how Copilot Agents built with Microsoft Copilot Studio and Power Automate can transform your business through AI-driven automation in this 1-Day readiness assessment
items.description:
Empower Your Organization with Microsoft Copilot Studio & Power Automate

This assessment helps organizations accelerate their AI transformation by combining the power of Copilot Studio and Power Automate. Together, they enable intelligent workflows, conversational automation, and seamless integration across the Microsoft 365 ecosystem. We help you identify automation opportunities, design Copilot Agent architectures, and define an actionable roadmap for deployment.

Assessment Objectives

Evaluate current business processes for Copilot Agent

Understand how Copilot Studio extends Microsoft Copilot with custom Agents

Explore Power Automate flows for back-end process orchestration

Assess data, security, and Responsible AI requirements

Define integration patterns and an implementation roadmap

Who Should Participate

IT & Digital Transformation Leaders

Process Owners and Solution Architects

Power Platform Developers

AI & Automation Project Managers

What’s Included

Discovery & Use Case Mapping Identify and prioritize scenarios where Copilot Agents and Power Automate can add value

Copilot Studio Deep Dive Learn how to design, configure, and extend Agents with real-world use cases

Power Automate Integration Connect flows, data sources, and APIs to drive process automation behind each Agent

Architecture & Governance Review Cover Dataverse, security model, and Responsible AI practices

Readiness Scorecard & Roadmap Receive actionable recommendations for Copilot Agent adoption

Key Outcomes

  • End-to-end understanding of Copilot Studio and Power Automate integration
  • A clear roadmap for Copilot Agent deployment within Microsoft 365
  • Practical guidance for building and connecting intelligent workflows
  • Increased efficiency, productivity, and business agility through AI

items.summary: 1/2 Day Digital roadmap workshop helps optimize existing processes and unlocks valuable data to develop new channels of revenue.
items.description:
The data RDA captures provides a rounded and comprehensive view of your digital capability, infrastructure, and key opportunities to drive multipliers in your revenue and margin.

The workshop explores the benefits of deploying Sitecore on Azure. Migrating solutions to the Microsoft Azure platform can improve application performance and scalability —while simultaneously lowering operational costs and downtime.

The roadmap answers fundamental questions about digital and enables your business to stay accountable for your progress. It also allows you to answer tough questions around where to make immediate investments, how to attack your digital “low hanging fruit” and what existing efforts you should back off. We help transform your digital strategies into actionable initiatives and campaigns that leverage your key technology investments and align them with your business objectives.

items.summary: In product dedicated sessions we will explain the different pieces of Microsoft XDR product families and show the unique value add as solution but also as security platform in the bigger picture.
items.description:
An Envisioning Workshop will help you understand the technologies, the challenges, the benefits, and the way ahead. We will provide a technical overview about Microsoft XDR including Microsoft 365 Defender and Azure Sentinel. The agenda of the day: 1: after a personal round of introduction we explain the pi-sec portfolio and holistic approach
2: we touch base with Microsoft's security strategy and big picture 3: we will start off with a cybersecurity state of the nation where we address the latest cyberattacks and showcase how to do the cyber hunting. 4: Security is no silver bullet nor is any software. Therefore we go through organizational requirements and changes needed. 5: in the afternoon we then take a deep dive on Microsoft XDR while going through the different solutions. The outcome of the day is a big picture with individual connection points to start your individual cybersecurity journey.

items.summary: The purpose of this offering is to give customers a crash course on the version-control tool git and how it implements with GitHub and Azure in a DevOps workflow.
items.description:
Participants will be able to get some valuable knowledge surrounding git concepts, introduction to branching best practices, hands-on mentorship/practice utilizing git commands, and practice integrating with GitHub and Azure DevOps.

Agenda:

Module 1: Introduction to Git This module will teach students the history behind the creation of the git tool, as well as the underlying concepts that make git such an effective tool to leverage in the SDLC.

Module 2: Git Branching Best Practices This module introduces the concept of branching. Here, students will be able to understand what branching is, some best practices for branching, & get introduced to some of the most popular branching strategies to use in the industry

Module 3: Git Commands This module will dive into how to install git on your local machine, where you will be introduced to some of the most important git commands to know. Then, students will be able to get some hands-on practice using the tool to create a repository, perform basic branching, merging, and other strategies to manage your repositories.

Module 4: Integration with GitHub This module will discuss an overview of what GitHub is and how it goes hand-in-hand with the git tool. Here you will be introduced with the GitHub UI and led through the most important/common features. The participants will also be shown how to integrate their GitHub projects with Azure DevOps to provide a full end-to-end solution for your DevOps team.

Module 5: GitHub Actions This module introduces GitHub Actions and how it helps automate tasks in a GitHub software development workflow. It will first discuss the different types of actions you can create, allowing hands-on practice by creating your first action and using it in a sample workflow. This module will also dive deeper by taking a step-by-step approach through creating your own workflows that enable both CI (Continuous Integration) and CD (Continuous Delivery) using GitHub Actions

items.summary: Tailor-made Security and Identity workshop to show how Microsoft 365 can tackle most if not all of your security needs
items.description: Our Microsoft Solutions Architects with perform a short Q&A session to determine what security and identity challenges your organization has, and then our security experts will develop a tailor made workshop to ensure we cover the security features that matter to your organization and you show you how to maximize your Microsoft 365 licenses. Whether it's enabling features you already have but didn't know, such as Single-Sign On and Mutli-Factor Authentication, Getting the most out of you Defender for Outlook and how it can replace other third party products you have, or Ensuring you have a "just enough" access with a Conditional Access policy.

Whether it's enabling features you already have but didn't know, such as Single-Sign On and Mutli-Factor Authentication, Getting the most out of you Defender for Outlook and how it can replace other third party products you have, or Ensuring you have a "just enough" access with a Conditional Access policy.

items.summary: With Viva, you can visualize your OKR-goals, target and personalize your internal communications and overall increase your digital cooperation within your organization. Let us show you how.
items.description:
Microsoft AppSource – 1-Day Viva Workshop Microsoft Viva makes your company work more efficiently and better by enabling transparency. With Viva, you can visualize your OKR-goals, target and personalize your internal communications and overall increase your digital cooperation within your organization. Let us show you how with our one-day workshop. Gain hands-on experience and insights from industry experts. Don't miss this opportunity to stay ahead of the curve and maximize your use of Microsoft Viva. Here is our agenda: Pre-Engagement – Kick-off – Workshop Overview:

  • Kick-off – Introduction to Microsoft Viva and its offerings and solutions – what’s in Viva
  • Participants' expectations and goals for the workshop
  • Pre-engagement questionnaire Art of the Possible of Microsoft's Employee Experience platform:
  • Microsoft's Employee Experience platform - Microsoft Viva features and possibilities
  • Deep dive to the Microsoft Viva platform o Microsoft Viva suite including products such as Insights, Topics, Learning, Connections
  • Best practices for using Microsoft Viva o Implementing Microsoft Viva in your organization o Integrating Microsoft Viva with other Microsoft tools o Measuring success with Microsoft Viva Insights o Enhancing employee engagement with Microsoft Viva Topics o Supporting employee learning with Microsoft Viva Learning o Improving communication and collaboration with Microsoft Viva Connections
  • Microsoft Viva – Other tools and upcoming changes Hands-on session
  • Viva suite interactive Overview
  • Walkthrough for Viva Topics, Insights, Learning and Connections Design, Plan & Implementation
  • Define strategy & build the plan o Aligning the use of Microsoft Viva with business goals, engaging stakeholders, monitoring and improving the implementation
  • Use case & scenario discovery
  • Adoption & change management
  • Recap of key takeaways and final thoughts

items.displayName: 1-Day Workshop Modern Data Warehouse in Azure
items.summary: We offer 1-day workshop (in EN or RU) to discuss your business data needs and demonstrate ways to optimize your data platform with Azure services. You are welcome to join from any country!
items.description: During the workshop our highly experienced specialists will discuss your current data architecture and your existing business needs. To achieve better results it is recommended for you to answer some high-level questions in advance and prepare some materials for the meeting. Our data platform architect will discuss ways your data platform can be improved with Azure. As a result you will understand how well the current Azure services cover your requirements and how many additional customizations may be required. The workshop is held online.

items.displayName: 1-Day workshop: On-Prem SQL to Snowflake migration
items.summary: Capture the benefits of the cloud and eliminate common data challenges caused by data gravity, slow scalability, and difficult integrations by migrating your SQL database to Snowflake on Azure.
items.description:
Key drivers for cloud migration include capturing superior analytics and taking advantage of the pay as you go model. For organizations leveraging SQL on-premises, these drivers can extend to solving challenges surrounding data gravity, scalability, and secure data integrations.

By migrating on-premises SQL to Snowflake on Azure, organizations can eliminate data gravity challenges via more simple and secure to connect cloud apps to databases, resolving potentially insecure manual workflows. Further, eliminating data gravity enables more real time access to data, enabling cloud native data analytics.

Additionally, leveraging Snowflake on cost-effective, on-demand Azure resources enables organizations to easily scale their database as their needs grow.

Fractal Analytics is uniquely positioned to rapidly drive successful SQL migrations due to our deep expertise in data and partnerships with Microsoft and Snowflake. Fractal experts have a history of working alongside Microsoft to deliver successful cloud projects, including data migration and modernization projects. In addition, AI and Machine Learning is a part of our company DNA, making Fractal Analytics an ideal partner for organizations who want to enable novel, new, data-driven use cases.

This workshop is designed to help your organization seize the benefits of a cloud-based database by assessing your current environment and developing a clear roadmap for migrating to Snowflake on Azure. At the conclusion of this workshop, Fractal Analytics will take the findings, review them, and develop a roadmap for migration to Snowflake within 1-2 weeks.

items.summary: Solution assessment workshop for migrating on-premises Spark workloads running on Hadoop to Azure Databricks using WANdisco LiveData Migrator
items.description:
Organizations with large on-premises data centers frequently run Spark workloads on Hadoop for its speed and ability to efficiently process and store large volumes of data.

Migrating Hadoop to Azure Databricks enables organizations to take this even further. It leverages a highly optimized version of Apache Spark which outperforms non-Databricks workloads by 50x. Beyond quicker processing times, this enables organizations to support real-time analytics and modern data science practices such as MLOps.

Further, by leveraging migration tools like WANdisco LiveData Migrator, Fractal Analytics can help organizations migrate their Hadoop clusters to a Databricks Delta Lake with zero downtime and zero data loss.

To help plan on-premises Spark to Azure Databricks migrations, Fractal Analytics is offering a 1-day solution assessment workshop where we assess your existing data environment, data sources, data connector availability, and business needs and requirements.

At the conclusion of the workshop, Fractal will assess our findings and deliver an initial migration roadmap within 1 to 2 weeks.

items.summary: Accelerate CRM transformation roadmap planning and implementation
items.description:
Accelerate your CRM transformation with a 1-hour discovery session tailored for organizations exploring Microsoft Dynamics 365 Sales and Customer Service.

This complimentary session is ideal for businesses seeking to: Modernize sales operations with AI-driven insights, lead management, and opportunity tracking. Enhance customer service delivery through multi-channel case management, intelligent routing, and real-time dashboards.

Our consultants will:

  1. Assess your current sales and service workflows.
  2. Demonstrate key capabilities of Dynamics 365 Sales and Customer Service.
  3. Explore integration scenarios across Microsoft platforms - including Microsoft 365 (Outlook, Teams, SharePoint), Azure, and other Dynamics 365 applications - as well as third-party systems such as ERP, e-commerce, and helpdesk tools.
  4. Discuss licensing options and implementation timelines based on your business needs.

Session Format: The session is available onsite within Klang Valley. For locations outside Klang Valley, virtual delivery is preferred, though we will assess internally whether an onsite session is feasible based on scope and availability.

Duration: 1 hour

Target Audience: Sales leaders, service managers, CRM owners, IT decision-makers

Languages: English (other languages available upon request)

Whether you're evaluating CRM options or planning a digital upgrade, this session will help you envision a scalable, secure, and intelligent solution tailored to your goals.

items.displayName: 1-Hr Demo of Dynamics 365 Business Central for Financial Management
items.longSummary: Take your business from good to great.
items.description:
Give us 1-Hr and we will give you a clear vision of how Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central can help you manage your business with a powerful yet simple ERP solution.

We understand your company's unique challenges in scaling while improving profitability. A modern,cloud-based ERP solution is the right step in that direction.

In this demo, we will explain various features of Business Central. As time is limited, we will focus more on the Finance Management capabilities.

For a demo of all the modules, please feel free to select our 2-hour demo to cover everything possible with Business Central.

Agenda

    • Different features of Business Central
    • Different licensing types and their costing
    • Functionalities of Financial Management suite
      • General Ledger and COA
      • Bank accounts reconciliation
      • Intercompany transactions
      • Cost Accounting
      • Sales and Receivable, Procurement, and Payables management
      • Reporting and extensions
      • Integration with different third-party systems like Payroll, Warehouse Management
    • Project plan for implementation
    • Points to take care of before you start implementing
    • Q & A

Deliverables:

· Demo of Finance Management suite

· Clear understanding of license types & costs, project timelines, implementation cost

· Points to take care of for successful implementation

items.summary: Das Ökosystem der Cloud bewegt sich in einem sehr schnellen Tempo. Dieses Betreuungsangebot hilft Ihnen, auf dem neuesten Stand zu bleiben.
items.description:
Um mit dem Innovationstempo in der Cloud Schritt zu halten, bieten wir vierteljährlich ein Briefing an, um Sie über die neuesten Innovationen im Bereich Microsoft Azure auf dem Laufenden zu halten. Auf diese Weise erfahren Sie, welche Möglichkeiten Sie bei zukünftigen Transformations- oder Cloud-Entwicklungsprojekten haben. Abhängig von Ihrer Nachfrage schneiden wir die wichtigen Nachrichten für Ihren Bedarf zu.

Dieses Paket enthält:

  • 30min Briefing-Vorbereitungsanruf
  • Gemeinsame Einschätzung Ihrer spezifischen Bedürfnisse und Interessen
  • 1h Call zur Präsentation der Nachrichten und Updates
  • Gemeinsame Einschätzung von Folgeaktivitäten

This offering is only available in German.

This offering is only available in German.

plans.summary: Das Ökosystem der Cloud bewegt sich in einem sehr schnellen Tempo. Dieses Betreuungsangebot hilft Ihnen, auf dem neuesten Stand zu bleiben.
plans.description:
Um mit dem Innovationstempo in der Cloud Schritt zu halten, bieten wir vierteljährlich ein Briefing an, um Sie über die neuesten Innovationen im Bereich Microsoft Azure auf dem Laufenden zu halten. Auf diese Weise erfahren Sie, welche Möglichkeiten Sie bei zukünftigen Transformations- oder Cloud-Entwicklungsprojekten haben. Abhängig von Ihrer Nachfrage schneiden wir die wichtigen Nachrichten für Ihren Bedarf zu.

Dieses Paket enthält:

  • 30min Briefing-Vorbereitungsanruf
  • Gemeinsame Einschätzung Ihrer spezifischen Bedürfnisse und Interessen
  • 1h Call zur Präsentation der Nachrichten und Updates
  • Gemeinsame Einschätzung von Folgeaktivitäten

This offering is only available in German.

items.summary: Assessment Ihrer bestehenden Microsoft 365 Umgebung hinsichtlich Best-Practices und Betreibbarkeit
items.description:
• this application is only available in German -

Assessment mit einem Fragenkatalog von über 150 relevanten Fragen zur Cloud-Infrastruktur und zum Gesundheitszustand der vom Kunden genutzten Microsoft 365 Services, wie z.B. Office 365, Microsoft Teams, Exchange Online oder SharePoint Online.

Ziele sind:

  1. Betriebsfähigkeit
  2. Kosten & Effizienz
  3. Servicequalität
  4. Sicherheit

Als Ergebnis erhält der Kunde

  • Ergebnisse der Bedrohungsanalyse
  • Dokumentation der Befunde mit Schweregrad und empfohlenen Maßnahmen
  • identifizierte Quick Wins

Mit diesem Angebot stellen wir sicher, dass die vom Kunden eingesetzten Microsoft 365 Services optimal eingerichtet sind um den größtmöglichen Nutzen für den Kunden zu liefern.
